content: Using the provided reference image as the character and design base, transform the clean Live2D model reference sheet into a polished VTuber debut announcement poster while keeping the same character design, hoodie, headphones, choker, star and constellation motifs, and overall purple-blue night palette. Change the composition from a full-body reference sheet to a dramatic upper-body key visual of the character seated at a streaming desk, one hand near the face, in a cozy nighttime bedroom-studio. Add a starry city-night window background, curtains, hanging star ornaments, glowing monitors, desk microphone, keyboard/controller, and a drink mug, with soft cinematic lighting and sparkly atmospheric effects. Preserve the branding of Yume Asta and make the layout feel like an X/Twitter thumbnail or promotional key visual. Add dense decorative typography and framed info panels in elegant Japanese idol/VTuber promo style: a large title with the Japanese name and romanized 'Yume Asta', a short poetic tagline, 4 boxed profile sections labeled 'Profile', 'Like', 'Keyword', and '配信スタイル', plus 1 smaller boxed hashtag/community section at the bottom left. Add a large glowing headline at the bottom center reading 'VTuber Debut' and 'Coming Soon', plus a ribbon-style banner beneath it with Japanese debut-stream text. Make it richly detailed, dreamy, luminous, and premium, like an official VTuber debut teaser poster.
title: VTuber Debut Poster from Character Sheet
description: This prompt turns a character reference sheet into a dramatic, text-heavy VTuber debut promotional poster for social thumbnails and announcement art.

content: Create a highly detailed scientific anatomical poster of a {argument name="subject" default="neuron"} on a clean warm off-white paper background, presented as a museum-quality hybrid of 3D pencil drawing and ultra-realistic biological illustration. The composition centers on one large neuron in three-quarter view, with an oversized spherical purple nucleus inside a textured cell body, many branching dendrites spreading outward like winter tree branches, and a long axon extending diagonally down to the right. The axon is partially cut away to reveal its internal structure and is wrapped in segmented blue-gray myelin sheaths with visible gaps at the nodes of Ranvier. At the far end, the axon branches into exactly 15 thin terminal fibers, each ending in a rounded synaptic bulb with pale peach and pink tips. The main central figure should look sculptural, organic, and slightly glossy, with intricate membrane textures, subtle beige, ivory, silver, brown, and violet coloration, and extremely fine linework for the distal branches. Surround the centerpiece with 6 labeled educational inset sections arranged like a textbook infographic: top left a title block reading {argument name="title text" default="NEURON (NERVE CELL)"} with a short explanatory paragraph and a numbered structure list containing exactly 10 items; upper right a smaller monochrome full-neuron sketch labeled {argument name="style note" default="3D PENCIL DRAWING"}; lower left a cell body soma detail diagram with labels pointing to internal organelles; bottom left a myelin sheath cross-section cylinder diagram; lower center a square grayscale microscopic view panel with 4 labels; right center an electrical signal section with a small action potential graph showing membrane potential versus time; lower right a synapse close-up drawing with receptor and neurotransmitter labeling. Include fine serif typography, delicate leader lines, small circled numbers on the main neuron, and the feel of an elegant old scientific plate mixed with modern biomedical visualization. Keep the layout airy and balanced, with the central neuron dominating most of the canvas, landscape orientation, extremely high resolution, crisp educational poster design, and a refined neutral aesthetic.
title: Scientific Neuron Anatomy Poster
description: This prompt generates a detailed educational neuron infographic poster with a central 3D biological rendering and multiple labeled anatomical inset diagrams for textbook, editorial, or classroom use.

content: A whimsical yet reverent Renaissance-style parody of The Last Supper, with exactly 13 anthropomorphic teddy bears seated along one side of a long banquet table in a grand classical dining hall. The central bear is the clear focal point, posed like Jesus, facing forward with a calm, solemn expression, wearing a muted red robe with a deep blue drape. The other 12 teddy bears cluster in animated conversational groups to the left and right, each with slightly different fur tones from honey brown to cream, all with soft plush texture, rounded ears, black bead-like eyes, and expressive paws raised in discussion. Dress the surrounding bears in painterly biblical robes in earthy reds, dusty blues, ochres, and greens. Recreate the composition closely to Leonardo da Vinci’s Last Supper: symmetrical perspective, coffered wooden ceiling, three rear windows with soft blue mountain landscape visible outside, dark wall tapestries on both side walls, and a long white tablecloth hanging over trestle supports. On the table, include scattered small bread rolls, plates, bowls, and multiple small glasses of dark red wine spaced across the full length. Use warm museum-like lighting, aged fresco tones, soft shadows, detailed oil-paint texture, and a highly polished old-master look, balancing humor with genuine artistic beauty. No modern objects, no text, no extra characters, straight-on wide composition, full table visible.
title: Teddy Bear Last Supper
description: A detailed old-master parody image of The Last Supper rendered with 13 teddy bears, ideal for whimsical fine-art homage and surreal meme-style illustration.

content: A whimsical high-detail oil-painting parody of Michelangelo’s Creation of Adam, but all human figures are replaced by teddy bears. On the left, a single plush teddy bear sits reclined on a rocky slope, posed like Adam, with soft golden-brown curly fur, round ears, shiny black eyes, a small dark nose, and a slightly open mouth. Its left arm supports its body while its right arm stretches outward, index paw extended toward the other bear. On the right, a larger central teddy bear posed like God emerges from a deep reddish-burgundy swirling mantle, wearing a flowing white draped robe, leaning forward with one outstretched arm and pointed paw reaching toward the left bear, almost touching fingertips. Surrounding the robed bear inside the mantle are 8 additional smaller teddy bears clustered tightly together, peeking from different angles like attendant figures. The composition exactly echoes the iconic near-touching hands scene, with the gap between fingertips centered. Use a cracked fresco wall background in warm beige tones, muted Renaissance palette, soft directional light, realistic fabric folds, detailed plush texture, subtle shadows, and a museum-quality painted surface. Blend classical Renaissance fresco aesthetics with charming surreal humor, keeping the scene elegant rather than cartoonish.
title: Teddy Bear Creation Fresco
description: A humorous Renaissance-style parody image of The Creation of Adam in which teddy bears replace every figure, ideal for whimsical art prompts and viral social-media visuals.

content: A classical oil painting in the style of a 17th-century Dutch master, closely inspired by Vermeer’s composition, showing a teddy bear posed as the subject of a formal portrait. The bear is shown in three-quarter view from the shoulders up against a deep black background, turning its head slightly toward the viewer. It has soft golden-brown plush fur, one rounded fuzzy ear clearly visible and the other partially visible beneath a large blue-and-gold turban wrapped around its head, with a long fabric tail draping down the right side. The bear wears a single oversized pearl earring hanging from the visible ear area, echoing the iconic “girl with a pearl earring” look. The clothing includes 2 visible garments: a warm golden-brown robe or coat and a small white collar at the neckline. Use dramatic chiaroscuro lighting from the left, rich painterly texture, subtle canvas grain, realistic fabric folds, gentle highlights on the pearl, and a museum-quality old master atmosphere. Keep the composition simple, centered, and elegant, with the teddy bear’s face rendered as a plush toy version of a noble portrait subject, blending cute toy texture with fine-art realism.
title: Teddy Bear with a Pearl Earring
description: This prompt generates a whimsical fine-art parody of a Vermeer-style portrait featuring a teddy bear, ideal for playful museum-inspired AI art.

content: A surreal oil painting in the style of Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa, reimagined as a teddy-bear hybrid portrait. The subject sits in the same half-length frontal pose with folded hands, wearing the dark Renaissance dress and soft draped shawl of the original painting, against the classic hazy landscape with winding water, distant mountains, and muted atmospheric perspective. The figure has 2 round fluffy teddy bear ears on top of the head and 2 plush furry paws folded at the bottom, with a warm beige teddy-bear fur chest replacing the visible skin of the neckline and hands. Long dark brown hair falls smoothly over both shoulders. The face area is intentionally left as a flat featureless brown rectangular block, creating an uncanny censored or unfinished effect. Use cracked varnish texture, aged museum-painting patina, smoky sfumato transitions, low-saturation brown and olive tones, soft golden lighting, centered composition, highly detailed fur texture blended into classical portrait brushwork, whimsical yet eerie fine-art parody.
title: Teddy Bear Mona Lisa Hybrid
description: A whimsical surreal fine-art parody that turns the Mona Lisa into a teddy-bear hybrid portrait, useful for meme-like art, concept exploration, or playful classical remix imagery.

content: Create a raw, high-contrast punk rock gig poster collage for an event called {argument name="event title" default="THE AI WEB DESIGN SPRINT"}. The design should feel like a xeroxed underground flyer pasted on a city wall: rough torn paper edges, photocopy grain, ink smudges, distressed black-and-white textures, hot magenta paint splashes, DIY zine aesthetics, and chaotic layered paper scraps taped and pinned together. Use a vertical poster composition with a black background and a central oversized torn white rectangle set at a slight angle, filled with huge condensed black distressed lettering for the main title. At the very top, add a smaller black torn strip with handwritten brush lettering in neon magenta reading {argument name="top slogan" default="LIVE PUNK!"}. On the left side, place a hot pink torn paper block with hand-drawn black text listing the date {argument name="event dates" default="April 27-30"}, then smaller stacked lines reading "4 NIGHTS OF CHAOS & CODE", "DOORS 7PM", "SHOW 8PM", "$10 ADV", and "$12 DOS". On the right side, add an off-white torn note with magenta "WITH:" at the top and four supporting acts listed in black handwritten text: "Minimal Playground", "Agency 976", "Cyberpunk Cafe", and "Surfers (Late Set)". In the center-lower area, show exactly 2 black-and-white photocopied punk band members from the chest up, standing shoulder to shoulder, both wearing leather jackets with patches and pins; the left one has round glasses, the right one wears a baseball cap. Their faces should be generic and partially obscured by the collage styling so the poster focus remains typographic and graphic rather than portrait-specific. Add a hot pink spiky starburst on the mid-right containing a black circle with a simple white radial symbol. Near the bottom right, place a beige masking-tape-like paper scrap with bold handwritten black text reading "Build Fast. Break Rules. Share Loud.". Near the bottom left, add a black rectangular venue block with magenta hand lettering for {argument name="venue name" default="THE SOUTH SIDE DIY"} and smaller white address text "218 W. 31st Street" and "Chicago, IL", plus a small white skull icon nearby. Include exactly 2 silver safety pins, one near the upper left corner and one near the lower left area, and exactly 1 strip of dark duct tape on the left edge of the main title paper. Finish the bottom edge with a black-and-white checkerboard strip spanning the full width. Overall mood: rebellious, loud, youthful, anarchic, street-pasted punk flyer meets tech event promo, with intense contrast, gritty halftone noise, screen-print imperfections, and hand-made collage energy.
title: Punk AI Sprint Flyer
description: A gritty punk-collage event poster prompt for creating rebellious promotional artwork for tech sprints, hack nights, or underground creative events.

content: Create a bold Swiss-modernist event poster for a live AI and web design sprint, portrait orientation, with a warm off-white paper background, stark black typography, and vivid red accent blocks. The composition is asymmetrical and editorial, with a strong grid and generous negative space. In the top left, place a small red uppercase line of text reading {argument name="date text" default="LIVE APRIL 27–30"}, followed by a thin horizontal black rule stretching toward the right. Below it, set an oversized stacked headline in ultra-bold black sans serif, left aligned, reading {argument name="headline text" default="The AI Web Design Sprint"}, broken across 4 lines with dramatic scale so the words dominate the left half of the poster. In the upper right quadrant, add 1 large solid red rectangle as a graphic block. Beneath that red block, place a compact black uppercase subhead in 3 lines: {argument name="tagline text" default="4 DAYS. REAL PROJECTS. SHIP TOGETHER."}. In the lower middle, include 2 cropped grayscale portrait photos of men from the chest up, side by side, documentary style, slightly overlapping the typography area; the left man has dark slicked-back hair and a short beard, the right man wears a dark baseball cap with embroidered lettering and has facial hair. Obscure both faces with 2 vertical soft-edged gray censor rectangles centered over each face. Along the right side, create a vertical feature column with 4 black square icons, each separated by thin horizontal divider lines and paired with uppercase labels. The 4 items are: a starburst icon with the label "CREATIVE COLLISION", a connected-nodes icon with the label "AI-POWERED WORKFLOWS", a code brackets icon with the label "CODE IN MOTION", and a terminal prompt icon with the label "REAL-TIME DESIGN". Near the bottom, add a full-width footer separated by a thin horizontal black rule. Inside the footer, create 4 text blocks divided by slim vertical lines: block 1 says "BUILD FAST. BREAK RULES. SHARE LOUD.", block 2 lists "MINIMAL PLAYGROUND & AGENCY 976" with a small red line beneath reading "LIVE ON THE WEB", block 3 lists "CYBERPUNK CAFE SURFERS (LATE SET)" and below it "4 NIGHTS OF CHAOS & CODE" and then "THE SOUTH SIDE DIY", block 4 lists ticket info as "TICKETS $10 ADV $12 DOS". On the far lower right edge, add vertical red text reading {argument name="location text" default="CHICAGO, IL"}. Use a clean neo-grotesk typeface similar to Helvetica or Akzidenz-Grotesk, heavy weight for the headline, condensed uppercase for supporting text, crisp alignment, subtle paper texture, and a high-contrast black-red-cream palette. The overall look should feel like a contemporary design-conference poster mixed with punk tech culture and brutalist editorial branding.
title: Swiss Poster for AI Web Design Sprint
description: A bold editorial event poster for a live AI and web design sprint, ideal for conference promotion, creative tech events, and social media announcements.

content: A stylized cinematic poster for a creative coding event, designed like a Disney-Pixar-inspired animated movie one-sheet. Vertical composition, warm cozy interior at night with a large loft window on the left showing a city skyline at sunset, exposed brick walls, and a neon-lit creative studio atmosphere. At the top center, big glossy dimensional typography reads "Disney•PIXAR" above the main title "The AI Web Design Sprint" in huge bold white 3D letters. Directly underneath, smaller bright text reads "BUILD FAST. BREAK RULES. SHARE LOUD." In the center foreground, 2 adult men sit side by side at a wooden table with a laptop between them, casual startup-founder vibe, one in a dark hoodie and one in a light sweatshirt and baseball cap, both facing camera in a friendly promotional pose. Their faces should be generic and unobtrusive, with the emphasis on the event-poster composition rather than portrait realism. The laptop lid has 3 visible stickers: a purple code-brackets sticker, a black sticker with a white burst symbol, and a rectangular slogan sticker reading "BUILD FAST. BREAK RULES. SHARE LOUD." Around the scene, include 4 whimsical animated mascot elements: a small hovering robot drone lamp in the upper left with glowing blue eyes and a cone of warm light shining downward; a smiling cartoon sun icon in the upper right; a tiny red pixel character floating nearby; and a glowing blue cat-like digital mascot standing on the table in front of the laptop. On the right side, a vertical monitor displays a dark coding interface with readable text including "// Welcome back, Julian!", "Opus 4.6", "Minimal Playground", "Agency 976", "Cyberpunk Cafe", "Surfers (late set)", and a checklist titled "Sprint Plan" with 4 items: "DISCOVER", "IDEATE", "BUILD", "SHIP". On the left side, a hand-lettered paper signboard contains 4 notices pinned together: "4 NIGHTS OF CHAOS & CODE", "DOORS 7PM", "SHOW 8PM", and "$10 ADV / $12 DOS". In the lower left foreground, a white coffee mug reads "THE SOUTH SIDE DIY 218 W. 31ST ST. CHICAGO, IL" with a small skull icon. In the lower right foreground, a terracotta plant pot with green leaves reads "CREATIVE COLLISION". At the bottom center, large bold text reads "APRIL 27–30" and below it "LIVE. ONLY ON THE WEB." Add a tiny line of faux credits along the bottom edge in classic movie-poster style, referencing names like Julian Lopez and Harvey Specter, projects such as Minimal Playground, Agency 976, Cyberpunk Cafe, and Surfers, and a playful production credit. Use dramatic warm-orange and cool-blue lighting, polished animated-film rendering, soft depth of field, glossy surfaces, rich contrast, highly detailed poster design, charming tech startup energy, and a premium event-advertisement finish.
title: Pixar-Style AI Web Design Sprint Poster
description: A cinematic animated-style event poster for a web design sprint, ideal for promoting hackathons, creative coding meetups, or startup workshops.

content: A highly embellished full-body anime fantasy illustration of {argument name="character name" default="SOPHIE"}, a young elegant female alchemist-mage standing in the center of a vast celestial library laboratory. She has {argument name="hair color" default="platinum blonde"} hair in a soft short bob with a side ponytail and a large crystalline flower hair ornament, though her face is obscured by a flat pale square censor block. She wears an ornate white and icy-blue dress with silver filigree, corset lacing, layered ruffles, translucent trailing panels, detached flowing sleeves, gemstone pendants, thigh garter ornaments, and white high-heeled ankle boots with metallic trims. Two glowing blue potion bottles hang at her hip. Her pose is graceful and confident: one hand raised with a floating faceted blue crystal hovering above her palm, the other holding an open magic book that projects transparent holographic pages and arcane interface diagrams in neon blue. The environment is a grand circular observatory-like library with towering bookshelves, alchemical instruments, astrolabes, hanging ornaments, glassware, candles, and luminous magical symbols. A huge backlit arched window behind her casts cool heavenly light. The floor beneath her is covered in glowing concentric magic circles and reflections, surrounded by crystalline blue flowers and sparkling particles. The composition is vertical, centered, and extremely polished, with dense decorative detail, ethereal lighting, layered translucency, shimmering highlights, and a palette dominated by white, silver, sapphire, and pale violet. Include large decorative title text on the left reading {argument name="title text" default="SOPHIE"}, smaller Japanese text beneath reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="ソフィー"}, a small "CV:" line below, a short block of tiny English flavor text on the lower left, and a luminous blue hologram panel on the right with the word {argument name="panel text" default="SOPHIC"}. Make it feel like a luxurious character key visual or promotional poster for a magical science heroine, ultra-detailed, glossy, radiant, and intentionally over-the-top.
title: Overdecorated Sophie Magic Poster
description: A lavish anime-style character poster of a white-and-blue alchemist heroine in a glowing arcane library, suited for fantasy game or light novel promotional art.

content: A cinematic anime-style movie poster for a fictional fantasy-drama film titled {argument name="headline text" default="EL VIAJE DE LA LUNA DE PLATA"}, vertically composed like a premium theatrical one-sheet. In the center, a half-body portrait of a young anime woman stands facing forward with a calm, introspective presence. She has a short silver bob haircut with soft layers and side bangs, pale skin, a black choker, a black geometric earring, a loose navy track jacket with double gold stripes on the sleeves, a white camisole underneath, and a dark backpack strap over one shoulder. Her expression is subtle and natural, with less exaggerated detail and a more believable, painterly finish. Behind her, blend multiple travel-destiny landscapes into one seamless magical composition: on the left, a lit train platform at dusk with a train arriving and a glowing city skyline beyond; below, distant mountains and a winding river valley; on the right, a coastal sunset with the sun low over the ocean, cliffs, a crescent moon, and 2 flying seabirds in the sky; at the bottom right, a curving road descending through illuminated hills toward a town of sparkling lights. Add a wooden signpost on the right with exactly 3 directional signs reading "NUEVOS CAMINOS", "VIEJOS RECUERDOS", and "SIN LÍMITES". At the top center, add the tagline {argument name="tagline" default="CADA DESTINO CAMBIA SU HISTORIA"} in elegant serif capitals. On the upper left, place exactly 4 gold award sections with laurel wreaths: 1 five-star line with the text "GANADORA DE MÚLTIPLES PREMIOS", 1 award reading "MEJOR PELÍCULA ANIMADA" with smaller festival text beneath, 1 award reading "PREMIO DEL PÚBLICO" with smaller festival text beneath, and 1 award reading "MEJOR BANDA SONORA ORIGINAL" with smaller academy text beneath. At the lower center, place the large glowing serif film title in ornate luminous typography, layered over the character’s torso. Beneath it, add the small quote {argument name="quote" default="A veces, para encontrarte... tienes que perderte en el mundo."}. At the very bottom, include a studio credit line and the release text {argument name="release text" default="PRÓXIMAMENTE EN CINES"} in large serif capitals, plus tiny production logos along the lower edge. Use rich twilight blues, gold sunset light, soft magenta clouds, atmospheric haze, reflective highlights, detailed cinematic lighting, and a polished illustrated poster look that feels emotional, adventurous, and natural rather than overly busy.
title: Anime Fantasy Movie Poster
description: This prompt generates a polished anime-style theatrical poster with a central silver-haired heroine, layered travel landscapes, Spanish film typography, and award-laurel marketing details.

content: A fashion magazine cover illustration in glossy modern anime style, designed like a Japanese women’s street-fashion editorial cover. The masthead is huge across the top in elegant serif letters reading {argument name="magazine title" default="MODE"} in bright pink, with the word "TOKYO" set vertically along the upper left edge. In the upper right corner, a magazine issue block shows the large number "06", the lines "JUNE 2024" and "vol.218", and below that a cover line reading "COVER GIRLS" followed by Japanese names. The main image shows exactly 2 anime girls photographed from a dramatic high angle as if the viewer is looking down at them in an urban alley or stairwell with brick and graffiti textures, strong sunlight, deep shadows, and a lively summer mood. The girl on the right is the dominant figure: a cheerful sporty blonde with vivid green eyes, tan skin, a wide toothy smile, messy twin-tail or high side-ponytail hair with loose strands, and a playful energetic pose leaning upward toward the camera. She wears a light blue lace or sheer ruffled camisole-style top, short denim shorts, a black choker, and chunky white sneakers. The girl on the left has long straight {argument name="second girl hair color" default="emerald green"} hair with heavy blunt bangs, bright blue eyes, pale skin, and a cooler, calm expression while seated lower in frame and looking up. She wears a casual summer outfit in muted blue-gray tones with bare shoulders and chunky sneakers. Add layered Japanese magazine cover text throughout the composition: on the left side, multiple stacked feature lines in black and pink including "NEO BASIC STYLE" and "SPORTY × FEMININE"; on the right side, a pink circular badge with white Japanese text and the English phrase "Trend 7"; across the lower half, a very large bold pink Japanese headline as the main cover line; near the lower right, a white handwritten script overlay reading "shine in my style"; and additional small white and pink cover blurbs along the bottom edges. Use a polished editorial layout, overlapping typography, saturated colors, sharp cel-shaded highlights, fashionable summer styling, and the feel of a premium anime magazine cover for {argument name="issue month" default="June 2024"}.
title: Anime Fashion Magazine Cover
description: A glossy anime-style Japanese fashion magazine cover featuring two stylish girls, layered editorial typography, and a vibrant summer street-fashion aesthetic.

content:
Create a refined vintage-modern type specimen poster for a fictional typeface named {argument name="typeface name" default="KASEI"}, designed as an elegant fusion of Roman and Japanese typography. Use a tall portrait layout on warm ivory textured paper with thin gray divider lines, black letterforms, and muted vermilion accent text and seals. Center the composition around a large serif Latin wordmark "{argument name="typeface name" default="KASEI"}" above 2 oversized Japanese kanji, "華世", set in a matching high-contrast classical style. Above the title, place the small heading "INTRODUCING" with a tiny ornamental diamond. To the right of the title area, add a vertical Japanese tagline reading "古典の美、未来の書体。". Under the main kanji, add the subtitle "A ROMAN × JAPANESE TYPEFACE" and below it a Japanese line in vermilion: "ローマの精神、日本の美。". On the far left, create a narrow sidebar with the stacked English text "A TYPEFACE HARMONIZING ROME AND JAPAN", a small circular crest, the Japanese text "製作 — MMXXIV", and "CREATED IN KYOTO, JAPAN".

Build the lower two-thirds as a meticulous type specimen sheet with exact labeled sections. In a left column, include 2 sections: "WEIGHTS" with 5 items — Light, Regular, Medium, Semibold, Bold — and "POINT SIZES" with 9 items — 8pt, 10pt, 12pt, 14pt, 18pt, 24pt, 36pt, 48pt, 72pt. In the main area, include a section titled "ROMAN CHARACTERS" showing 4 specimen lines: uppercase alphabet A through Z, lowercase alphabet a through z, numerals 0 through 9, and a punctuation/symbol line with slashes, commas, semicolons, exclamation mark, question marks, apostrophes, quotation marks, em dash, parentheses, brackets, braces, ampersand, at sign, dollar sign, asterisk, dagger, and double dagger. Below that, include a section titled "JAPANESE CHARACTERS" with 4 lines: 19 kanji "日 月 山 川 花 鳥 風 林 火 水 土 金 木 道 心 時 空 光 夢 永", 23 hiragana "あ い う え お か き く け こ さ し す せ そ た ち つ て と な に ぬ ね の", 21 katakana "ア イ ウ エ オ カ キ ク ケ コ サ シ ス セ ソ ン タ チ ツ テ ト ナ ニ ヌ ネ ノ", and a symbols line including Japanese punctuation, corner brackets, wave dash, middle dot, parentheses, angle brackets, double angle brackets, black lenticular brackets, postal mark, reference marks, and iteration mark.

Along the next row, add 4 compact specimen panels: "LIGATURES" with 10 items — Æ, AE, AJ, Œ, KA, KE, KI, KO, KU, and "st ct fi fl ft fb"; "STYLISTIC ALTERNATES" with 12 items — A, A, A, R, R, K, K, a, a, g, g, y, y, J, J, Q, Q, t, t — arranged as a neat sampling grid; "SPACING STUDY" showing the word "KASEI" with wide tracking above the kanji string "華世永美"; and "NUMERAL STYLES" with 4 lines — lining figures 0123456789, oldstyle figures 0123456789, and small caps combinations "H 0123" and "H 0123". Add tiny red Japanese captions beneath some of these sample boxes.

At the bottom, create 3 feature panels. Left panel titled "WORDS" with 3 entries: "HARMONIA" with the red Japanese and English gloss "調和  HARMONY", "VERITAS" with "真実  TRUTH", and "FORTITUDO" with "勇気  COURAGE". Center panel with a large Japanese quote "時を越え、美は残る。" above the English statement "BEAUTY ENDURES\nBEYOND TIME." and a small signature line "— KASEI" in red. Right panel titled "DETAILS" with a large kanji "永" over faint construction circles and guide lines, plus 4 right-aligned Japanese annotation callouts connected by fine dotted leader lines.

Finish with a footer containing 4 blocks: a small crest and "KASEI TYPE FOUNDRY" with "WWW.KASEIFOUNDRY.JP"; a centered language support note "SUPPORTING 200+ LANGUAGES" and "LATIN / GREEK / CYRILLIC / JAPANESE / SYMBOLS"; a right-side statement "DESIGNED WITH RESPECT\nCRAFTED FOR THE FUTURE"; and a square vermilion seal bearing "華世". Overall style should feel like a premium Japanese foundry specimen sheet, balancing editorial Swiss-grid precision, classical book typography, subtle Japanese branding, generous margins, restrained luxury, and museum-poster elegance.
title: Japanese Roman Typeface Specimen Poster
description: A sophisticated editorial poster showcasing a fictional bilingual serif typeface, suitable for font presentation, branding mockups, or typographic art prints.

content: Create a vintage fantasy travel postcard poster for {argument name="location name" default="BEACON HOLLOW"}, designed like a large-letter souvenir postcard from the 1950s–1960s. The composition is a single richly detailed horizontal scene with heavily weathered paper texture, rounded postcard corners, faded inks, creases, scratches, foxing, and worn edges. Across the top and center, huge dimensional block letters spell “BEACON HOLLOW” in classic retro postcard style, with warm cream outlines and red-brown extruded shadows; each letter contains miniature painted scenic vignettes of the destination, including alpine peaks, waterfalls, pine forests, a magical manor, glowing towers, and valley landscapes. In the upper left, hand-painted script text reads “GREETINGS FROM” in dark red. In the upper right, include a circular black postal cancellation stamp reading “BEACON HOLLOW / MAY 18 / 1967 / CREATIVE RETREAT,” overlapping a vintage postage stamp labeled “BEACON HOLLOW” and “CREATIVE RETREAT” with “7c,” depicting a moonlit mountain and a lighthouse-like beacon tower. Beneath the title, place a small curved ribbon banner reading {argument name="tagline" default="a magejosh destination"} with tiny compass-star ornaments. The main background should show a majestic golden-hour mountain valley with a winding river, distant snowy peaks, dense evergreen forests, and on the right a large timber-and-stone fantasy lodge perched on a cliff, warmly lit from within, with stairs descending the slope. Scatter subtle magical blue lights and faint arcane circular glyphs around the lodge and foreground for a worldbuilding-meets-magic atmosphere. In the lower left, place exactly 3 foreground desk objects: a dark ceramic mug with a compass emblem, an open sketchbook spread, and a fountain pen resting diagonally across the pages. The left page of the sketchbook is titled “Campaign Ideas” and lists 3 bullets: “The Forgotten Vale,” “Clockwork Pilgrims,” and “Echoes of the First Light,” with a small castle drawing below; the right page shows a tree illustration and the handwritten text “Beery world Hollow.” Across the lower center, add an old illustrated map spread out on the table, showing mountain icons and hand-drawn cartographic details. In the lower right, place exactly 5 more foreground elements: a closed leather journal embossed with a star compass and the phrase “Ideas Become Legends,” a cluster of 4 polyhedral dice, a rustic wooden signpost with 4 directional slats reading “STORY,” “GAME DESIGN,” “WORLD BUILDING,” and “AI FOR CREATORS,” a glowing glass lamp or tube device, and a nearby floating arcane target-like sigil. Add a pinned handwritten note left of center on aged paper reading, “Wish you were here — building worlds, chasing wonder, and turning ideas into adventures. — {argument name="signature name" default="magejosh"}” in blue cursive. Use painterly illustration with high detail, nostalgic Americana postcard design, fantasy concept art sensibility, warm sunset lighting, muted teal sky, sepia aging, and an inviting creative-retreat mood.
title: Vintage Fantasy Postcard of Beacon Hollow
description: This prompt generates a weathered retro travel-postcard illustration for a fantasy destination, ideal for creative worldbuilding promotions, fictional tourism art, or nostalgic branded concept pieces.

content: A whimsical painterly illustration of a vintage turquoise station wagon driving along a coastal road, shown in clean side profile against a simple blue sky and calm ocean horizon. On the roof, tied down with 4 visible tan ropes, is an absurdly oversized white dog bone, rough-textured and sculptural, longer than the car itself. Inside the car are 4 dogs total: 1 golden-brown dog in the driver’s seat with one paw on the steering wheel, 2 golden-brown dogs sitting in the middle and rear windows looking outward, and 1 white-and-brown dog at the back with its head tilted slightly up. Use thick expressive oil-paint brushstrokes, soft impasto texture, slightly naive folk-art realism, gentle humor, and a minimalist composition with the car centered horizontally. The road is dark in the foreground with a thin sandy strip near the water, and the palette is dominated by sky blue, sea blue, faded turquoise, cream white, and warm brown. Bright daylight, no text, no extra objects, serene but funny road-trip mood.
title: Dogs Carrying Giant Bone by the Sea
description: This prompt generates a humorous painterly coastal scene of four dogs riding in a vintage car with an enormous bone strapped to the roof, ideal for whimsical art prints or social media visuals.

content: A cinematic, gritty heist-team group portrait inspired by a Spanish crime thriller, showing exactly 5 robbers standing shoulder to shoulder in a grand historic bank interior. The scene is framed symmetrically in a low-angle medium full-body shot, with the tallest figure centered in front as the leader and 2 teammates on each side. All 5 wear identical deep red hooded jumpsuits zipped up the front, black straps and backpack harnesses, and their hoods up, creating a menacing anonymous look. The far-left and far-right robbers stand with arms crossed; the second-left and second-right robbers stand with arms relaxed at their sides; the center robber stands squarely facing camera with hands down and a dominant posture. Their faces are intentionally obscured and featureless, hidden in shadow and blur beneath the hoods. The setting is an opulent old bank hall with dark polished wood, brass safety deposit boxes lining both side walls, ornate columns, balcony railings, classical architectural details, and warm globe lamps. A bright golden overhead light pours down from the ceiling behind the group, creating dramatic backlighting, rim light on the red suits, long shadows, and a tense high-contrast atmosphere. Color palette: crimson red, black, dark brown, brass, and warm gold. Style: ultra-realistic cinematic photography, suspenseful crime-drama poster aesthetic, highly detailed fabric texture, moody lighting, symmetrical composition, shallow haze in the background, sharp focus on the team. Add a white {argument name="watermark text" default="Pollo.ai"} logo in the top-right corner.
title: Cinematic Red Heist Team in Bank
description: This prompt generates a dramatic movie-poster-style image of a five-person masked heist crew in red jumpsuits inside a grand old bank, ideal for thriller promos and crime-series-inspired visuals.

content: A romantic high-fashion travel campaign image set in a sunlit Spanish coastal village at golden hour, viewed down a narrow cobblestone stair street descending toward the sea. Whitewashed Mediterranean houses line both sides of the alley, with textured stucco walls, terracotta roof tiles, black wrought-iron balconies, wall-mounted lanterns, and many potted plants and flowers. On the right side, show 2 wrought-iron balconies, 2 wall lanterns, 1 vivid deep-blue door, and at least 8 terracotta pots with green plants mounted or placed along the facade. On the left edge, frame the scene with bright pink bougainvillea blossoms in the foreground. In the distance, the calm ocean reflects the warm sunset, with a rocky coastline and glowing horizon under a soft peach-and-gold sky. In the lower middle of the street, place 1 couple walking away hand in hand: a woman in a flowing light summer dress and a man in a pale shirt and shorts, small in scale to emphasize the environment. Composition is vertical editorial poster style, luxurious, serene, cinematic, aspirational, with warm golden sunlight casting long shadows and making the white walls glow. Add elegant overlay typography on the upper left in a refined serif font, warm brown color: the large line reads {argument name="headline text" default="España,"}, below it in italic serif reads {argument name="quote" default="siempre en mi corazón."}, with a thin ornamental flourish beneath the text. Include a subtle white {argument name="brand name" default="Pollo.ai"} logo in the upper right corner. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, premium tourism advertising aesthetic, soft atmospheric haze, natural depth, magazine-cover quality.
title: Luxury Spain Sunset Travel Poster
description: This prompt generates a photorealistic vertical travel-campaign poster of a romantic Spanish seaside village at sunset, ideal for tourism ads, lifestyle branding, and social media marketing.

content: A dramatic vertical concert poster photograph shot from the audience at stage level, showing a single male performer in full-body silhouette standing powerfully at center stage with legs apart, holding a microphone to his mouth in one hand. He wears a dark oversized t-shirt, very baggy cargo pants, a cap, and a chain necklace, with his face mostly hidden in shadow. Behind him is a massive packed indoor arena with thousands of fans, glowing phone lights, raised hands, and a curved stadium seating bowl. The lighting is intense magenta, purple, and pink with haze, backlight, lens bloom, and atmospheric smoke, creating a high-energy reggaeton or urban pop concert mood. Confetti pieces float through the air across the frame. In the foreground, exactly 5 visible audience smartphones are raised and recording the performance, framing the scene from the crowd perspective. At the top center, add large bold brush-script lettering in Spanish reading {argument name="headline text" default="La noche es nuestra."}, with “La noche” in white and “es nuestra.” in vivid hot pink, including a painted underline swoosh beneath the pink text. Place a small clean white {argument name="brand name" default="Pollo.ai"} logo in the top-right corner. High contrast, cinematic live-event photography, glossy social-media ad aesthetic, sharp crowd detail with a silhouetted artist, vibrant neon nightlife energy, optimized for a mobile promotional poster.

description: This prompt generates a high-energy vertical concert advertisement image with a silhouetted singer, massive crowd, neon purple lighting, and bold Spanish headline text for music, nightlife, or mobile app marketing.

content: A dramatic vertical high-fashion sports campaign photo of a {argument name="football player" default="young Black male forward"} in a white {argument name="team kit" default="Real Madrid home kit"} performing a knee-slide celebration on the grass near the sideline inside a packed football stadium at night. The player is centered in the lower half of the frame, leaning back with chest forward and both arms stretched wide, wearing a white jersey with dark trim and gold accents, matching white shorts with the number 7, long white socks, and light-colored football boots with red detailing. His face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur, while the body remains sharply lit and photorealistic. The stadium is massive and full, with thousands of cheering fans dressed mostly in white, 4 visible large supporter flags waving in the background, stewards in neon yellow jackets along the pitch edge, and bright floodlights flaring in the top left corner. Include pitch-side advertising boards with football branding and a dark blue board showing the word RESPECT, plus a curved stadium ribbon displaying repeated celebratory text. Add a huge elegant white serif headline across the upper center reading {argument name="headline text" default="Hala Madrid."}, and a small white {argument name="brand text" default="Pollo.ai"} logo in the top right corner. Shot from a low wide-angle perspective for a heroic, triumphant feel, with cinematic contrast, crisp jersey texture, realistic grass detail, shallow background softness, luxury editorial sportswear ad aesthetic, ultra-realistic photography.
title: Luxury Football Victory Campaign Poster
description: A cinematic vertical sports-fashion advertisement showing a footballer knee-sliding in celebration in a packed stadium, ideal for premium promo graphics and social media campaigns.

content: A stark black-and-white editorial anti-tech poster on an off-white background, designed like a modern brutalist magazine cover about digital addiction. The composition is vertical and highly typographic, with one central surreal image and multiple blocks of small text. At the top center, huge bold condensed sans-serif text reads DOOM on one line and SCROLLING below it, with the word SCROLLING stretched across the page and partially motion-blurred or smeared horizontally. In the upper left corner, a tiny text block reads “SCROLL. SWIPE. NOTHING CHANGES.” with a short horizontal line above it. In the upper right corner, small text reads “24 / 7 / 365” above “THE FEED NEVER ENDS” with a horizontal divider line below. On the left side under the title, add a definition paragraph in small editorial text: “the act of spending an excessive amount of time scrolling through negative or distressing content online, often leading to feelings of anxiety, helplessness, and fatigue.” Beneath that, include 2 short horizontal divider lines, then a large statistic reading “67%” followed by smaller text: “OF PEOPLE AGED 18–24 SAY THEY SCROLL MORE THAN THEY INTEND TO. — PEW RESEARCH, 2023”. Below that, another statement reads “MORE SCROLLING. LESS LIVING.” with a divider line beneath. The center of the poster features a glossy black smartphone standing vertically at the bottom center, seen front-on, with the bottom speaker holes and charging port visible. Emerging from the phone screen is a long impossible staircase receding upward into a narrow tunnel made of repeated translucent vertical panels, creating a claustrophobic corridor. Within the tunnel, a giant grayscale human eye appears in the upper half, partially obscured by haze, vertical slicing, and ghosted repetitions, as if trapped inside the feed. The central image should feel eerie, dreamlike, oppressive, and cinematic, with soft fog, high contrast, photocopy grain, subtle motion smear, and layered transparency. Along the right side of the central image, add a narrow vertical numbered index with exactly 24 visible entries: 001, 002, 003, 004, 005, 007, 008, 009, 010, 011, 012, 013, 014, 015, 017, 018, 019, 020, 021, 022, 024, 025, 026, and an ellipsis, plus a thin downward arrow underneath. In the right column, add a text block titled “DESIGNED TO KEEP YOU HOOKED.” followed by 4 short lines: “Infinite feeds. Unpredicted rewards. Endless comparison. It’s not a glitch— it’s the business model.” Below that place a simple eye/globe icon, then a black rectangular box containing the message: “AWARENESS IS THE FIRST STEP: PUT THE PHONE DOWN. LOOK UP. RECLAIM YOUR TIME.” On the lower left, place a massive cropped black word fragment reading END near the bottom edge, with another stacked statement beside it: “THE MORE YOU SCROLL, THE LESS YOU LIVE.” Add tiny vertical microtext near the left margin for editorial flavor. Across the bottom footer, place 4 icon/text groups: a globe icon, an eye icon, a small warning text block reading “WARNING: EXCESSIVE SCREEN TIME CAN IMPACT YOUR MENTAL HEALTH, SLEEP, AND PRODUCTIVITY.”, an expand-corners icon, a barcode, and a final statement on the far right reading “STAY PRESENT. LIVE IN REAL LIFE.” Use minimalist Swiss-grid alignment, generous negative space, sharp black typography, subtle distressed print texture, and a high-fashion poster aesthetic.
title: Doomscrolling Editorial Poster
description: A monochrome brutalist poster about social media addiction, ideal for awareness campaigns, magazine-style graphics, or conceptual editorial art.

content:
A bold editorial poster in a brutalist Swiss-modern infographic style on a light warm-gray background, portrait orientation, with a split composition: oversized typography dominating the left half and a blurred monochrome human face dominating the right half. The main headline is stacked in huge condensed sans-serif uppercase text reading {argument name="headline text" default="SHORT-FORM ATTENTION TAX"}, with “SHORT-FORM” in black and “ATTENTION TAX” in vivid red-orange. Along the far left margin place a small vertical year mark reading “-2024”. At the top left add tiny uppercase text “YOUR ATTENTION. THEIR ECONOMY.” and at the top right add tiny uppercase text “TIME IS LIMITED. ATTENTION ISN’T.” with small plus-sign registration marks near the corners. Beneath the headline on the left, add the subheading “A hidden cost extracted every time you scroll.”

Create 3 numbered information blocks stacked down the lower left side, each marked by a vertical red-orange bar and large black numerals: section 01 titled “WHAT IS IT?”, section 02 titled “WHY DOES IT EXIST?”, and section 03 titled “HOW IT AFFECTS BEHAVIOR”. Under section 01, include body text explaining that the Short-Form Attention Tax is the invisible price paid for consuming endless short-form content and that it is measured in seconds, minutes, and mental energy extracted by platforms designed to keep you scrolling. Under section 02, include body text explaining that platforms compete for attention because attention, data, and profit are linked, and that short-form content is optimized to be instantly rewarding, infinitely scrollable, and hard to stop. Under section 03, include exactly 6 bullet points in red-orange dash style: “Shortens attention span”, “Reduces deep focus”, “Increases impulsive behavior”, “Disrupts memory & learning”, “Drives comparison & anxiety”, and “Creates compulsive usage loops”, followed by a short concluding sentence about reshaping how you think, feel, and act.

In the center-left and lower-middle areas, add supporting editorial typography in mixed sizes: “Attention is the most valuable currency of the 21st century.” with the word “currency” in red-orange; a small stat block saying “THE AVERAGE PERSON SPENDS 90+ MINUTES DAILY ON SHORT-FORM VIDEO APPS.” with “90+ MINUTES” in red-orange; a giant stacked numeric statement reading “16 DAYS” in black with the surrounding text “THAT’S OVER” above and “A YEAR.” below; and a small closing line “TAX AVOIDANCE STARTS WITH AWARENESS.”

On the right half, show a close-up portrait of a human face in black and white, partially cropped, looking forward, with a serious neutral expression. Apply heavy horizontal motion blur, digital smear, scanline-like streaks, and glitch bars crossing the face, especially across the forehead, nose, and mouth. Overlay exactly 5 vertical social-media style interface icons near the center-right of the face: a white circle/profile dot, a red-orange heart, a white speech bubble, a white bookmark ribbon, and a white share arrow. Add a large translucent red-orange circle covering the lower-right part of the face. Include subtle HUD-like graphic elements: a faint circular reticle with a small red-orange triangular wedge near the upper right, a thin vertical measurement scale near the far right edge, a few white square markers, small black and white horizontal bars, and scattered tiny plus signs for layout texture.

At the bottom, place a barcode on the left with tiny coordinate-like text above it, then 3 footer callouts spaced across the width: “PROTECT YOUR ATTENTION. PROTECT YOUR LIFE.”, “BE MINDFUL. BE INTENTIONAL. BE FREE.”, and “RECLAIM FOCUS. RECLAIM TIME. RECLAIM YOU.” Use a restrained palette of black, off-white, and red-orange only. The overall look should feel like a high-end social critique poster, mixing typographic activism, data editorial design, and dystopian tech-noise portraiture, with crisp layout, strong negative space, and print-poster realism.
title: Short-Form Attention Tax Poster
description: A high-contrast editorial infographic poster about the hidden cognitive cost of short-form media, suitable for awareness campaigns, social commentary, or magazine-style design.

content: Create a dramatic vertical poster-style sports tribute for {argument name="athlete name" default="Lewis Hamilton"}, designed like a cinematic legacy montage with a dark, high-contrast, gold-and-black color grade, gritty smoke, sparks, stadium haze, and celebratory lighting. At the top, place a huge metallic distressed headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="LEWIS HAMILTON"}, with a bold gold subheadline beneath it reading “BEYOND SPEED. BEYOND LIMITS.” and a smaller white line below saying “A LEGEND IN MOTION.” The composition centers on a large, close-up hero portrait of the athlete in a modern black racing suit, shown from the chest up, facing slightly to the side with intense expression, detailed skin texture, braided hair, dramatic rim lighting, and visible sponsor-style logos across the suit. Build a collage around the central portrait using exactly 8 supporting elements: on the upper left, a childhood go-kart scene labeled “1995” with the caption “THE DREAM BEGINS”; below it, a single-seater junior formula car scene labeled “2003” with the caption “F1 IS CALLING”; below that, a victory celebration scene labeled “2008” with the caption “A STAR IS BORN” and a second line “FIRST WIN CANADIAN GP”; lower left, a racing portrait labeled “2013” with the caption “WORLD CHAMPION” and a second line “A NEW ERA”; center torso text block labeled “2014 – 2020” with the title “DOMINANCE” and three stat lines “7 WORLD TITLES”, “6 CONSTRUCTORS’ TITLES”, and “82 RACE WINS”; bottom center, a front-facing black Formula 1 car with number 44 emerging from shadows; upper right, a triumphant full-body figure raising a trophy overhead amid confetti; mid-right, a vertical achievements column titled “ACHIEVEMENTS” with exactly 5 laurel-wreathed stats reading “7× F1 WORLD CHAMPION”, “103 RACE WINS”, “104 POLE POSITIONS”, “197 PODIUM FINISHES”, and “7 BRITISH GP WINS”, followed by a final text callout “SIR” and the line “KNIGHTED FOR SERVICES TO MOTORSPORT”; lower right, a modern portrait of the athlete with hand over chest beside the caption “2021 & BEYOND” and the stacked text “STILL PUSHING. STILL INSPIRING. STILL WINNING.” Add 2 additional cars at the bottom edge: a red Formula 1 car on the lower left streaking diagonally with motion blur, and a smaller black Formula 1 car on the lower right. Place a centered quote near the bottom in white italic caps: {argument name="quote" default="I DON’T RACE TO BE SECOND. I RACE TO BE ONE OF A KIND."}, followed by a gold handwritten signature-style script reading {argument name="signature name" default="Lewis Hamilton"}. Finish with a footer slogan in spaced-out white capitals: “TALENT. DISCIPLINE. PASSION. PURPOSE.” and a final line beneath it: “LEWIS HAMILTON – MORE THAN A DRIVER. A MOVEMENT.” Use layered depth, sharp typography, premium magazine-poster layout, subtle British flag accents, realistic cars, photoreal faces, and an inspirational champion-documentary aesthetic.

content: A dreamy pastel anime movie-poster illustration set in a narrow outdoor alley completely covered in dense floral mosaic wall art, rendered with glittering sparkles, soft haze, and romantic shoujo color grading in lavender, pink, periwinkle, and cream. In the foreground, show a cute teenage girl from a rear three-quarter view, her face mostly hidden, with short silvery-lavender bob hair and a large mauve bow hair accessory decorated with tiny flowers. She wears an oversized translucent lavender hoodie with embroidered floral appliqués on the sleeves, a layered pastel skirt, and carries a shiny lilac backpack covered with charms, ribbons, plush pom-poms, pins, and star details. She is holding a plate with a blueberry pound cake loaf that has been sliced open, and the center is dramatically overflowing with glossy dark-purple blueberry filling that pours out in thick syrupy streams down the cake and plate. Scatter whole blueberries around the cake and lower foreground. Make the scene whimsical, delicate, and slightly comedic despite the beautiful presentation. Design the image as a Japanese film poster with many decorative text overlays and laurels. Across the top, include 3 small award lines with laurel wreaths. Add a huge hand-lettered Japanese title in layered pink, white, and purple lettering with glow and sticker-like outlines reading: 「冷凍したブルーベリー使ってパウンドケーキ焼いたら中身溢れて失敗した件。」 Below it, add a smaller subtitle line: 「〜甘くて、ちょっぴり切ない青春のレシピ〜」. On the right side, place 1 vertical white quote box with Japanese text: 「うまくいかない日だって、人生のスパイスになるんだ。」 In the lower left, add 1 pinned pink note card that says “Sweet but clumsy.” and 1 torn recipe memo sheet with handwritten Japanese checklist items. Add a small speech bubble near the cake that says “Oops!”. Include a circular stamp-style seal near the lower right that reads “Blueberry disaster”. At the bottom, add film-credit style text in white, including “A FILM BY YUMEIRO PASTEL”, and a large release line in pink and white: “{argument name="release date" default="2024.6.30(SUN)"} ROADSHOW”. Under that, add the Japanese tagline: 「失敗は、最高の思い出になる。だから、また挑戦しよう。」 Frame the whole poster with lace, stickers, scraps of paper, and scrapbook-style decorations. Make it ultra-detailed, glossy, sentimental, kawaii, cinematic, and intentionally over-the-top like a fake coming-of-age movie poster about a baking failure.
title: Pastel Anime Blueberry Cake Movie Poster
description: A whimsical Japanese-style anime poster showing a pastel girl carrying a disastrously overflowing blueberry pound cake, ideal for parody film-poster art and cute cinematic social media visuals.

content: A dreamy pastel-purple Japanese movie poster illustration in a glossy shoujo anime style, packed with blueberry dessert chaos and soft sparkles. The scene shows 1 seated teenage girl with a short silver-lavender bob haircut, side bangs, a small lavender bow hair clip, and alternative cute fashion, sitting on the floor in a messy kitchen or baking workspace. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered square censor block in muted lavender-gray. She wears an oversized translucent lavender jacket with black ribbon details on the sleeves, a light purple graphic top, layered silver necklaces, a purple plaid skirt, slouchy white leg warmers decorated with lavender heart patches and black bows, and chunky lavender platform sneakers with ribbon accents. She holds 1 blueberry near her mouth with one hand and 1 metal mixing bowl smeared with vivid purple blueberry batter in the other. In front of her is 1 large golden pound cake split open dramatically, overflowing with dark glossy blueberries and purple filling, spilling across 1 cooling rack and the tabletop. Counted blueberries are scattered throughout the composition as floating and resting props, creating a whimsical suspended effect. The environment is cluttered with baking tools and notes: 1 spiral notebook page in the upper right labeled in English with a handwritten recipe for blueberry pound cake, 1 whisk in the lower right, 1 small pinned photo print in the lower left showing 2 anime girls, and 1 handwritten note card in the lower right with Japanese writing and a small bunny doodle. Use a monochrome palette of lilac, violet, periwinkle, cream, and deep blueberry purple, with luminous highlights, soft haze, translucent overlays, and romantic glitter. Add large expressive Japanese calligraphy text dominating the left half of the poster, reading vertically and diagonally like a dramatic light-novel or film advertisement, plus a ribbon banner near the cake with the date text “2026年7月メロードショー”, vertical copy on the right side, small production-credit text across the bottom, and a final tagline line at the very bottom. Make the composition feel like a cute disaster: beautiful but failed baking, sweet melancholy, fashionable messiness, and cinematic promotional poster energy.
title: Pastel Blueberry Cake Anime Poster
description: A stylized Japanese anime film poster featuring a lavender-themed girl, an exploded blueberry pound cake, and dramatic handwritten typography, ideal for cinematic key art or promotional visuals.

content: A cinematic French dystopian science-fantasy book cover in vertical poster format, dark and epic, with a cold desaturated palette of charcoal blue, steel gray, ash white, and muted silver. In the foreground, show 1 solitary young traveler seen from behind, standing on a snow-dusted rocky cliff at lower left, small against the environment, wearing a weathered winter jacket, rugged pants, boots, and a large worn backpack, with messy light brown hair visible, posture still and contemplative as he looks out over a vast ruined city. In the middle distance, depict 1 immense circular or sprawling fortified city in a frozen valley, dense with countless dark gothic-industrial buildings and spires, surrounded by icy water channels and connected by several narrow bridges. Rising from the exact center of the city, place 1 colossal needle-like black tower that dominates the skyline, dramatically taller than everything else. Surround the city with jagged snow-covered mountain ranges on both sides and in the far distance. Above, create a stormy sky filled with heavy textured clouds, faint snowfall or drifting ice particles, and a pale backlit glow breaking through behind the central tower, giving a mythic apocalyptic atmosphere. Composition should emphasize scale, isolation, and awe, with the traveler occupying only a small portion of the image and the city and tower centered. Add distressed serif typography integrated as a cover design: at the very top in small uppercase French text, "DANS L’UNIVERS DE APRÈS L’EFFONDREMENT"; below it, a huge title in cracked weathered off-white serif capitals, "{argument name="title text" default="ELON"}", spanning nearly the full width; beneath the title place 1 small compass-star ornament centered with thin horizontal lines. At the bottom center, add the author name in refined serif capitals, "{argument name="author name" default="MARTINOLLI"}". Make the overall image look like premium dark fantasy / post-apocalyptic cover art, ultra-detailed, atmospheric perspective, realistic textures, dramatic lighting, moody, monumental, polished publishing design.
title: Epic French Dystopian Book Cover
description: This prompt generates a dark cinematic French-language novel cover featuring a lone figure overlooking a frozen city crowned by a gigantic central tower.

content: A vast cinematic sci-fi megacity floating above dense glowing clouds at sunset, viewed from a high aerial perspective. The scene shows an expansive futuristic skyline with dozens of ultra-tall elegant skyscrapers and needle-like towers rising from hovering platforms, connected by distant structures and suspended districts. In the center-right, a large floating urban hub features multiple illuminated glass domes and layered circular bases, surrounded by several monumental towers, including one especially tall central spire with a wide ring-like observation structure near the top. Warm golden sunlight pours in from the left horizon, creating a dramatic orange, peach, and lavender sky with thick clouds and atmospheric haze, while the lower half of the image is filled with soft pink and blue cloud banks reflecting the sunset. Several flying vehicles are visible: 1 large dark metallic spacecraft in the lower left foreground with bright blue engine trails, 1 circular landing-pad-like platform craft in the lower right foreground, 2 medium ships crossing the midground with blue light trails, and multiple tiny distant air vehicles scattered across the skyline. content: A dramatic vintage Chinese martial-arts movie poster in a luxurious dark-gold and amber palette, styled like a classic historical epic. Center the composition on a young imperial man seated in front, wearing an ornate black-and-gold dragon robe and a Qing dynasty red-tasseled official hat, posed with one hand near his mouth in a sly, playful, confident manner. Surround him with exactly 8 beautiful court women in layered silk hanfu and gauzy robes, arranged tightly around him in a glamorous harem-like group portrait, with 4 women in the upper row and 4 women in the lower row. Each woman has an elegant updo with elaborate gold hairpins, floral ornaments, dangling earrings, and soft warm makeup; their expressions are alluring, gentle, or curious. Render the women in champagne, blush, peach, rose, and pale jade fabrics with translucent sleeves, embroidered bodices, and richly textured jewelry. Behind the group, place a large aged wooden plaque with carved golden Chinese calligraphy reading “鹿鼎记”, with a smaller line above it reading “金庸武侠经典”. Add vertical cast-name text in Chinese placed beside different figures: on the far left “苏荃”, below left “陈圆圆”, upper middle-left “阿珂”, upper middle-right “建宁公主”, far right upper “沐剑屏”, right middle “方怡”, lower right-middle “双儿”, and far lower right “曾柔”. Also add a vertical poetic slogan along the upper left margin in Chinese: “小人物，大智慧，游走江湖庙堂，玩转天下，抱得美人归”. At the bottom, blend in a secondary cinematic scene: an ancient palace gate and courtyard with soldiers and banners forming a grand processional crowd, with one lone figure centered in the foreground walking toward the viewer. Finish with a narrow line of Chinese tagline text across the bottom edge: “一部颠覆传统的英雄传奇 一段令人捧腹的江湖神话”. The whole image should feel opulent, theatrical, romantic, and slightly mischievous, with smoky sepia shadows, glowing rim light, rich texture, symmetrical poster composition, and polished high-end period-drama key art.

content:
Create a Japanese bishoujo game promotional poster in the style of a premium visual novel box cover and store page composite. The image is split into three vertical areas. The left two-thirds is a dramatic illustrated key visual at sunset: a dreamy spring sky filled with pink and violet clouds, glowing rim light, drifting petals, and a reflective wet road or riverside path. Show 4 anime girls in school uniforms, all with soft emotional expressions and highly detailed hair moving in the wind. The largest girl is centered upper-left, shown from the chest up in profile or three-quarter view, with long dark hair and a small flower hair ornament, looking wistful. A second girl stands at lower-left with very light silver hair and a ribbon accessory, turned slightly away. A third girl is at lower center, smaller, with mauve or reddish-brown hair and a bowed, melancholy pose. A fourth girl is at mid-right, blonde or light brown-haired, facing upward with a hopeful expression. At the very bottom center of the key art, show 2 tiny full-body silhouettes of a boy and girl holding hands in the glowing distance, reflected in the wet ground. Add a white feather near the upper-left and scattered cherry blossom petals throughout. Overlay elegant Japanese title typography in large white brush-like serif lettering near the bottom-left to center: 「{argument name="title text" default="さよならの向こう側で"}」, with a smaller subtitle line beneath it. Along the far left edge, place 3 vertical lines of small Japanese catchphrase text in white. In the bottom-left corner, add 2 stacked black product labels with white text like a PC game package badge, one reading Windows compatible and one reading all ages.

The center is a narrow dark indigo vertical band separating the art from the info panel. On this band, place the game title again vertically in large white Japanese characters, with a smaller vertical tagline beneath it. Keep this band clean and elegant, like the spine of a game box.

The right third is a soft cream-colored information panel with a gentle paper texture. At top-left of this panel, add a bold Japanese heading in brackets: 「【あらすじ】」 followed by several lines of Japanese synopsis text laid out like a visual novel description page. Below that, add a dotted or dashed divider line. Then add a second bracketed heading: 「【特徴】」 with 4 feature bullets, each preceded by a simple icon. The 4 features are: branching choices, full voice support, tearjerking emotional story, and many beautiful CGs. Use small dark blue-gray icons and text. Add another divider line, then a third bracketed heading: 「【プレイヤーへ】」 followed by 2 short lines of Japanese message text.

On the far right side of the cream panel, stack 4 rounded-rectangle screenshot thumbnails vertically, each with thin white borders. Thumbnail 1: the dark-haired heroine by a seaside railing at sunset. Thumbnail 2: a pale-haired heroine with windblown hair against a bright blue ocean. Thumbnail 3: a girl indoors by a sunlit classroom or café window, warm and contemplative. Thumbnail 4: a girl surrounded by cherry blossoms in soft pink light. At the bottom of the cream panel, place a wide rounded lavender feature bar containing 4 large icons with short Japanese labels beneath or beside them: an open book, a microphone, an image/photo symbol, and a branching path/share-like icon. The overall mood should be nostalgic, romantic, cinematic, and emotionally overwhelming, like a high-budget Japanese gal game advertisement from the 2000s to 2010s. Use polished anime illustration, luminous backlighting, rich pastel sunset colors, glossy reflections, detailed typography, and authentic visual novel promo design.

The plane is branded {argument name="brand name" default="peach"} in large lowercase letters on the fuselage and tail. Bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds, airport terminal buildings in the distance, and scattered confetti-like geometric shapes in pink and yellow create an energetic promotional mood. The character has long split-color hair, black on one side and vivid pink on the other, with cat-ear-like hair accessories or headphones, side clips, and a single ahoge strand. Her face is partially obscured by a centered rectangular blur block. She wears large metallic headphones, a silver choker, a black mesh crop top layered over a black bralette, a short black-and-white asymmetrical skirt with two front buckles, a glossy oversized pink bomber jacket slipping off the shoulders, and a teal thigh strap. She poses with one hand reaching toward the viewer and the other holding a pink boarding pass or ticket card branded with the airline name. Add a second floating ticket on the right side reading “Everywhere!” in English. Use a bold commercial layout with exactly 8 distinct text areas: 1 large top-left logo reading {argument name="brand name" default="peach"}, 1 handwritten Japanese slogan across the upper left, 1 central promotional headline block in Japanese reading {argument name="main headline" default="学生割引"}, 1 blue circular badge reading {argument name="badge text" default="U25限定!"}, 1 large discount callout reading {argument name="discount text" default="20%OFF!"}, 3 rounded white icon boxes along the bottom each with small pink travel-related icons and Japanese captions, and 1 cursive English tagline at bottom left reading {argument name="tagline" default="Fly Peach. Love Life."}. Include a small search-bar style UI element at the bottom right, extra diagonal pink graphic borders at the top and bottom, and polished ad-design typography. High-saturation pink palette, youthful urban fashion, dynamic perspective, crisp cel-shaded rendering with soft airbrushed lighting, premium anime promotional poster aesthetic.

content: Automatically generate a collector's edition epic narrative poster based on {argument name="theme" default="Dream of the Red Chamber"}. Inside the silhouette, let the complete world-building, iconic scenes, character relationships, symbolic icons, key architecture, creatures, props, and atmosphere most relevant to the theme grow naturally. Quiet, grand, restrained, and infused with a strong sense of fatalism typical of Eastern cinematic storytelling. All elements must be strongly bound to the theme for instant recognition, avoiding clutter, hard collages, templated backgrounds, or cheap fantasy assets.

content:
Genre: {argument name="genre" default="Hamburger"}
Brand Name: {argument name="brand name" default="Kashiko"}

Based on this image, generate a photorealistic poster image with a concept that completely deviates from common sense and does not exist anywhere else in the world.

Don't just make it an extension; leap with the idea to a level where it 'makes sense but the interpretation is insane.'

[Absolute Conditions]
- Photorealistic expression (reproduce textures, atmosphere, and even light particles like a real-life photo)
- All language must be in Japanese

[Exaggerated/Boosted Elements]
■ Font Design
- The characters themselves are objectified or phenomenological
- The font physically interacts with the theme

■ Text Placement
- Ignore normal layouts and place text within the space itself
- Layouts with abnormally strong gaze direction

■ Composition
- Unrealistic perspective, extreme wide angles, distortion, scale destruction
- Clear foreground, middle ground, and background layers with abnormally high information density
- A central element that catches the eye instantly + countless subtle oddities in the details

■ Lighting
- Movie-level cinematic lighting
- Intense backlighting, rim lights, neon, particle light, volume light
- Light itself has meaning (functioning as a guide or emphasis)

■ Catchphrase
- Short, intense Japanese text that makes sense but is hard to fully grasp
- Copy that is slightly off-situation but fits strangely well

[Additional Effects]
- A sense of discomfort where reality and unreality coexist simultaneously
- Parts of the image ignore the laws of physics
- Quality that functions as a professional-level advertisement

Ultimately, make it a poster that is 'understandable yet beyond comprehension' and warrants a second look. If the reference image is a character, apply actions such as wearing, using, or trying to eat the brand. Do not use any real brand logos, company names, or personal names; make it completely original. Verify that no real-world elements are included in the final finish. Suppress noise or balance disruptions caused by excessive detail, maintaining overall visual unity and a sophisticated impression.
title: Hyper-realistic Surreal Poster Design Prompt
description: A detailed prompt for creating a cinematic, photorealistic poster that blends reality with surreal concepts, featuring deep customization for branding and visual elements.

content: A dramatic Japanese boxing match poster in a polished anime illustration style, vertical composition, split straight down the center into warm gold on the left and electric blue on the right. At the very top, huge metallic gold embossed lettering reads {argument name="headline text" default="JUNGLE PREMIUM Vol.7"}, with a bright glow and beveled 3D effect. Directly beneath it, centered white Japanese text reads "世界4団体フェザー級タイトルマッチ". Show 2 male featherweight boxers facing each other in fighting stance inside a boxing ring, both full body, highly muscular, lean, and sharply defined with glossy skin highlights. The left boxer is a blond anime-style young man with short tousled hair, wearing gold boxing gloves, black-and-gold trunks with a white-red accent on one leg, black boxing boots with gold laces, and a thick championship-style waistband patch reading "SEIJI". He stands on the gold side with explosive golden sparks and streaks surrounding him. The right boxer is a black-haired anime-style young man with short spiky hair, wearing bright blue boxing gloves, dark navy-blue trunks, blue boxing boots, white socks, and a waistband patch reading "JUNICHI". He stands on the blue side with swirling blue energy, light trails, and glowing particles. Place a circular championship belt emblem in the center background between them, with ring ropes visible behind, and the words "WORLD CHAMPION" legible on the belt medallion. Add 2 large faded portrait overlays in the background, one behind each boxer: the left background portrait tinted gold and the right background portrait tinted blue. Along the far left side, place bold vertical Japanese calligraphy reading "黄金の閃光" in glowing white-gold. Along the far right side, place bold vertical Japanese calligraphy reading "蒼き鉄拳" in glowing white-blue. At the bottom, feature 2 very large Japanese name blocks: left in gold reading "松浦聖司", right in icy blue-white reading "藤原潤一", with a blazing gold "VS" between them. Beneath that, centered large white date text reads {argument name="event date" default="7月19日(日)"}. At the very bottom, centered gold serif text reads {argument name="venue name" default="SUN BIRTH STADIUM"}. Use extreme contrast, cinematic arena lighting, energetic particle effects, premium sports-event poster design, glossy typography, and a heroic high-stakes championship atmosphere.

content: A side-by-side comparison image presented as two stacked documentary-style photographs of the same cramped old Chinese apartment corridor, framed by a black filmstrip border with white sprocket holes on both left and right edges. The top half is labeled {argument name="top label" default="GPT-image-2"} in large bold white sans-serif text centered near the top, and the bottom half is labeled {argument name="bottom label" default="Nano Banana 2"} in the same style. Create a gritty, nostalgic, cinematic scene in a long, narrow shared hallway of a worn residential building from the late 20th century, with peeling paint, stained walls, faded propaganda posters and old newspapers on the walls, dark wooden doorways, hanging towels and laundry, a damp concrete floor, and daylight coming from a window at the far end. In the upper scene, show exactly 4 people: 1 adult standing at the left cooking over a small stove on a wooden table with visible steam, 1 adult man sitting deeper in the corridor beside an electric fan, 1 child crouching in the center playing near a basin on the wet floor, and 1 adult woman seated at a small table on the right writing or reading; include enamel mugs, metal pots, stools, buckets, thermos containers, and cluttered household items. In the lower scene, show exactly 4 people again: 1 adult woman at the left cooking at a stove with smoke rising, 1 adult man seated on the right in a bamboo chair leaning over a tabletop fan, 1 child crouching in front writing on paper on a low stool, and 1 distant adult figure near the back window; add more visible corridor clutter including a bicycle front wheel at lower left, wash basins, baskets, thermoses, shelves, shoes, and hanging clothes. Keep the camera straight-on and centered to emphasize the corridor depth, with realistic human proportions, candid slice-of-life behavior, muted aged colors, soft natural light, high detail, photojournalistic realism, and a subtle difference in arrangement between the top and bottom scenes while preserving the same overall environment and mood.

content: A vintage late-1970s Japanese crime film poster in the style of a Nikkatsu theatrical one-sheet, vertically composed on aged beige paper with visible grain, faint stains, and slightly faded ink. The main image is a large, moody half-body portrait of {argument name="lead actor name" default="原田芳雄"} occupying the upper right and center, turned partly away from camera, with thick curly dark hair, a serious expression, and a wrinkled light gray suit jacket over an open-collar white shirt; his face is mostly in shadow. Behind him is a bleak industrial waterfront with cranes, low factory structures, and heavy gray smoke rising into a washed-out sky. Across the lower middle, place a huge hand-brushed red Japanese title reading {argument name="title text" default="影の街"}, painted diagonally and aggressively, partially overlapping the portrait and the lower scene. In the lower half, add a second scene: a rainy urban street at dusk or night with wet reflective pavement, a dark police car at left with a glowing red roof light, and 6 men in suits and trench coats walking forward, with 1 central detective figure in a beige trench coat and loosened tie leading the group. On the far right, include a vertical strip of 5 stacked inset cast portraits framed in thin borders, each a dark cinematic still with different characters. Add vertical Japanese typography: on the upper right, the actor credit “原田芳雄 主演”; on the upper left, a 2-line tagline column reading “その男、刑事。 正義より、真実を追う。”; and near the lower right of the main image, another vertical blurb reading “誰が敵で、誰が味方か。闇に消えた事件の中で、ただひとつの真実を掴むまで—”. At the bottom, include dense small Japanese credits spanning the width, plus a large release date on the lower right reading {argument name="release date" default="11.23"} with “日活ロードショー” beneath it and a small studio mark. Use muted charcoal, sepia, smoky blue-gray, and off-white tones, with the red title as the only vivid color. The overall feeling is hard-boiled, melancholic, gritty, and cinematic, like a lost 1970s Japanese detective movie poster.
