Place him inside a dramatic high-tech stadium or arena at night with bright floodlights glowing from the upper left, dark steel architecture overhead, and a cool blue sci-fi atmosphere. Add floating particles and light debris in the air for energy and motion. Surround the subject with futuristic AI interface graphics: 1 glowing wireframe cube icon on the left side, 1 luminous digital brain or neural-network globe on the right side, and multiple transparent holographic dashboard screens with charts and data panels behind him. Use a deep blue, black, and white color palette with sharp contrast, glossy highlights, subtle lens glow, and premium blockbuster poster lighting. Make the composition sleek, aspirational, and tech-forward, like a sports ad merged with artificial intelligence branding. At the bottom, add the title text {argument name="main title" default="THE FUTURE"} in very large metallic white uppercase letters, with the word "THE" smaller above the main word, and add the tagline {argument name="tagline" default="Built with Intelligence"} below in smaller spaced-out sans-serif text. Include faint hexagonal HUD linework near the lower corners and a glowing horizontal light streak cutting through the title area. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, poster design, polished commercial key art, 9:16 aspect ratio.
title: Futuristic AI Sports Poster
description: This prompt generates a sleek vertical cinematic poster of a tech leader presented like a football superstar, ideal for social posts, promotional artwork, or AI-themed campaign visuals.

content: A high-impact anime promotional interview poster designed as a glossy two-page magazine spread for a futuristic live music event. The scene shows a packed nighttime concert arena filled with a crowd holding glowing light sticks in neon yellow, blue, and purple, with a huge illuminated stage in the background, laser beams, bokeh lights, haze, and a giant triangular play-icon screen reading "AI SUPERLIVE SUMMER 2026". In the center foreground are 2 anime-style female presenters seen from a dramatic side and back angle, both looking toward the stage. The left character is {argument name="left character name" default="ソラ"}, wearing a dark oversized hooded jacket with black and acid-lime accents, large lime-green headphones marked "06", and raising a bright yellow glow stick overhead; her face is partially obscured by a rectangular privacy block. The right character is {argument name="right character name" default="ナギ"}, with a short silver-white bob haircut and fair skin, wearing a pale oversized hooded coat, softly lit by stage lights, holding a white-blue glowing baton near her chest, with an emotional profile expression as she watches the show. Use cinematic rim lighting, richly saturated purple-blue concert colors, reflective fabric highlights, and detailed anime rendering with a polished editorial-advertising finish. Compose the layout like a Japanese special interview feature with dense text overlays, translucent dark panels, thin neon-yellow borders, and bold sans-serif typography. Include 8 distinct text blocks: 1 small header tag at top left reading "/ SPECIAL INTERVIEW /"; 1 large Japanese headline at upper left reading "この夏、AIと音楽の未来がステージで輝く！"; 1 event logo block at upper right reading "AI SUPERLIVE SUMMER 2026" and "2026.7.18 SAT @ FUTURE ARENA ODAIBA"; 3 question-and-answer panels stacked on the left with yellow-framed headers beginning with "Q."; 3 question-and-answer panels stacked on the right with yellow-framed headers beginning with "Q."; plus 2 character intro name boxes near the figures labeled "ソラ" and "ナギ". Add a bold closing Japanese tagline across the bottom left and center reading "AIと音楽が響き合う、新しい夏がはじまる。 一緒に、未来を体験しよう！". At the bottom right, include a footer block repeating the event name and date, plus a visible QR code and a small caption indicating the official website. The overall style should feel like a premium Japanese event flyer, interview article, and key visual combined, energetic, futuristic, emotional, and festival-like.
title: Anime Concert Interview Magazine Spread
description: A cinematic anime-style promotional spread for a futuristic live music event, ideal for concert posters, interview features, and event marketing visuals.

The composition shows 2 women in a dramatic action scene across the center: on the left, a woman with long wavy red hair in a white martial arts gi performs a very high side kick; on the right, a curvy woman in a black cowboy hat and a black lace bodysuit recoils and raises her arms defensively as the kick strikes her face. Use heavy black shadows, sharp angular shapes, screenprint-like ink coverage, and a graphic mid-century pulp poster aesthetic. Behind them, place a large diagonal red geometric banner spanning from upper left to lower right, plus 2 black speed lines on the left and 3 white speed lines on the right to emphasize motion. In the upper right corner, include a circular emblem with a stylized black-and-white screaming monkey or ape face inside a red disk. At the bottom, add oversized condensed block typography in an aggressive poster layout: the first line reads {argument name="headline text" default="SCOTTISH RECIPE:"} in red and black, and the second line reads {argument name="main title" default="MINCE AND TATTIES"} in very large red, white, and black letters over a black diagonal banner. content: Japanese realistic romance movie poster style, inspired by 'We Made a Beautiful Bouquet', a pair of young Japanese couple in their twenties standing in a daily urban scene (street or intersection), maintaining a subtle and realistic distance from each other, no physical contact, like a moment of gradual estrangement in a relationship. The mood is quiet and restrained, with unuttered emotions and a sense of time passing. The composition is the main visual of a movie, characters located at the bottom or to one side, retaining a large area of white space to emphasize space and atmosphere. Light is natural (overcast or dusk), low-saturation gray-blue, beige, and warm gray tones, realistic photography texture. The image has fine film grain and a slight sense of daily life, not intentionally aesthetic, not over-decorated, like a frame from a real movie. A small amount of natural floral materials can be added at the edges or foreground as a metaphor (restrained, not excessive, not decorative). Add the title '花束みたいな恋をした' in the white space area, thin Mincho font, simple and sparse layout; add 'We Made a Beautiful Bouquet' in a smaller font size below. Overall requirements: Real Japanese movie poster texture, artistic, restrained, everyday life, emphasizing relationships over romantic symbols, avoiding sugary romance, avoiding flower piles, avoiding internet celebrity aesthetics, avoiding crowded compositions, avoiding the 'exquisite but hollow' AI feel. Negative prompt: AI feel, over-aesthetic, sea of flowers, romantic filters, excessive lighting effects, high saturation, neon lights, intimate couple embrace, posed feel, photobooth composition, internet celebrity style, illustration feel, 3D rendering, cluttered elements. Japanese minimalist artistic movie poster style, inspired by 'Love Letter', winter snow scene, a close-up of a young woman's face, face close to or semi-buried in the snow, tiny snowflakes falling naturally. The composition is a restrained close-up side profile or slightly tilted face, with the person occupying a large proportion of the screen but not overly sharp, edges slightly softened or slightly out of focus. Expression is calmness after sadness, with tears or tear marks in the eyes, emotions introverted and restrained, like having just cried and slowly returning to silence, eyes not looking at the camera, with a sense of memory and void. Light is winter natural scattered light or overcast soft light, cool white, light gray, pale blue tones, low saturation, low contrast, no strong shadows, no dramatic lighting effects. The snow and air form a clean background. The image texture is between real photography and film, with fine grain, slight mist, slightly white or slightly overexposed, like an old photo faded by time or a movie still. Skin not overly detailed, no skin smoothing, no sharpening, no retouching. Asymmetric composition, face can be partially cropped, minimalist background, retaining appropriate white space. Add the minimalist title 'Love Letter' or 'ラヴレター' in the white space area, thin Mincho or thin serif font, wide character spacing, sparse layout, color light gray; add 'Love Letter' in a tiny font size below. Overall requirements: Real Japanese artistic movie poster texture, quiet, subtle, restrained, like a memory covered by snow, avoiding photo studio feel, avoiding internet celebrity aesthetics, avoiding refined filters, avoiding lighting effects, avoiding high contrast and high saturation, avoiding sharp digital feel, avoiding theatrical emotions, avoiding 'pretty but hollow'. Negative prompt: AI feel, skin smoothing, sharpening, HDR, high contrast, high saturation, dreamy light effects, lens flare, filter feel, photo studio style, internet celebrity face, posing, looking directly at the camera, exaggerated emotions, 3D rendering, illustration style, complex background.
title: Japanese Realist Romance Movie Poster
description: A highly detailed prompt for a Japanese movie poster aesthetic, focusing on composition, natural lighting, and emotional distance inspired by classic romance films.

content:
Please create a high-aesthetic, high-completion "Brand Packaging System Display Image" for the brand {argument name="brand name" default="Brand Name"} in the category {argument name="category" default="Product Category"}. This is not a common e-commerce white background shot, nor a single product photo, but a brand proposal-style display showing a 'packaging family' with visual identity system logic and commercial photography texture. The image should reflect the 'unified implementation of a single brand across multiple packaging carriers,' presenting a complete packaging system for a mature consumer brand.

[Aspect Ratio Requirements] The overall composition must be a fixed 4:5 vertical poster. Horizontal compositions or scattered arrangements are prohibited. The layout should follow poster reading logic: breathing space at the top, the main visual focus of the packaging system in the center, and auxiliary packaging, labels, and products at the bottom. The weight should be concentrated and suitable for immediate release as a brand display poster.

[Core Requirements] Automatically match the most reasonable packaging combination based on the [Category] and build a unified visual system around the [Brand Name]. Choose a small but representative number of packaging forms to form a refined system. Prioritize hierarchy, brand unity, and display beauty over quantity. You can include: shopping bags, gift boxes, shipping boxes, long boxes, single item boxes, pouches, sleeves, sample bags, bottles, jars, tubes, spray bottles, pump bottles, labels, stickers, tags, cards, and the actual product itself.

[Category Adaptation] Adapt packaging forms to the [Category]: e.g., paper bags and food containers for Bakery; cups and sleeves for Coffee/Tea; jars and tubes for Beauty/Skincare; candles and cards for Fragrance/Lifestyle; drawer boxes and tags for Fashion/Collectibles. The result must feel category-appropriate and systematic.

[Quantity Control] Control the number of items; do not overcrowd. The scene should be "less is more." Suggest: 1-2 large items, 2-3 medium items, 2-4 small items/labels, and 1-3 actual products. Total visible elements should be between 6-10. Ensure enough white space and clear hierarchy.

[Visual System] All packaging must belong to the same brand system, using the [Brand Name] as the core element. Maintain consistent logo placement, font style, graphics, illustration/pattern systems, and material texture. The style can be minimalist, organic, modern, luxury, or youthful, but must be mature and high-quality.

[Color Mechanism] Avoid fixed combinations. Generate different schemes like Cream White/Caramel Brown, Mist Blue/Warm White, Olive Green/Linen Beige, Chocolate Brown/Ivory, etc. Avoid neon or cheap high-saturation colors. Maintain a sense of high-end restraint.

[Composition] Use a commercial studio setting with a 3/4 top-down or slight perspective view. Arrange in layers: large items in the background, core packaging in the mid-ground, and small items/products in the foreground. At least one product should interact with its packaging (e.g., half-out of a box). Create a balanced triangular or staggered composition.

[Visual Style] High-end commercial photography feel. Clean studio background (white, warm white, light grey). Emphasize material textures (paper folds, box structures, bottle silhouettes, print quality, embossing, matte/cotton/kraft textures). Modern and clean visual language.

[Lighting] Commercial grade lighting. Soft studio light or slight directional natural side light. Use clear but restrained shadows for depth. The light should be transparent and bright, never dark or messy.

[Final Effect] The final image should look like a mature brand's packaging proposal poster or visual landing page, emphasizing vertical poster feel, brand unity, systematic completeness, and commercial photography quality.
title: Professional Brand Packaging System
description: A comprehensive, high-aesthetic prompt for creating a complete brand packaging system display with commercial photography quality.

content: Create a clean, premium Japanese corporate poster for a {argument name="company name" default="Arks"} video production company, in a minimalist editorial layout on an off-white background with lots of negative space. Portrait orientation, A4-like poster proportions. At the very top left, place an oversized bold black sans-serif logotype reading {argument name="company name" default="Arks"}, spanning nearly the full width of the page. In the upper right, add a small stacked brand mark in thin uppercase letters: "VIDEO" on one line, "PRODUCTION" on the next, "COMPANY" on the third, with a small burnt-orange geometric accent nearby. Below the logo, add a vertical burnt-orange bar on the left and a large elegant Japanese headline in black Mincho-style serif: {argument name="headline text" default="4つの領域で、映像を磨く。"}. Directly underneath, add a smaller service line in Japanese with slash separators: "SNS運用 / ショートドラマ / MV制作 / AI映像". The main body is a 2 by 2 grid of exactly 4 service panels with thin light-gray divider lines. Each panel has a large black editorial number and a Japanese label. Panel 1 label: "SNS運用" with the number "01"; image shows a close-up hand holding a smartphone displaying social media analytics, on a desk with charts, a calendar sheet, a pen, and a coffee mug, in warm natural office lighting; caption below in Japanese: "企画・分析・運用を一つの流れで。" Panel 2 label: "ショートドラマ" with the number "02"; image shows exactly 2 Japanese high-school-age students in white shirts standing outdoors on a rooftop or balcony, one female and one male, side-profile composition, muted overcast daylight, cinematic shallow depth of field; caption below: "共感が残る、短編の物語設計。" Panel 3 label: "MV制作" with the number "03"; image shows a moody musician playing electric guitar in a dim studio, backlit by soft haze, with a camera monitor in the foreground showing the same performer; caption below: "アーティストの世界観を、映像で可視化。" Panel 4 label: "AI映像" with the number "04"; image shows a dark professional AI video-generation or image-editing software interface on a monitor, with a cinematic scene of a lone figure standing on rocks under dramatic clouds, plus thumbnail timeline images and side control panels; caption below: "技術を表現へ変える、次世代の映像制作。" At the bottom left, place a small three-line English slogan in uppercase: {argument name="tagline text" default="CREATE.\nCONNECT.\nLEAVE A MARK."} with a small burnt-orange line accent above it. At the bottom right, place the website {argument name="website" default="arks-vp.com"} in small serif text with a short black horizontal line beside it. Use a refined mix of bold modern sans-serif for the large logo and numbers, and elegant Japanese serif for headlines and labels. Color palette: black, charcoal, warm off-white, light gray rules, and restrained burnt-orange accents. The overall feel should be realistic, polished, contemporary, Japanese editorial advertising design, with accurate Japanese typography and natural image tones.

content: Create a hyper-realistic sports advertising poster shot from an extreme wide-angle, low courtside perspective on a bright sunny day at an outdoor tennis court. In the extreme foreground, a male tennis player lunges dramatically toward the camera while thrusting a large matte cobalt-blue insulated water bottle toward the viewer, making the bottle the dominant object in the frame. The bottle is covered with visible condensation droplets and has a brushed metallic gold cap, with the white logo text {argument name="brand name" default="Aqua"} printed near the bottom. The athlete wears a clean white athletic t-shirt, bright blue tennis shorts, white wristbands, white socks, and white tennis shoes. His other arm stretches back holding a black tennis racket, with 1 bright yellow-green tennis ball visible near the racket on the right side of the image. The pose should feel dynamic and athletic, with one leg bent deeply and the other extended in a wide lunge across the blue hard court. Use strong midday sunlight, crisp shadows, vivid saturated blues, and a clear cloudless sky, with green trees and a dark fence line in the distant background. Compose it like a premium hydration brand campaign, with sharp focus on the bottle and athlete, dramatic foreshortening, commercial polish, and energetic motion. Add clean white ad typography integrated onto the court surface in the lower half: a smaller line reading {argument name="headline intro" default="Play Hard"}, a very large bold line reading {argument name="headline main" default="Hydrate Smart"}, and a smaller subheading reading {argument name="tagline" default="Hydration that keeps up with every move."}. Place the {argument name="brand name" default="Aqua"} logo again in white at the top right, and a small website URL in white at the bottom right reading {argument name="website" default="www.aqua.com"}.
title: Tennis Hydration Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a bold, photorealistic outdoor tennis advertisement featuring a branded water bottle in dramatic forced perspective for sports marketing and beverage campaigns.

content: A monumental mythological fantasy painting of Lord Shiva performing the Tandava in the center of a fiery sacred arena, full-body, dynamic dancing pose with one leg raised and the other foot pressing down on a fallen figure beneath him. Shiva has ash-blue skin, a powerfully muscular physique, long wild flowing dark hair exploding outward in all directions, a high matted topknot, and a white crescent moon tucked into the hair. His expression is intense and divine. A cobra is coiled around his neck, and he wears multiple rudraksha bead necklaces, bracelets, and armlets, large circular earrings, and sacred ornaments. His clothing is a tiger-skin loincloth with dramatic red-orange cloth sashes whipping through the air. One raised hand holds a small damaru drum, one front hand is lifted in a blessing gesture with the Om symbol visible on the palm, and another hand conjures a bright flame above the open palm. Behind his head is a large glowing circular halo inscribed repeatedly with Sanskrit mantra text, creating a radiant mandala effect. The setting is an apocalyptic Himalayan temple landscape with dark storm clouds, smoke, embers, rocky mountains, waterfalls, and ancient stone shrines and temple towers on both the left and right sides. A trident wrapped with red cloth stands upright on the left side of the scene. Around Shiva is a circle of exactly 10 worshippers and ascetics, split across both sides, shown chanting, kneeling, raising arms, carrying torches, and playing drums in devotion. Beneath Shiva is exactly 1 fallen dark-skinned male figure lying on the stone ground. The ground is cracked and molten, with a blazing ring of lava and fire encircling the dance platform. Use dramatic cinematic lighting, glowing orange firelight against deep charcoal shadows, highly detailed anatomy, intricate jewelry and textures, swirling hair and fabric motion, devotional epic fantasy realism, painterly brushwork, symmetrical central composition, ultra-detailed, high contrast, vertical poster format.
title: Epic Shiva Tandava Fire Dance
description: A dramatic devotional fantasy artwork of Shiva dancing in a fiery sacred arena, ideal for mythological poster art, album covers, or spiritual concept illustration.

[Hairstyle] Randomly select one for each month: ponytail, bun, down, half_up, messy, wet, short, bob, braid, twin.
[Clothing] Leave to AI according to the season.
[Noise] Randomly select one for each month: low, mid, high, film.
[Blur/Focus] Randomly select one for each month: sharp, slight, motion, soft.
[Pose] Randomly select one for each month: natural_stand, sitting, walking, phone, wall_lean, crouch, look_back.
[Holding] Randomly select one for each month: none, smartphone, bottle, coffee, umbrella, bag, towel, script.
[Time of day] Randomly select one for each month: early_morning, morning, noon, afternoon, evening, night, late_night.

content: A poetic, cinematic macro illustration of the cover of {argument name="book title" default="Wind, Sand and Stars"} by {argument name="author name" default="Antoine de Saint-Exupéry"}, rendered as a surreal desert world emerging directly from the textured paper page. A large human hand holds a glossy black and gold fountain pen near the top right, the engraved gold nib touching the paper and releasing a dark stream of ink that becomes a winding path across a miniature Sahara landscape. The composition is vertical, warmly lit in amber and sepia tones, with dramatic side lighting, deep shadows, and ultra-detailed paper grain, skin texture, dust, and metallic reflections. On the upper left, the printed title text appears in elegant serif typography, with the author name below it and a short italic quote in smaller script beneath. The page transforms into a detailed map-like desert tableau with exactly 16 tiny human figures scattered across the scene: 1 lone standing figure balanced beside the pen nib, 3 figures near a small campfire, 2 central robed men in conversation, 3 figures gathered beside the biplane, 1 solitary figure walking near the lower middle, 2 riders on camels at the lower left, 3 standing figures near the truck at the lower right, and 1 tiny seated figure near the wreckage at the lower left. Include exactly 1 vintage biplane parked on the right with visible markings, exactly 1 old expedition truck at the bottom right, exactly 1 windsock near the center-right, exactly 1 desert oasis town with palm trees on the right, exactly 1 ruined sandcastle-like mound on the left, exactly 1 dark tent encampment on the left-center, exactly 1 wrecked engine or fuselage fragment in the lower left corner, and exactly 1 compass rose printed at the bottom left. The ink trail should branch through dunes and cracked earth like a route on an old map, connecting landmarks labeled with place names including {argument name="map label one" default="Tamanrasset"}, {argument name="map label two" default="Agadir"}, and {argument name="map label three" default="Dakar"}. Blend antique cartography, literary symbolism, and miniature diorama realism, evoking exploration, memory, loneliness, and the romance of early aviation.
title: Surreal Wind, Sand and Stars Book World
description: A richly detailed literary surrealist illustration of a book page turning into a miniature desert expedition map, ideal for editorial art, book-poster concepts, and classic adventure covers.

content: Create a clean, symmetrical Chinese feng shui infographic poster in a traditional almanac style on a warm light beige background. The main title at the top is large dark red Chinese calligraphy text reading {argument name="headline text" default="2026年九宫飞星图"}, with a smaller subtitle beneath in black reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="（丙午年）"}. Add a decorative compass rose in the upper left corner labeled with the four cardinal directions in Chinese: 南 at top, 北 at bottom, 东 at left, 西 at right. Center the composition around a 3x3 grid of 9 bordered square panels with thin ornamental Chinese-style corners, evenly spaced and perfectly aligned. Each square contains a large colored number, a Chinese star name, one line beginning with 吉星 or 凶星, and an illustrative symbolic object. Top row has 3 panels: top-left labeled 东南 with a purple-framed panel for number 9 and text 九紫右弼星, plus 吉星: 喜庆、姻缘、贵人, illustrated with purple balloons, a gift box, and a small firework burst; top-center labeled 正南 with an orange-framed panel for number 5 and text 五黄廉贞星, plus 凶星: 灾祸、意外、疾病, illustrated with a gold gourd and ancient Chinese coins tied with a red tassel; top-right labeled 西南 with a gold-framed panel for number 7 and text 七赤破军星, plus 凶星: 破财、口舌、盗贼, illustrated with a brass bell and a silver sword. Middle row has 3 panels: middle-left aligned with 正东 in large vertical side text, a green-framed panel for number 8 and text 八白左辅星, plus 吉星: 财运、置业、积蓄, illustrated with a bonsai-like money tree and gold ingots; middle-center labeled 中宫 in a blue capsule tag overlapping the top edge of the center square, a blue-framed panel for number 1 and text 一白贪狼星, plus 吉星: 人缘、感情、智慧, illustrated with a crystal ball on a wooden stand; middle-right aligned with 正西 in large vertical side text, a green-framed panel for number 3 and text 三碧禄存星, plus 凶星: 是非、口舌、争执, illustrated with bamboo and a small stacked rock fountain. Bottom row has 3 panels: bottom-left labeled 东北 with a green-framed panel for number 4 and text 四绿文曲星, plus 吉星: 学业、文昌、考试, illustrated with an open book, brush pen, and ink stone with bamboo leaves behind; bottom-center labeled 正北 with a gold-framed panel for number 6 and text 六白武曲星, plus 吉星: 权力、贵人、偏财, illustrated with a golden guardian lion statue on a pedestal holding a ball; bottom-right labeled 西北 with a gray-framed panel for number 2 and text 二黑巨门星, plus 凶星: 病痛、伤害、阻滞, illustrated with a stone pagoda and a small incense burner. Use exactly 6 outer direction labels around the grid: 东南, 正南, 西南 above the top row, and 东北, 正北, 西北 below the bottom row, each inside rounded capsules matching the panel colors. Add exactly 2 large vertical side direction labels outside the grid: 正东 on the left side and 正西 on the right side. At the bottom center, add a pill-shaped legend with 2 segments: a red segment reading 吉星: 1、4、6、8、9 and a dark gray segment reading 凶星: 2、3、5、7. Include faint pale cloud motifs behind some objects for traditional atmosphere. Style is crisp vector-infographic with soft watercolor-like object rendering, high readability, balanced spacing, and an elegant Chinese metaphysical chart aesthetic.
title: 2026 Nine Palaces Flying Star Chart
description: This prompt generates a polished Chinese feng shui annual flying star infographic poster for reference, educational content, or social media sharing.

content: Create a luxurious Japanese magazine-style PR editorial spread for a publishing and branding service, designed as a two-page brochure layout. The left half is a dark, cinematic portrait scene in a sophisticated office lounge: a seated Japanese businessman in a navy bespoke suit, white shirt, dark tie, white pocket square, and wristwatch sits in a leather chair with one hand near his chin, posed thoughtfully beside a glossy wooden table. His face is intentionally obscured with a soft rectangular blur. The lighting is moody and warm, with reflections from tall windows and a premium executive atmosphere. On this dark left page, place large elegant serif headline text in English reading {argument name="headline text" default="PUBLISHING BRANDING"}, stacked in two lines near the upper left in muted gold. Below it, add multiple lines of Japanese copy in white, including a larger subheadline and several short body paragraphs arranged vertically. Near the lower left, include a bordered dark box containing exactly 4 checklist items, each preceded by a check mark, with Japanese text. Put a small page number "02" in the bottom-left corner. The right half is a clean white editorial information page with refined minimalist typography and generous spacing. At the top, place a large Japanese headline in black, aligned upper center-right, with two short Japanese body text blocks beneath it; on the upper far right include a small photo of exactly 4 stacked hardcover books and a glass vase near a bright window with greenery. Across the middle, add a centered section title in Japanese for five benefits, followed by exactly 5 numbered columns labeled 1 through 5, each with a short Japanese heading and several lines of smaller explanatory Japanese text. Beneath that, add another centered Japanese section title for workflow, followed by exactly 4 step blocks laid out horizontally: STEP 01 with a speech bubble icon, STEP 02 with a pencil icon, STEP 03 with an open book icon, STEP 04 with a megaphone icon. Each step includes the English word STEP plus a two-digit number, a short Japanese subtitle, and a few lines of smaller Japanese description, with small chevrons between steps. Along the bottom of the right page, place exactly 3 rectangular photos side by side: a city-view office meeting table scene, a close-up of a hand writing with a pen, and a stack of books near an open book. Under these images, add a prominent Japanese closing statement in a serif style on the lower left, and a smaller Japanese paragraph on the lower right. Put page number "03" in the bottom-right corner. Use a premium palette of deep navy, black, warm brown, ivory, and muted gold, with a balance of editorial luxury, corporate trust, and high-end publishing aesthetics. The overall composition should feel like a real magazine advertisement or consulting brochure, polished, photorealistic, elegant, and credible.
title: Luxury Publishing Branding Editorial Spread
description: This prompt generates a high-end Japanese magazine-style two-page promotional spread for publishing and branding services, ideal for brochures, PR visuals, and corporate marketing.

content: A clean, minimalist promotional poster on an off-white background in a modern tech-brand style. At the top left, a very large bold sans-serif headline in deep cobalt blue reads {argument name="headline text" default="Thinking Mode Searches"} split across two lines. Beneath it, a smaller gray explanatory sentence says that with thinking mode, the model can automatically browse the internet and find relevant contents for reference. At the top right, place a small blue OpenAI knot logo. Below the intro text, add a thin horizontal blue divider line ending with a tiny sparkle icon on the right. Under that, include a prompt line in small text with the word “Prompt:” in blue followed by the sentence {argument name="prompt text" default="Make a poster about OpenAI merch available on the official website right now."}. The main body is a centered 3-by-2 product grid with 8 total merchandise items shown as clean catalog cutouts with soft shadows inside rounded pale cards. Top row has 3 larger products: 1) a white long-sleeve striped rugby-style jersey with black collar and cuffs, small blue patches, and blue chest text “Research & Deployment Co.”, labeled “10 Year Jersey”; 2) a dark brown pullover hoodie with front pocket, small centered chest text “Research Deployment Co.” and sleeve print, labeled “Diagram Hoodie”; 3) a black T-shirt viewed from the back with a metallic knot graphic and pale pink text “Research & Deployment Co.”, labeled “Chrome Blossom Tee”. Bottom row has 5 smaller products: 4) a blue folding chair keychain shaped like a chair, labeled “Blue Chair Keychain”; 5) a black baseball cap with white flame graphics and “GPT-5” on the front, labeled “GPT-5 Flame Cap”; 6) a white notebook with a bold blue lower band and minimal OpenAI branding, labeled “OpenAI Notebook”; 7) a glossy black mug with “OpenAI” in white, labeled “OpenAI Office Mug”; 8) a dark green baseball cap with small white text “Thinking deeply”, labeled “Thinking Deeply Cap”. Keep all item labels centered below each product in small blue sans-serif text. Along the bottom footer, place “Research & Deployment Co.” on the left, the OpenAI knot logo plus wordmark centered, and “Designed with care.” on the right. Use a balanced editorial layout, lots of whitespace, premium product-ad poster aesthetics, subtle shadows, crisp studio lighting, and a restrained palette of off-white, blue, black, brown, and green.

content: Create the most realistic front page design of a vintage newspaper featuring the main character. The layout should be made in the style of a real printed newspaper with a cinematic black-and-white aesthetic. The main photo should be prominently placed in the center, framed, like the image in the title of the article. The subject in the photo should remain unchanged and clearly distinguishable in natural light and slightly increased contrast in order to match the spectacular editorial style. Create a bold, attention-grabbing headline at the top (create a unique title that matches the spirit of the photo - it can be romantic, mysterious, funny, or dramatic). Add a smaller subtitle under it, which will look like a real newspaper caption. Add realistic newspaper elements: Columns of small text (in the style of lorem ipsum, but framed like real news) At the top is the fictitious name of the publication (for example, “The Daily Prompts”, “AI Times” or similar - think creatively, according to the picture) Date, issue number and location Decorative lines, dividers, and vintage typography Small additional articles or captions to the main image Optional stamps, doodles, or editorial notes to add personality. Style: Black and white or slightly faded monochrome paper Fine paper texture, grain, and ink defects Small shadows and creases that mimic real printed paper The aesthetics of a clean but slightly worn vintage newspaper Mood: Give the design personality, expressiveness and plot, as if the plot is part of the main article. Aspect ratio: 4:5 or 1:1 High-detail, ultra-realistic hybrid of editorial photography and print design.
title: Vintage Newspaper Front Page Generator
description: A highly detailed prompt for creating realistic vintage newspaper designs with customizable headlines and cinematic black-and-white photography.

content: An ultra-dense maximalist fantasy illustration in a perfectly symmetrical front-facing composition, depicting a candy-themed Lunar New Year shrine scene exploding with color and detail. At the exact center, a kawaii doll-like girl deity sits cross-legged in a meditative lotus pose on a mound of sweets, framed by a huge radiant mandala halo shaped like layered lotus petals and ornamental festival patterns in gold, pink, orange, teal, and neon rainbow hues. She has a glossy bob haircut with blunt bangs in dark brown with purple sheen, a porcelain face with red lips, and her eyes are covered by a dramatic striped visor or blindfold made of yellow-and-black caution-tape-like ribbons. Her hair is decorated with oversized candy beads and lollipops, and her outfit is an extravagant sculptural dress made of frosting, sprinkles, bows, hearts, candy charms, pastel mascot faces, and dripping confection textures. Her hands rest open on her knees, palms up, in a serene ceremonial pose. Surrounding her is a packed altar-city of miniature pagodas, lantern towers, dragons, dolls, sweets, toys, and lucky symbols, all arranged in mirrored abundance. Include 4 large circular framed dessert mascots in the corners: top left a smiling pink frosted cupcake, top right a smiling pink macaron with a bow, bottom left a smiling gingerbread cookie, bottom right a smiling pink sprinkled donut. Include 6 prominent red-and-gold round festival signs across the upper half with Chinese characters such as fortune, prosperity, joy, and luck. Add 2 ornate dragon figures flanking the center, 2 decorated elephants in the mid-lower left and right, and 2 gold ingot bowls near them. Scatter many small doll girls in traditional festive dress throughout the background like collectible figurines. The entire foreground should be buried under countless colorful gumballs, candies, tiny teddy bears, smiley-face sweets, lollipops, beads, and toy-like creatures, with no empty space anywhere. Style: hyper-detailed, glossy 3D digital art, candycore, pop surrealism, toy diorama, festival altar, Chinese New Year iconography, saturated reds, pinks, oranges, and golds, sparkling highlights, crisp focus, intricate textures, celebratory and divine atmosphere.

content: A richly detailed vertical mural in the style of an aged East Asian religious wall painting on weathered silk or plaster, with visible cracks, abrasions, faded pigment, and distressed gold leaf. At the center, a celestial bodhisattva-like goddess floats gracefully above a large pink lotus pedestal, framed by a huge circular golden halo filling the upper middle of the composition. She wears an elaborate jeweled headdress, layered necklaces, armlets, and flowing robes in muted cinnabar red, cream, teal, and soft green, with long ribbon-like scarves swirling around her body in elegant arcs. Her right arm is raised, delicately holding a pink lotus flower, while her left hand extends outward in a gentle offering gesture. Surrounding her are exactly 3 smaller attendant maidens: one at lower left standing on clouds and playing a pipa, one at lower center kneeling or floating while presenting a tray of lotus blossoms, and one at lower right standing lightly on clouds with both hands raised in reverence. The background is a deep lapis-blue celestial sky filled with stylized cream and jade clouds, faint flying birds, lotus blooms, and 2 ornate temple pavilions in the upper left and upper right corners. Add hanging ornamental motifs near the mid-left and mid-right edges, and enclose the whole image in a decorative floral border. The overall mood is sacred, elegant, and antique, with intricate linework, delicate textile patterns, muted earthy tones, and a dominant blue-and-gold palette, resembling a treasured museum fresco or devotional hanging scroll.

content:
Create a lively Chinese event poster with a warm, trendy coffee-shop aesthetic, photographed from inside a seaside cafe looking out through large floor-to-ceiling windows at palm trees, a bright blue sky, outdoor seating, and a Ferris wheel in the distance. The composition should feel like a candid lifestyle scene combined with energetic graphic design. In the foreground, place a dark wooden table with 1 open laptop centered near the bottom, 1 takeaway coffee cup with a black lid on the right side of the table, 1 black bag on the left, and 1 short stack of books near the left edge. Use a sunlit, slightly golden afternoon atmosphere with reflections on the glass and a relaxed vacation vibe.

Overlay bold poster graphics in a collage style using torn paper, brushstroke paint, stickers, and taped note-paper elements. The main headline on the upper left should be huge, hand-painted Chinese calligraphy in dark brown and orange, reading “疯狂星期四”, with a small yellow tag near it that reads “第11期”, and an even smaller top-left badge reading “活动预告” with a tiny megaphone icon. Beneath the main headline, add a green brushstroke banner with the text “下周四，不见不散！”, and below that a smaller line in parentheses: “（五一长假前最后一期）”.

Add 2 torn notebook-paper cards: 1 in the upper right and 1 in the lower left. The upper-right note should contain a short invitation paragraph in Chinese, neatly typeset in black and orange text, reading: “让我们海边小聚，远眺摩天轮，吹吹海风，和 App & AI Builder 们一起聊聊产品、远程生活与创作。” and include a small orange heart doodle in the bottom-right corner of that note. The lower-left note should list 3 info blocks with icons and orange section headers: “时间”, “地点”, and “说明”. Under “时间”, write “2026年04月23日 (星期四)” and “12:00 ~ 18:00”. Under “地点”, write “南山区·前海石公园·福叁咖啡”. Under “说明”, write “无需报名，随时来吧！”.

Across the middle-right area, place a large playful white script-style slogan with a dark outline, angled slightly upward, reading “喝咖啡、随意交流 海边散步，主打一个 Chill~”. Add 1 illustrated coffee cup sticker next to this slogan on the right. Use energetic orange paint splashes and sketch doodles around the headline and notes to make the poster feel youthful and spontaneous.

At the bottom, place a wide off-white torn-paper footer strip containing 3 feature blocks laid out horizontally. Block 1: a snowflake-like icon with the text “舒适环境” and smaller text “空调 + 宽敞桌椅”. Block 2: a Wi‑Fi icon with the text “电网无忧” and smaller text “WiFi + 插座”. Block 3: larger orange handwritten text “期待与你 海边相遇！” with a blue underline flourish and a tiny heart doodle. The overall design should mix real photography and graphic poster elements, with strong contrast, brush lettering, scrapbook textures, cafe lifestyle realism, and a fashionable AI-generated social-media event-poster look.
title: Seaside Cafe Event Poster
description: A vibrant Chinese promotional poster for a casual seaside coffee meetup, useful for social event announcements, community gatherings, and lifestyle marketing.

content: A stylized half-body portrait of {argument name="subject" default="a brilliant young woman inventor"} in a dark, moody studio, rendered as a warm amber-and-copper digital painting with semi-realistic detail and subtle sketch-like linework. She faces forward in a relaxed upright pose, cropped from about mid-torso upward, with long dark brown hair swept loosely over one shoulder, a few flyaway strands rim-lit by orange backlight, and thin clear-framed eyeglasses partly visible. Dress her in a glossy mustard-yellow bomber jacket over a deep burgundy turtleneck sweater. The lighting is dramatic and cinematic: a glowing spherical lattice lamp sits behind her on the left, casting a golden halo and warm edge light around her hair and jacket, while the rest of the background fades into charcoal brown shadow. Behind her, integrate the feeling of a visual memory map or inventor's mind palace: faint technical sketches, geometric construction lines, and handwritten scientific notes drawn directly onto the background like illuminated chalk. Include exactly 2 large wireframe forms on the right side: 1 tilted basket-like lattice ellipsoid near the upper right and 1 faint rectangular diagram with axis-like guide lines near the lower right. Include exactly 1 glowing lattice sphere lamp on the lower left. Add small handwritten text in the upper right that reads “TPMS” with three bullet-like lines underneath: “gyroid”, “diamond”, and “primitive”, and a small formula note reading “E = hv” near the right-center. The overall mood should feel intelligent, elegant, flattering, and slightly futuristic, like a portrait merged with a conceptual memory interface. Use a rich palette of burnt orange, gold, auburn, brown-black, and wine red, with high contrast, luminous highlights, and a polished editorial-art finish.
title: Inventor Portrait Memory Map
description: This prompt generates a flattering stylized portrait of a woman surrounded by scientific memory-map visuals, ideal for personal branding, concept art, or speculative interface design.

content: Create a dramatic anime sci-fi poster of {argument name="character name" default="Puru Two"}, inspired by a cyber-newtype pilot from a mecha war setting. content:
Subject & Composition:

Central Figure: A {argument name="subject profile" default="sharp profile view of a man wearing a classic 1940s fedora and a formal suit"}.

Melting Effect: The lower half of the man's torso should dissolve or "drip" into long, vertical black ink streaks and splatters, creating a surreal, liquid-bleed effect against the background.

Graphic Element: A large, {argument name="background shape" default="solid vibrant red circle"} is positioned directly behind the man's head and shoulders, creating a "halo" or "rising sun" motif that anchors the composition.

Style & Color Palette:

Color Scheme: A strict {argument name="color scheme" default="minimalist palette of True Red, Deep Black, and Off-White/Cream"}.

Photography Style: High-contrast, black and white film noir photography for the subject. The texture should look like a high-resolution fashion editorial with a shallow depth of field.

Background: A clean, slightly textured off-white paper or canvas background to give it a premium, physical poster feel.

Technical Details:

Lighting: Strong "Rembrandt" lighting to define the facial contours, emphasizing the bridge of the nose and the jawline with deep shadows.

Atmosphere: Somber, intellectual, and high-stakes. The design should feel modern yet period-accurate to the mid-20th century.

Framing: Vertical poster orientation (A-frame), with significant negative space on the left and right to emphasize the central vertical axis.

Aspect ratio is 9:16

One person on the right should wear glasses and a red cardigan, another at the bottom right should have curly dark hair, round glasses, a black T-shirt, and be lying on his stomach while drawing. Beneath it, add a pink slogan banner with yellow-highlighted text: 「恋に迷って、人生はもっとキラキラする♥」. Include small faux credits at the bottom in Japanese film-poster style. Overall feeling: feminine, comedic, inspirational, sparkly, over-the-top, and nostalgic, like a parody of a live-action romance film poster starring a mascot heroine. content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the visual foundation, expand the single sky-palace scene into a complete cinematic world-building presentation for a fantasy civilization. Preserve the same East Asian celestial imperial design language, floating architecture above clouds, gilded ornamentation, warm sunset lighting, and ultra-detailed realistic concept-art look, then turn it into a polished multi-panel lore board on a dark background with elegant editorial typography. Include 8 labeled sections: 1 large hero overview panel for the civilization, 1 architecture section with 9 images, 1 characters section with 7 full-body character designs, 1 clothing and armor section with 6 outfit variations, 1 vehicles and transport section with 4 vehicle designs, 1 world map section with 1 illustrated map, 1 environments section with 6 environment images, and 1 culture and details section with 6 close-up detail images. Add a refined fantasy title and short lore paragraph for the civilization, using the name {argument name="civilization name" default="Celestial Dynasty"}. The architecture section should show 9 distinct items: palace, temple, gate, pillar, bridge, throne hall, garden, library, and observatory. The characters section should show 7 archetypes: emperor, empress, high priest, general, royal guard, scholar, and artisan. The clothing and armor section should show 6 designs: ceremonial robe, battle armor, noble attire, priest robes, artisan garments, and dancer costume. The vehicles and transport section should show 4 designs: an airship, a flying beast mount, a sky chariot, and a ceremonial palanquin. The environments section should show 6 scenes: one wide banner panorama plus 5 smaller locations, including forest, mountain peaks, lotus valley, golden fields, and a celestial port. The culture and details section should show 6 images: dragon motif, lantern or artifact, palace interior, scholarly scene, mechanical instruments, and decorative symbols. Keep all panels visually unified as if from one official franchise world bible, with extremely rich detail, believable material design, and cinematic realism.
title: Celestial Dynasty World Bible Board
description: This prompt turns one reference scene into a complete fantasy civilization pitch board with architecture, characters, costumes, vehicles, map, environments, and cultural details for concept development or franchise worldbuilding.

content: A dense surreal collage poster blending retro Japanese street culture, dystopian futurism, environmental collapse, and cosmic dream imagery in one vertically stacked composition. The image should feel like layered mixed-media street art made from torn posters, ink illustration, manga textures, watercolor washes, newspaper print, spray paint, and graphic design fragments. The overall palette combines deep midnight blues, black, cream paper tones, neon magenta, crimson red, cherry blossom pink, and industrial gray. In the upper left, show a large red sun behind Mount Fuji with cherry blossom branches crossing the corner, and a small airplane in the sky. Along the left side and lower left, depict a crowded Tokyo-like city street packed with pedestrians, glowing signs, dense buildings, and a tall cylindrical building with a smiley face near the top and a vertical sign reading AI IS WATCHING YOU. Include stylized Japanese-style signage on nearby buildings. Add a giant wave motif and a pagoda integrated into the urban scene. In the upper center, place a dark industrial skyline with multiple smokestacks releasing massive black clouds, transitioning into a giant astronaut floating forward with one hand reaching out. In the upper right, transform the sky into outer space with stars, a swirling purple-and-blue nebula, and a black hole. Beneath that, create a futuristic eco-city of sleek skyscrapers mixed with lush trees, cliffs, and cascading waterfalls. Add a glowing neon sign on the far right that reads DREAMING IS FREE. Near the astronaut, place a torn poster with the text THE FUTURE IS UNWRITTEN in large type and below it But we are the authors in smaller type. Across the center, layer floral elements including cherry blossoms and large roses around a partially obscured central human portrait to give the sense of fragmented identity. In the lower center, show a person from behind wearing a dark hooded jacket with graffiti-style text reading QUESTION EVERYTHING. Around them, include additional cutout portrait fragments, a Mondrian-inspired geometric block of red, blue, yellow, white, and black rectangles, a classical marble bust fragment, a white dove in flight, a small protest sign that reads EQUALITY ≠ EQUITY, and a seated figure looking toward the futuristic landscape. In the lower left corner, include part of a noir-style person in a dark hat and coat, and in the lower right, part of a manga-style female face in profile. Scatter graffiti, torn edges, ink splatters, layered paper textures, and poster remnants throughout. The composition should be extremely busy, cinematic, and thought-provoking, balancing hope and anxiety, tradition and technology, nature and urban overload, in the style of a high-detail contemporary collage mural.
title: Surreal Futurist Japanese Collage Poster
description: A richly layered mixed-media poster prompt for generating a dense editorial collage that merges Tokyo street life, space-age symbolism, protest art, and eco-futurist cityscapes.

content: A gritty retro propaganda-style poster illustration with a limited palette of black, deep red, and aged beige paper texture, designed like a bold vintage screen-printed action poster. Show 2 stylized women in a dramatic diagonal composition, frozen mid-fight. On the left, a woman dressed like a nurse in a short white uniform and angular nurse cap lunges forward with one knee raised and one arm bent, her body sharply foreshortened. On the right, a woman in a fitted black dress and wide-brim black hat leans backward in a defensive pose, one arm raised above her head and the other near her torso, long dark hair flowing behind her. Render both figures with hard-edged geometric shapes, exaggerated limbs, sharp shadows, and high-contrast noir facial planes. Use aggressive red diagonal rays sweeping across the background, with black architectural bars and abstract constructivist shapes framing the scene. Add distressed paper grain, ink wear, and slight misregistration for a worn print effect. Place a small blurred monkey head emblem in the upper-right corner. Include large blocky poster text in the lower left across 3 lines reading “SCOTTISH RECIPE:” then “MINCE AND” then “TATTIES”, with the first 2 lines in beige and the final 2 lines in strong red, using a heavy squared sans-serif display font. Add a red cross-like graphic element in the lower-right corner. The overall mood is violent, satirical, cinematic, and strikingly graphic, like a Soviet constructivist pulp film poster advertising {argument name="dish name" default="Scottish Recipe: Mince and Tatties"}.
title: Retro Constructivist Fight Poster
description: This prompt generates a bold vintage propaganda-style poster with two women in a stylized fight scene, ideal for satirical pulp artwork or dramatic graphic poster designs.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the cast reference, transform the simple lineup into an ornate Japanese light-novel character relationship chart poster. Keep the same 10 named characters and reuse their existing portrait art as the base visuals, but redesign the layout into a polished infographic on a soft cream and pale-blue fantasy background with decorative borders, sparkles, roses, and a small European-style hotel building vignette in the upper left. Add a large Japanese title at the top, 「支配人はかりそめの顔」, with the subtitle 「キャラクター紹介＆相関図」, and place a dark badge in the upper right that says 「ネタバレ配慮版」. Put the heroine 一条 紬希 in the center as the main focus in a framed character card labeled 「主人公」, and place 秦野 啓司 in a large framed card on the right as the key counterpart. Arrange the remaining 8 characters around them in individual profile cards: 加賀坂 その葉, 川原 澪, 樫村, 紬希の母, ハルカ, 杏子, 美果, 桜子. Connect the characters with multiple colored arrows and relationship labels to visualize the network; include exactly 14 visible relationship labels: 「親友」, 「理解者」, 「本音を見抜く」, 「憧れ」, 「相談」, 「画策」, 「仲直り中」, 「直感的理解」, 「メンター」, 「実務支援」, 「保護者的存在」, 「後輩　ムードメーカー」, 「後輩　グループを支える」, 「後輩　明るさ・希望」. Also add the 8 central horizontal relationship callouts between 一条 紬希 and 秦野 啓司: 「偽溶み→公認」, 「ライバル」, 「秘密を共有」, 「対等な相棒」, 「気になる存在」, plus a pink central badge reading 「反発から信頼へ」, and 3 lower callouts: 「信頼」, 「協力を後押し」, 「二人の空気に気づく」. Include a gold-ribbon group label above the three lower girls that says 「ASTRALの仲間たち」. Add a bottom section with exactly 10 smaller summary cards, one for each character again, lined up across the width. On the far right, add 2 boxed sidebar sections titled 「作品のキーワード」 and 「関係の見どころ」; the first should contain 4 bullet items with icons, and the second should contain 4 bullet items with icons. Fill every card with dense Japanese profile text and role tags in a clean editorial style, as if for a promotional relationship guide included with a novel. Make the overall design elegant, readable, romantic-mystery themed, and magazine-quality.
title: Japanese Character Relationship Chart Poster
description: This prompt turns a cast lineup reference into a polished Japanese novel-style character introduction and relationship map poster for story promotion or reader guides.

content: A dreamy anime-style low-angle illustration of a young schoolgirl standing in a flower field under a vivid clear blue sky, viewed from near ground level as if the camera is among the blossoms looking up at her. She has a short platinum-blonde bob with soft bangs, bright blue eyes, pale skin, and a calm slightly serious expression. She wears a round yellow sunhat with a blue ribbon tied at the back, an oversized light blue smock-like dress with a white collar, a visible name tag pinned to her chest reading {argument name="name tag text" default="兀華"}, and a mustard-yellow crossbody satchel. One hand is extended toward the viewer with the palm open, creating strong foreground foreshortening. Surround her with exactly 6 prominent flowers in the composition: 2 large white cosmos flowers in the left foreground, 1 large blue flower in the right foreground, 1 white flower in the upper right background, and 2 smaller blue blossoms near the bottom center. Use soft painterly watercolor textures, delicate linework, airy lighting, gentle depth of field, and a luminous pastel palette dominated by sky blue, white, and yellow. The mood should feel innocent, nostalgic, fresh, and slightly magical, like a children’s book illustration mixed with high-end anime key art.
title: Anime Girl Reaching Through Flowers
description: This prompt generates a soft low-angle anime illustration of a young girl in a flower field, ideal for whimsical character art, wallpapers, and storybook-style visuals.

content: Create a clean, modern Japanese presentation cover slide in a minimalist editorial style, landscape 16:9. Use a very light gray background with bold black typography and vivid yellow accent bars. The layout is asymmetrical and high contrast, with lots of negative space. Place a small black square near the upper left containing the white text "01" in italic bold sans serif. Across the center, set a large Japanese title in heavy black type on 2 lines: "司法書士等による" on the first line and "特別委任方式" on the second line, with the second line much larger and sitting on a rough hand-painted yellow highlight stroke. Below it, add a smaller Japanese subtitle in black: "登記原因証明情報の新しい取扱い". Under the subtitle, place a thin horizontal black line centered. Along the far right edge, add a tall vertical yellow sidebar with black vertical text reading "01 表紙". Near the top right, place 1 small black square as a decorative element. In the lower right quadrant, place a decorative 5 by 5 dotted grid made of 25 small black dots. On the far left edge, crop in oversized black Japanese characters so they are only partially visible, creating a strong graphic border effect. At the bottom left, place a single line of small black Japanese text: "令和7年12月9日　法務省民二第1578号　依命通知". At the bottom right, place 2 lines of small black Japanese text, right aligned: first line "司法書士事務所アンドロー・デザインワークショップ", second line "司法書士　浅野勇貴". Add a thin diagonal black line entering from the top left corner as another graphic accent. Overall feel: premium business presentation, legal seminar title slide, Swiss-inspired grid composition, bold Japanese typography, sharp and print-like.
title: Japanese Legal Presentation Cover Slide
description: This prompt generates a bold minimalist Japanese title slide for a legal or professional presentation with strong typography and yellow accent graphics.

HOJE UMA LENDA."} with the last word highlighted in brighter blue. Add a handwritten signature under the main headline with the number {argument name="jersey number" default="9"}. content: A highly detailed, colorful illustrated hidden-object poster set in Madrid’s Puerta del Sol on a bright sunny day, rendered like a lively hand-drawn travel puzzle with crisp ink outlines, textured watercolor-gouache shading, and a slightly whimsical caricature style. The composition is packed edge to edge with a huge crowd in the plaza, viewed from a slightly elevated eye level, with the Real Casa de Correos clock building dominating the right background, the Tío Pepe rooftop sign in the left background, the red diamond Sol metro sign on the left, the bear and strawberry tree statue near the center, historic facades, blue sky, and soft clouds. At the top left, include a torn notebook-paper sign pinned over the scene with large Spanish text: {argument name="headline text" default="¿Dónde está \"El Hombre del Puro\"?"} and a second line {argument name="subheadline text" default="Encuéntralo en Madrid"}. Next to it, add a pinned small portrait photo of the target man: a middle-aged man in a dark fedora and dark coat holding a cigar near his mouth, styled like a reference snapshot. Fill the square with exactly 1 metro entrance sign, 1 lottery kiosk labeled “Loterías y Apuestas del Estado,” 1 domed souvenir kiosk with postcard display and a sign reading “¡HOLA! DESDE MADRID,” 1 churros stand with a chalkboard reading “CHURROS CON CHOCOLATE,” 1 hat display stall on the lower right, 1 guitarist, 2 flamenco dancers in red dresses, 1 street cleaner in a bright orange-and-green uniform with text on the back reading “MADRID LIMPIO ENTRE TODOS,” 1 bicyclist, 2 dogs, 1 child holding a red teddy-bear balloon, many pigeons scattered across the foreground, children playing with soap bubbles, tourists with backpacks and maps, families, street onlookers, and performers. The crowd should feel dense and bustling, with dozens of distinct figures in varied summer clothing and natural poses, creating a challenging search scene. Emphasize Spanish local color, playful observational details, warm oranges and sunlit stone grays, and the feeling of a classic “Where’s Waldo?” style city-search illustration centered on finding {argument name="target character" default="El Hombre del Puro"} somewhere among the crowd in {argument name="city" default="Madrid"}.
title: Hidden-Object Madrid Plaza Puzzle
description: This prompt generates a busy illustrated search-and-find poster of Puerta del Sol in Madrid, ideal for hidden-object games, social posts, or travel-themed puzzle art.

content: A dramatic dark fantasy studio poster of two wizard-like figures posed like a parody heavy-metal album cover. In the foreground, a stocky older wizard sits or leans toward the camera, wearing a glossy black hooded robe, large over-ear studio headphones, and a long thick white beard spilling over his chest. He grips a tall black staff in his left hand; the staff has an elongated spearhead-shaped ornate top with open lattice details. A large black podcast microphone on a boom or stand is positioned directly in front of him at mouth level, with a visible sticker that reads "CARAJO" on the microphone body. Behind him stands a second older wizard in a luminous white robe with gold trim and a rope belt, also with long white hair and a long white beard. He holds a tall white staff with a matching ornate spearhead top in his right hand and extends his left hand toward the viewer in a commanding spell-casting gesture, fingers spread. Behind the standing wizard’s head is a bright electric-blue glowing circular halo made of runes, creating a magical summoning-ring effect. The background is pure black, with high-contrast cinematic lighting: cool blue rim light from behind and warm highlights on the hands, robes, and staffs. content: A front-facing photograph of a massive white cruise ship centered in the frame on the water in Istanbul, seen from a low distance across a narrow harbor channel, with the ship moving slowly toward the camera. The bow has a bold stylized lips graphic painted in red and black, creating a playful viral Instagram-filter feel. Behind and around the ship is a dense waterfront cityscape with low buildings, docks, and exactly 2 slender mosque minarets rising on the right side of the skyline. The composition is symmetrical and cinematic, with the ship dominating the vertical center, dark water in the foreground, and a huge dramatic sky above. The sky is filled with heavy storm clouds across the upper third, but the lower sky glows in pale yellow-green haze, giving the image a vintage, dreamy, slightly eerie atmosphere. Include exactly 4 small birds scattered in the sky. Apply a nostalgic analog film look with faded colors, grain, dust specks, soft blur, light vignette, muted contrast, and a slightly weathered 1990s tourist snapshot aesthetic. Add an orange camcorder-style date stamp in the lower left corner reading {argument name="date stamp" default="02 25 '94"}. A white ferry is partially visible on the far left behind the pier, and small scattered pedestrians stand along the dock and around the building, giving scale without becoming portrait subjects. The foreground is reflective harbor water with soft ripples and a muted reflection of the building; the pier edge is lined with white railings and rough dark rocks at the base. Above, a wide overcast sky with heavy layered clouds fills nearly half the image. Use a nostalgic Instagram-filter aesthetic with faded colors, warm sepia-beige tones, slight green cast in the shadows, gentle film grain, low contrast, soft haze, subtle vignette, and a lightly weathered analog-photo feel. content: A dramatic vertical Japanese stage-play poster in luxurious dark fantasy anime style, featuring a single androgynous young actor in a half-body portrait against a nighttime city skyline with glowing high-rise windows and soft bokeh lights. The character has long straight hair in deep black with vivid teal-turquoise inner glow and streaks, glossy highlights, and strands flowing across the shoulders. They wear an elegant black high-collared costume with subtle brocade texture, a fitted dark coat, black leather gloves, and a jewel-like diamond-shaped turquoise pendant at the throat set in ornate gold. One gloved hand is raised near the collar in a poised theatrical gesture. The mood is mysterious, romantic, and slightly gothic, with cinematic rim lighting from behind, strong contrast, gold sparkles, and luminous accents in the hair and costume. Use a refined magazine-quality key visual composition with decorative gold filigree corners and a premium theatrical poster layout. Leave space for Japanese typography integrated into the design: at upper right, small text "夜空に輝く、唯一の星。", then "主演俳優" and the actor name "{argument name="character name" default="夜乃 宙"}" with small romanization "SORA YORUNO" beneath; along the left side, a vertical quote reading "この役に、すべてを捧げる。闇さえ、愛に変えてみせよう。"; near center-lower, small text "幻想ロマン・ステージ" above the large glowing gold title "{argument name="title text" default="夜の檻に囚われた光"}" with a small subtitle beneath "—それでも、君を愛した。"; include a dark teal rose motif and thorny circular ornament near the title. At the bottom left, add the date block "2025 6.20 FRI - 6.29 SUN" and venue "天穹シアター". At the bottom right, add a bordered ticket box with "チケット一般発売 5.10 SAT 10:00~". Center bottom credits in Japanese: "原作・脚本 霧月 澪", "演出 七海 翼", "音楽 深月 奏". Along the very bottom, add the tagline "—光か、闇か——。愛が、運命を選ぶ。—". Color palette: midnight blue, black, teal, cyan glow, and antique gold. Emphasize polished poster typography, layered depth, elegant fantasy drama branding, and a consistent face and atmosphere suitable for a theatrical promotional campaign.

content: A polished Japanese fashion magazine cover illustration in elegant contemporary editorial style, vertical full-page composition. The cover title is a huge teal serif masthead reading "AURA" across the top. In the upper right, include 4 stacked issue details: "6", "June 2025", "No.126", and a small boxed label "アウラ", followed by the price line "特別定価 ¥980". The background is a bright pale blue sky with soft white clouds. Center the portrait of an androgynous, ethereal young model, shown from chest up, wearing a crisp white tailored jacket with subtle gold piping, a white shirt, a vivid aqua-teal vest or tie layer, and a gemstone-like star brooch at the collar. The character has very long, layered, windswept hair in {argument name="hair color" default="icy white with pale aqua tint"}, with glossy strands flowing across the shoulders, and fair luminous skin. The face is largely obscured by a centered rectangular censor block in muted gray-blue to pale pink gradient, covering the eyes, nose, and upper cheeks; the visible lower face shows a soft mouth and refined chin. One hand is raised near the lips in a thoughtful fashion-portrait pose. Use delicate anime-inspired linework, airy lighting, translucent highlights, and luxury beauty-editorial rendering. Add 3 left-column cover blurbs in Japanese with teal headlines and smaller black body text: first, "透明感をまとう 初夏のスキンケア" with 2 smaller lines beneath; second, "好印象をつくる 爽やかカラー術" with 2 smaller lines beneath; third, "プロが教える 美しい髪の条件" with 2 smaller lines beneath. Add a teal circular badge on the right with 4 lines of white text: "Special Interview", "風と光と、", "自分らしさと。", and "ソラが語る 日常と美学". Near the lower center, place a small italic English line "Cover & Special Feature" above the large Japanese main headline "ソラ、という名の透明感。" with the first word in teal and the rest in black. Under that, add 2 lines of smaller Japanese subheadline text. Along the bottom edge, create 3 feature teasers with pale italic English category labels and Japanese copy beneath: left label "Fashion", center label "Beauty", right label "Trend", each with 2 short Japanese lines. Overall mood: serene, luxurious, airy, refreshing early-summer beauty fashion cover with cohesive aqua-and-white color design.

content: Create a dramatic Brazilian football club signing announcement poster in a vertical 2:3 layout, with a gritty high-contrast sports-marketing aesthetic in yellow, dark green, black, and gold. The main subject is a muscular tattooed male footballer wearing a bright yellow Mirassol FC home jersey, shown as a large centered half-body portrait from chest up, facing forward with a serious intimidating expression. He has a shaved head, visible neck and arm tattoos, and a broad athletic build. The jersey has dark green trim on the collar and sleeves, the Mirassol crest with two stars on the chest, the ATHLETA logo on the opposite chest, a large green sponsor wordmark reading “Poty” across the torso, shoulder brand marks, and a circular sleeve sponsor patch. Behind him, place a dramatic waving Mirassol flag in dark green and yellow on the upper right with a large club crest and two stars, glowing stadium lights, smoky golden particles, and a night stadium crowd background. On the left side, stack large bold condensed text in Portuguese: “BEM-VINDO AO” above an oversized yellow “MIRASOL”, then the player name split across 2 lines as “ALEX” and “POATAN” in huge white letters, with a handwritten yellow signature-style “Poatan” beneath. Below that, add a 4-line motivational block in uppercase white text with the final line highlighted in yellow: “DE CAMPEÃO / NO OCTÓGONO / PARA GUERREIRO / EM CAMPO. / A LUTA CONTINUA.” On the right side, add a vertical info panel with 3 icon-and-word traits, each in yellow with matching symbols: target icon with “FOCO”, fist icon with “DISCIPLINA”, and helmet icon with “GARRA”, then below them a bold yellow callout: “AGORA É PELO LEÃO!”. Include 2 smaller secondary player images at the bottom: 1 on the lower left, a cropped front three-quarter pose kissing the club badge on the jersey; and 1 on the lower center-right, a back view with both arms raised and index fingers pointing upward. On the back-view jersey, show the sponsor text “DS TECNOLOGIA AUTOMOTIVA” across the upper back, the name “POATAN”, and the number “10” in large green numerals. Add a black-and-gold bottom strip containing 4 values separated evenly with icons: lion head and “MENTALIDADE DE CAMPEÃO”, shield and “FORÇA E HONRA”, star and “HUMILDADE E TRABALHO”, soccer ball and “PAIXÃO PELO JOGO”. Beneath that, place a yellow banner with the slogan “NOVO DESAFIO. MESMA MISSÃO.” and at the very bottom a handwritten white phrase “FÉ, FOCO E FAMÍLIA!” followed by the hashtag “#POATANÉLEÃO”. Use cinematic rim lighting, intense contrast, metallic golden glow, textured smoke, and premium club-announcement poster design.

content: Create a highly detailed, colorful isometric festival poster illustration of a bustling Latin American technology fair in an open urban plaza, packed with dozens of people networking, coding, presenting, eating, recording media, and attending talks. The overall style should feel like a premium editorial cityscape poster: vibrant, dense, optimistic, playful, and full of readable signage, with crisp linework, painterly textures, warm sunlight, and a celebratory startup-community atmosphere. The main headline on the large stage at upper left reads {argument name="headline text" default="LATAM TECH FEST"}, with a subheading in Spanish reading "Aprender para transformar". On the stage, show a live conference with blue lighting, a presenter, and a seated audience; include 4 vertical icon panels on the stage area labeled "Educación", "Tecnología", "Innovación", and "Futuro", plus 3 glowing topic icons on the back wall labeled "Código", "Comunidad", and "Impacto". Build the plaza as a dense multi-zone event map with exactly 24 clearly labeled signs or booths distributed across the scene: "Keep Coding Keep Growing", "YO APRENDÍ EN LÍNEA", "Remote Work Zone", "ENGLISH UPGRADE YOUR FUTURE", "STARTUPS BUILD THE FUTURE", "DESIGN THINKING", "HACKATHON 24 HORAS DE IDEAS", "Café con código", "AREPAS CON TODO", "Hechas con código y ♥", "Inspiración", "Networking", "Aprendizaje", "Café", "Baños", "SOMOS LATINOAMÉRICA", "AI LAB", "DATA PEOPLE", "DEVS QUE IMPACTAN", "MARKETING GROWTH & COMMUNITY", "PRODUCT BUILD WHAT MATTERS", "FINTECH EL FUTURO DEL DINERO", "FOUNDER MODE", and "DEMO DAY LAUNCH · SCALE". In the center of the plaza, place a circular fountain with a large green geometric logo sculpture as the visual anchor. Surround it with tables, laptops, whiteboards, crowds, planters, and benches. Include a colorful hillside neighborhood in the background with mountains, palm trees, power lines, and exactly 2 red cable cars crossing the sky; also add exactly 1 small drone flying overhead. On the upper right building, place a large brand sign reading {argument name="brand name" default="Platzi"} and a green billboard that says "NUNCA PARES DE APRENDER". Populate the lower and middle foreground with many micro-scenes: a podcast booth labeled "PODCAST ON AIR", a neon "LIVE STREAM" corner, a startup workspace with people using laptops, a hackathon judging table, a founder pitch area, a fintech board with charts, and a coffee stand with espresso equipment and menu boards. Add 6 animal or mascot details across the scene: 1 orange cat lounging near the left worktables, 1 capybara at the lower left, 1 multicolor llama piñata in the lower center-left, 1 yellow rubber duck near the center-bottom, 1 small green robot near the bottom center-right, and 1 tiny turtle near the bottom beside a coin. Also place exactly 4 vehicle elements: 2 green scooters at the lower left, 1 decorated taco truck at the lower right with the sign "TACOS AL PASTOR", and 1 wheelchair user moving through the crowd. Include extra props that reinforce tech culture: whiteboards with sticky notes, a board titled "Traction" with an upward graph and bullet points "Users", "Revenue", "Retention", "Love", a board titled "CAP TABLE" with percentage rows, a Bitcoin-style coin on the ground, microphones, cameras, cables, monitors, smartphones, and branded green merchandise. Clothing should be modern casual startup attire with hoodies, jackets, backpacks, jeans, sneakers, and conference badges, featuring a diverse mix of ages and Latin American identities. Use rich greens, teals, oranges, purples, and warm neutrals, with lush plants and vines integrated into architecture. Make every corner busy and discoverable, like a Where's-Waldo-style tech ecosystem celebration, but keep the composition readable and inviting.
title: Latin American Tech Festival Poster
description: This prompt generates a dense isometric festival-style illustration of a vibrant Latin American tech conference plaza, ideal for event branding, startup community posters, or social media showcase art.

content: Create a dramatic luxury sports poster for {argument name="player name" default="Bernardo Silva"} as a Juventus football star, in a dark cinematic black-and-gold editorial style. Vertical composition, high contrast, moody stadium atmosphere, premium poster design with layered photomontage. The background is a massive waving Juventus flag filling the upper half of the image, black fabric with broad white stripes and a large metallic gold Juventus "J" crest on the right side, topped by exactly 3 gold stars. In front of the flag, place an oversized close-up half-body portrait of the player wearing a classic Juventus home kit, facing slightly left, with wet textured hair, visible neck tattoos, dramatic rim lighting, and the face partially obscured by shadow for a mysterious heroic look. In the foreground, place a full-body action pose of the same player running forward with a soccer ball at his feet on a floodlit pitch, centered near the bottom, wearing the black-and-white striped Juventus jersey with white shorts, white socks, black boots, gold number 20 on the shorts, gold Adidas details, and the Jeep sponsor logo clearly visible. The stadium should wrap across the lower half with bright white floodlights, dark packed stands, light fog, and subtle smoke near the ground. Use elegant magazine-poster typography integrated into the composition: top left small gold text "JUVENTUS" and "FOUNDED 1897", with exactly 3 gold stars beneath; along the upper left a vertical list of 4 words in white caps: "CLASS", "VISION", "INTELLIGENCE", "WORK RATE"; beneath that a gold handwritten signature and the year split across two lines as "20" and "26"; center-left large serif player name text with the first name smaller and the last name huge, reading "BERNARDO" and "SILVA" in white; below that smaller gold text "JUVENTUS"; lower right exactly 3 gold stars above 3 stacked white words: "TRADITION", "PASSION", "GLORY"; bottom center exactly 3 gold stars above the phrase "THE OLD LADY" and smaller text "SINCE 1897". Color palette limited to black, white, charcoal, and metallic gold. Add subtle rain haze, fabric texture, vignette, glowing highlights on the crest and text, and a polished Champions League poster aesthetic.

content: A classical Chinese ink-wash painting on warm aged rice paper, combining landscape art and calligraphy in a clean two-part composition. On the left half, leave broad negative space filled with bold black brush-calligraphy showing the poem title {argument name="poem title" default="早发白帝城"}, the poet name {argument name="poet name" default="李白"}, and four large vertical lines of poem text in expressive handwritten script: {argument name="poem text" default="朝辞白帝彩云间，千里江陵一日还。两岸猿声啼不住，轻舟已过万重山。"}. On the right half, paint a serene river gorge at sunrise in the style of a traditional shan shui scroll: a soft orange sun low above misty layered mountains, tall steep cliffs on both sides, faint haze in the distance, and calm reflective water glowing with pale gold light. In the foreground at lower right, place a small wooden river boat with a simple covered cabin and a vertical mast. A solitary ancient Chinese scholar in flowing white hanfu stands on the deck facing the landscape from behind, hair tied in a traditional topknot, long robe and sash slightly trailing in the breeze, creating a contemplative mood. Add a tiny temple pavilion perched high on the top of the right cliff. Use delicate ink outlines, subtle sepia and gray washes, textured paper grain, elegant empty space, and refined literati-painting aesthetics. The overall image should feel poetic, quiet, balanced, and museum-quality, with especially beautiful legible calligraphy integrated into the artwork.
title: Classical Chinese Poem Scroll Landscape
description: A traditional Chinese ink-style artwork featuring a famous poem in calligraphy beside a sunrise river gorge scene, ideal for literary posters, cultural prints, or editorial art.
