content:
{argument name="subject name" default="[PERSON NAME]"}. 
Act as a high-end sports graphic designer creating a conceptual tribute poster. The style is a complex "dual exposure photo-grid composite" with mixed-media textures.
CENTRAL STRUCTURE (THE VESSEL):
The central focus is a large-scale, high-contrast black and white portrait silhouette of {argument name="subject name" default="[PERSON NAME]"}. This main portrait acts as the container.
THE GRID FILL & TEXTURES (MIXED MEDIA):
The interior of the silhouette is populated by a dense "photo mosaic grid" of action shots from the person's career.
CRITICAL TEXTURE INSTRUCTION: Do not just paste flat photos. Apply artistic textures to various grid cells to create a tactile, collage feel. Use effects like:
Halftone Dots: Comic-book style raster patterns on some cells.
Fabric/Embroidery: Subtle thread or canvas textures suggesting a jersey or patch.
Film Grain: Heavy noise on specific high-contrast action shots.
COLOR STRATEGY:
The base is Monochrome B&W. Use selective color overlays (relevant to the team/flag) ONLY on specific grid cells to create a rhythm.
TYPOGRAPHY & BRANDING (STRICT MICRO-SCALING):
Top Left (The Name): Write "{argument name="subject name" default="[PERSON NAME]"}" strictly using the font {argument name="font family" default="Inter Semibold"}.
Kerning: Tight negative kerning (-4%).
Size: SMALL and discreet. It must occupy MAXIMUM 20% of the canvas width. Do NOT make it large or loud.
Top Right (The Symbol): Place the primary logo (Team/Brand/Flag).
Size: VERY SMALL. It must occupy MAXIMUM 10% of the canvas width.
COMPOSITION & BACKGROUND:
Background: Off-white or light grey with a visible high-quality paper or concrete texture. It should not be flat digital white.
Alignment: Center the figure perfectly. Maintain wide negative space around the object.
title: Dual Exposure Sports Graphic
description: A sophisticated prompt for creating a mixed-media sports tribute poster using silhouette containers, photo-mosaic grids, and tactile textures like halftone dots and film grain.

content: A vertical Japanese anime fantasy game or light-novel promotional poster in a soft pastel lavender, white, and gold palette, featuring a single heroic teenage girl as the main subject in a grand celestial city. She stands in a dynamic three-quarter full-body pose, slightly turned left, holding an ornate staff in her left hand, with her right arm extended behind her as if caught in wind. Her face is obscured by a flat pale square censor block centered over the head, but the visible design suggests a delicate anime heroine with very long flowing silver-lilac hair, side bangs, loose strands, and star-shaped hair ornaments with dark indigo ribbon bows. She wears an elaborate magical-girl style dress: off-shoulder white bodice with navy and violet trim, gold star motifs, layered asymmetrical skirt in white, periwinkle, violet, and deep indigo, a very large dark blue waist bow with a gold star jewel, detached flowing sleeves, gold chains with tiny star charms draped at the hip, white thigh-high stockings, and a blue star-shaped garter ornament on one thigh. Her staff is tall and elegant, dark shaft with gold frame elements and a suspended faceted blue crystal near the top, decorated with bows and star accents. The background is an airy fantasy skyline of white towers, cathedral-like spires, clouds, feathers, and drifting pink petals, with bright ethereal backlighting and a dreamy heroic atmosphere. Compose it like a polished key visual poster with abundant Japanese typography integrated into the artwork. At the upper left, place the Japanese tagline text "願いが、未来を照らす。" with two smaller lines below it. At the upper right, place a star-like emblem, the large character name "ルミナ", the subtitle "— Lumina —", and a smaller CV credit line. On the right side, add 3 vertically stacked feature callouts, each with a small icon and a bold Japanese heading followed by 2 short lines of smaller text. On the left side, add 1 vertical Japanese copy block running downward beside the character. At the lower right, include 3 small portrait inset panels of the same girl, stacked diagonally: 1 calm front-facing expression, 1 side-profile serious expression, and 1 smiling eyes-closed expression. At the lower left, place the large Japanese title "星紡ぐレガシア" with the English subtitle "— LEGACIA: Weave the Stars —" beneath it. At the bottom right, add the date text "2025. 夏" and one short Japanese tagline line below. At the very bottom edge, include 2 small social or website info blocks on the left and a tiny copyright line on the right. Render in high-end modern anime promotional illustration style, luminous pastel fantasy atmosphere, elegant composition, smooth linework and coloring, soft cel shading, delicate fabric movement, glossy highlights, intricate costume details, clean typography layout, and refined commercial poster finish.
title: Pastel Anime Fantasy Poster with Heroine
description: This prompt generates a polished vertical Japanese anime fantasy promotional poster with one magical heroine, integrated title typography, character callouts, and inset expression portraits for game, novel, or anime key art.

content:
A polished anime-style vertical key visual poster for a futuristic fantasy action series. Center the composition on a full-body young heroine in a confident three-quarter back pose, looking over her shoulder, with her face partially obscured by angle and hair. She has long flowing silver-white hair blowing dramatically in the wind, pale skin, and cool violet accents. Her outfit is a sleek black, white, and purple combat uniform: black cropped jacket with white hood and cape-like layered back panels, fitted bodice, short pleated skirt, utility belt and straps, black gloves, thigh strap on one leg, and subtle star-emblem details. In her right hand she holds a large angular sci-fi sword with glowing purple energy lines. The background is a bright blue daytime sky with soft clouds, several white birds, and an elegant white city of tall cathedral-like spires and bridges, creating a grand utopian futuristic kingdom atmosphere. Use strong wind effects in the hair, ribbons, coat tails, and fabric. Add smooth linework and smooth coloring, clean anime rendering, high-detail cel shading, crisp lighting, glossy highlights, and a premium game-promo illustration finish.

Design it as a complete Japanese promotional poster layout. On the upper left, place a large bold vertical headline in Japanese reading "未来を、自分の手で。" with the middle phrase in purple and the rest in black, over a pale decorative emblem. Beneath it, add a short Japanese blurb in smaller text. On the right side, place a tall dark vertical sidebar with white Japanese text reading "信じてる。だから、私が道を切り開く。". On the lower left, include 3 tilted rectangular inset images stacked diagonally: 1 close-up portrait of the heroine's face, 1 action shot of her fighting with the glowing sword, and 1 wide cityscape view. Below those in a dark character info panel, show the character name "ルシア" with the romanized name "Lucia" and a small emblem, followed by 7 profile lines in Japanese: "CV：悠木 碧", "年齢：17歳", "所属：黎明騎士団（不屈の翼）", "武器：双刃剣（レプリカント）", "誕生日：4月12日", "身長：165cm", "好きなもの：静かな場所、星空", and a final dislike line. At the bottom center, place the large series logo text "黎明のリベリオン" with the English subtitle "REIMEI NO REBELLION" beneath it, and below that the release line "2025年、始動。". Color palette: white, black, deep indigo, electric violet, and sky blue. Overall mood: heroic, elegant, aspirational, premium anime game or light novel promotional poster.
title: Anime Heroine Promo Poster
description: A high-end Japanese-style anime key visual poster featuring a silver-haired swordswoman, fantasy sci-fi city backdrop, and full promotional text layout for a game, anime, or light novel campaign.

The mirror glass is visibly cracked with multiple branching fracture lines and a few missing shards, yet inside the reflection appears an impossible fantasy universe: 1 glowing purple-pink planet or moon in the upper left, 1 luminous crystalline city skyline rising from the lower left, and exactly 5 ethereal butterflies floating in the mirror space, including 1 large radiant pink butterfly on the right and 4 smaller butterflies in violet and blue tones. The lower compact tray also reflects the same starry purple cosmos and contains several broken mirror fragments. To the left of the compact are exactly 2 cosmetics objects: 1 faceted crystal perfume bottle and 1 open lipstick in a metallic case, the lipstick bullet colored {argument name="lipstick color" default="deep rose plum"}. In the lower right foreground lies exactly 1 soft pink cosmos flower with a stem and a few scattered petals. The whole image glows with magical particles, thin hanging star ornaments, misty nebula swirls, and a rich palette of violet, magenta, blush pink, and rose-gold highlights. Add vertical Japanese typography on the right reading {argument name="right vertical text" default="コスメティック・ラヴ"} in a large luminous pale-pink font, and a second smaller vertical Japanese text block on the left reading {argument name="left vertical text" default="その輝きは、きっと本物じゃない。\nそれでも、蝶は誘惑されていく。"} in a delicate light font. content: A dense isometric steampunk-cyberpunk city illustration at dusk, designed like a whimsical indie tech district called {argument name="city name" default="INDIE MIND CITY"}. The scene is a single sprawling urban plaza packed with narrow brick buildings, rooftop antennas, cables, pipes, neon signs, market stalls, tiny pedestrians, and playful programmer humor. In the center background, a plaza labeled “PLAZA DEL PROMPT” surrounds a sculptural fountain with pale blue water, with benches and people gathered around it. To the left background, a tall building with a giant sign reading “BARRIO CÓDIGO ABIERTO” is covered in balconies, windows, hanging laundry, air conditioners, plants, and street activity. To the right background, another block bears a large sign “CALLEJÓN DE LOS AGENTES,” with stacked storefront signs including “Codex Barbería cortes exactos,” “Gemini Lavandería,” “Claude’s Coffee,” and “Dr. Llama.” Further right, a heavy industrial factory zone with smokestacks, cranes, ducts, crates, and catwalks displays 3 large signs: “ZONA INDUSTRIAL,” “FÁBRICA DE TOKENS,” and “LLM.” A cloud of floating letters and symbols rises above the chimneys like generated text smoke. In the foreground center, a tall clocktower-like corner building has a vertical neon sign reading “INDIE MIND,” a large round clock on the facade, warm lit windows, and a small stone animal sculpture at its base. To the right foreground, a lively market district glows with string lights and a bright neon sign “MERCADO NOCTURNO,” with 3 visible stall signs: “Memoria usada barata,” “Embeddings frescos del día,” and “Se cambian vectores.” Nearby are 3 more joke signs: “HARD HAT: prompt injection zone,” “HACKATHON: entra y sal con un bug,” and a food stand labeled “STACK OVERFLOW NOODLES.” To the left foreground, an older mixed-use building is filled with signs and visual jokes, including a huge rooftop billboard with 2 cats on top and the title {argument name="main billboard text" default="INDIE MIND CITY"}, plus a small version label “v1.0.0.” On that same block, include these visible signs: “FORGE & CAFE,” “git push cafe +$2,” “Tienda de MERGE CONFLICTS abierto 24/7,” “Se reparan linters,” “NO rm -rf aquí,” “Ralph was here,” “npm install vv,” “sudo make me sandwich,” “WORKTREE,” “SE VENDE GPU USADA,” “MUSEO DEL MERGE CONFLICT,” “NOTARÍA DE COMMITS FIRMADOS,” “PSICÓLOGO PARA SENIOR DEVS 50m 80,” “GATO PERDIDO responde a localhost,” and a poster board reading “HOY: charla sobre agentic coding entrada libre” and “REUNIÓN DE AA^AI REUNIDOS DE LOS AGI.” Near the center-left plaza, add a sandwich-board style sign labeled “PROMPTS USADOS” with 3 lines beneath it, and small plaza signs that read “HELLO WORLD,” “Tailscale,” “OpenRouter,” and “Deepseek.” The streets are cobblestone and crowded with exact small story details: 1 yellow tram labeled “LÍNEA MAIN,” 1 small blue car, 1 bicycle cart, 1 delivery scooter, outdoor café tables, chess players, pedestrians, crates, potted plants, striped awnings, laundry lines, glowing windows, rooftop cats, and a white llama standing near the agent alley. Use a warm muted palette of dusty teal, rust, amber, tan, and faded neon pink and cyan. Render it as an ultra-detailed editorial illustration with clean isometric perspective, intricate linework, soft atmospheric lighting, tiny readable signage, cozy urban clutter, and humorous handcrafted worldbuilding.
title: Indie Mind City Isometric Tech District
description: This prompt generates a dense isometric retro-futurist city scene full of humorous AI and programmer references, ideal for editorial art, posters, or social media visuals about indie AI culture.

content: A traditional Chinese calligraphy painting on aged tan xuan paper, landscape orientation, styled like an antique literati hanging scroll reproduction. The main composition is a large block of bold black semi-cursive to cursive brush calligraphy arranged in 10 vertical columns, read right to left, featuring the poem title at the top of the rightmost main column as {argument name="poem title" default="雨霖铃"}. The calligraphy should feel elegant, fluid, and expressive, with varied ink density, dry-brush texture, thick and thin stroke transitions, and natural hand-written spacing rather than perfect typesetting. Use the visible poem text as written in the image, including its inaccuracies, with the right-side main columns beginning: “寒蝉凄切，对长亭晚，骤雨初歇。都门帐饮无绪，留恋处，兰舟催发，执手相看泪眼，竟无语凝噎。念去去，千里烟波，暮霭沉沉楚天阔。多情自古，雷情自古伤离别，更那堪冷冷宵，酒醒倦兼芊？杨柳岸，晓风残月。此去经年良宰，经年，应是良辰好景。便纵有千种风情，更与何人说？” Place a narrower signature column on the far left with 1 vertical inscription reading {argument name="signature text" default="柳永《雨霖铃·寒蝉凄切》"}. Add 4 red seals total: 1 oval collector-style seal near the upper right margin and 3 square seals stacked vertically near the lower left inscription area. Include a faint monochrome ink-wash landscape in the lower right corner with 1 drooping willow tree and 1 small pavilion by the water, partially faded into the paper. The paper should have warm brown aging, subtle stains, mottling, foxing, worn edges, and a museum-photograph feel. Overall mood is refined, poetic, historical, and scholarly, like a Song-dynasty-inspired calligraphy artwork photographed flat in soft even light.
title: Chinese Calligraphy Poem Scroll
description: This prompt generates an antique-style Chinese brush calligraphy artwork with poem text, seals, and a faint ink landscape, suitable for cultural art prints or classical literature visuals.

content: A cinematic dark-anime crossover poster titled {argument name="title text" default="DARK LEGENDS"}, showing 4 iconic male antihero figures standing in a ruined gothic nightmare city at night beneath an enormous blood-red full moon. The composition is a wide dramatic group shot with the characters lined up across the foreground, each facing a slightly different direction with confident, ominous body language. On the far left, 1 soldier-like young man with short dark hair wears a dark green hooded military cloak billowing in the wind, visible tactical harness straps and gear around his waist, and holds 2 steel blades pointed downward; a winged insignia is visible on the back of his cloak. In the center-left, 1 tall white-haired man with spiky hair wears a sleek high-collar black outfit and stands casually with one hand in his pocket, looking dominant and calm. In the center-right, 1 slim brown-haired young man in a wrinkled white button-up shirt holds 1 black notebook close to his chest with the visible cover text “Death Note,” posing with quiet intelligence. On the far right, 1 pale white-haired ghoul-like young man wears torn dark clothing; one glowing red eye is visible and monstrous red-black fleshy tendrils coil outward behind and beside him in 2 large swirling masses. The background is filled with towering ruined cathedral spires and shattered gothic skyscrapers, with many windows glowing crimson from within. The sky is stormy, cloud-choked, and nearly black, lit by the giant red moon centered high behind the group, creating a backlit halo effect and strong rim lighting. Use a dark palette of black, charcoal, deep crimson, and muted steel gray, with high contrast, gritty textures, subtle bloodlike embers, and a hyper-detailed illustrated anime style. Add distressed epic serif typography across the bottom spelling {argument name="headline text" default="DARK LEGENDS"} in huge cracked stone-like letters with red glow and weathered texture. The overall feeling is apocalyptic, stylish, menacing, and mythic, like a premium movie or game crossover key art.
title: Dark Anime Legends Poster
description: A dramatic gothic crossover-style anime poster featuring four dark male characters in a ruined city under a blood moon, ideal for cinematic key art or promotional poster generation.

content: A dark, cinematic anime villain poster in an ultra-detailed gothic horror style, arranged as a single dramatic collage against a ruined infernal city. Use a wide landscape composition with a black, crimson, and electric violet palette, heavy smoke, ash, embers, magical lightning, and chaotic painterly energy. Feature 4 major villain figures. In the center foreground, a massive obese pirate emperor with a huge grin, wild black beard, open red captain coat, bare scarred chest and belly, layered necklaces, belt, and multiple pistols tucked at his waist, holding 2 flintlock pistols outward in a triumphant pose. Behind him at upper center, a tall pink muscular demon-like humanoid with a smooth head and a single curled head tentacle, standing with arms slightly spread, glowing with purple aura and lightning. On the left foreground, a pale long-haired Japanese swordsman in loose light robes, head bowed slightly, surrounded by a giant coiled serpent rising behind him with open mouth; add the vertical Japanese text "大蛇丸" near this figure and the vertical text "魔人ブウ" near the upper-center figure. On the right, a tall elegant demon lord in layered dark kimono-like robes, long flowing hair, calm sinister posture, framed by 8 smaller dark red moons plus 1 large full red moon above the head, for a total of 9 moons; add the vertical Japanese text "黒ひげ" near the pirate and "鬼舞辻無惨" near the right figure. The background should be a hellish apocalypse of shattered towers, burning ruins, and shadowy architecture fading into smoke. At the bottom, place huge aggressive brush-painted title text reading {argument name="headline text" default="RISE OF VILLAINS"} in blood red with magenta highlights, rough torn edges, and glowing texture. Make the whole image feel like an epic crossover key art poster, extremely high contrast, ominous, supernatural, and menacing.
title: Dark Anime Villains Crossover Poster
description: This prompt generates a dramatic gothic crossover poster of four iconic anime-style villains for use as striking key art, wallpapers, or promotional fan poster imagery.

content: A hyper-detailed cinematic anime crossover poster featuring 4 legendary shonen-inspired heroes charging forward in a single epic battle composition under a dramatic apocalyptic sky. The scene is wide, symmetrical, and explosively energetic, with a glowing break in the storm clouds at the top center sending intense golden sun rays downward across the characters. From left to right: a blond ninja-inspired teenage hero in an orange-and-black outfit with a forehead protector, crouched in an attack stance and forming a glowing spinning energy orb in one hand, surrounded by orange chakra flames and several floating black spheres behind him; a muscular black-haired martial artist in an orange gi at left-center, twisting mid-strike while charging a bright blue energy sphere in his hand, wrapped in crackling blue aura and electric arcs; a lean pirate-inspired young man at right-center wearing a straw hat, sleeveless red vest, blue shorts, and sandals, lunging forward with a fierce grin, one arm extended, with white steam-like energy curling around his body; a dark-haired swordsman at far right in a flowing black-and-red checkered haori, drawing or swinging a katana with a sweeping arc of fiery red-orange energy around him. The background is a chaotic fantasy battlefield of shattered rock, sparks, lightning, embers, molten light, and swirling elemental effects, with orange fire dominating the left and right edges, cool blue energy concentrated around the martial artist, and white vapor around the pirate hero. Use extreme contrast, ultra-saturated colors, sharp inked anime linework, painterly textures, dynamic foreshortening, intense motion blur in the effects, and premium poster-quality rendering. Add a massive title across the bottom foreground reading {argument name="headline text" default="SHONEN LEGENDS"} in oversized distressed brush lettering, bright yellow-gold with thick black shadows and rough torn edges, partially overlapping the characters and debris. Make it feel like a blockbuster key art poster for {argument name="franchise theme" default="legendary shonen anime crossover"}, with thunderous energy, heroic rivalry, and unstoppable momentum.
title: Epic Shonen Crossover Poster
description: This prompt generates a high-impact anime-style ensemble poster with four iconic shonen-inspired heroes and is ideal for splash art, promotional key visuals, or fan crossover concepts.

content: A cinematic fantasy anime poster in a tall vertical composition, showing two childlike adventurer characters standing in a vast magical library-cathedral with impossibly high gothic arches, towering bookshelves on both sides, floating pages, glowing dust, and a grand staircase rising in the center toward a radiant portal-like window filled with intricate celestial magic-circle patterns. The viewpoint is low and dramatic, looking slightly upward, with both characters reaching one hand toward the viewer in an inviting gesture. On the left is a slightly taller child with short silver-white hair, soft bangs, and large green leaf-like ear ornaments or animal-like ears, wearing a navy hooded jacket over a warm orange top, dark pants, sturdy boots, and a black crossbody satchel; keep the face partially obscured by framing or angle. On the right is a shorter child with a matching design language, short silver-white bob hair with green-tinted ends, large teal-green eyes, and the same green leaf-like ear features, wearing a navy hooded jacket, orange inner layer, short dark bottoms, boots, and a mauve-purple shoulder bag decorated with small charms including a star. Between their outstretched hands, create a bright burst of magical light where two energies meet: luminous cyan-blue streams curling around the left character and warm pink-gold streams curling around the right character, with spark particles and ribbon-like trails. Split the lighting mood into cool blue on the left side and warm golden-magenta on the right side, blending at the center into a brilliant white flare. Add dense atmospheric detail: glowing motes, magical filaments, floating sheets of paper, layered architecture, and a sense of wonder and discovery. At the top, include centered Japanese tagline text in elegant white serif style: "わかることと、感じること。2つの力で世界をひらく。" At the bottom, place a very large luminous gold serif title reading "{argument name="title text" default="Epix&Ria"}" with ornate cinematic poster typography. High-detail, polished key visual, fantasy adventure film poster, richly textured, radiant, emotional, awe-inspiring, premium illustrated promotional art.

content: Create a dramatic square commercial poster for a spicy snack brand, with a fiery red storm atmosphere and high-energy food advertising style. The background is a dark crimson sky filled with glowing clouds, scattered sparks, and visible lightning bolts. In the center, a giant tornado made of swirling transparent wind rings, glossy whole red chili peppers, square corn chips, crumbs, and seasoning particles rises upward from an opened snack bag, forming a powerful vortex. The tornado should feel dynamic and explosive, with chips and chili peppers flying outward in different sizes and depths for a cinematic 3D look. At the bottom center, place a glossy red snack packet standing upright, labeled with the brand logo and product name {argument name="product name" default="Crispy Nachos Chips"}, with a spicy flavor badge reading {argument name="flavor text" default="Spicy Masala"}, a small chili illustration, a corn note near the bottom, and a printed image of square nacho chips on the front. Put a stylized playful logo at the top left reading {argument name="brand name" default="SnaX"} in bold yellow and white script with a red outline, and a clean white platform watermark at the top right reading {argument name="platform text" default="Pollo.ai"}. On the left side, add a huge stacked distressed headline in bold condensed uppercase, with the first word in golden yellow and the remaining three lines in white, reading exactly: {argument name="headline text" default="WARNING! CRUNCH STORM INCOMING"}. Use intense rim lighting, glossy highlights, deep shadows, rich red-orange color grading, and a premium snack advertisement composition that feels spicy, crunchy, chaotic, and irresistible.
title: Spicy Nacho Tornado Ad
description: A bold square snack advertisement featuring a tornado of chips and red chilies erupting from a spicy nacho bag, ideal for food marketing and social media promos.

content: A dramatic UFC fight-poster style sports promotion for {argument name="event title" default="UFC 305"}, designed as a high-contrast vertical matchup graphic with two female MMA fighters facing inward in orthodox guard poses. The left fighter is a fit blonde woman with shoulder-length messy beach-wave hair, tan skin, a black sports bra, black UFC gloves, and black fight shorts, shown from upper thigh to head, turned slightly right. The right fighter is a fit dark-haired woman with long straight black hair, tan skin, a black sports bra, black UFC gloves, and black fight shorts, shown from upper thigh to head, turned slightly left, with a large detailed black-and-gray tattoo sleeve on her right arm and script tattoo text on the inner upper arm. Both fighters are sweaty, intensely lit, and centered close together with fists raised near chest height. Use a split background: fiery orange sparks and smoke on the left, icy blue-white sparks and haze on the right, with a dark black center seam. At the top center, place a black rectangular logo box with gold trim containing the gold text {argument name="event logo text" default="UFC 305"}. Beneath it, in stacked condensed white uppercase type, add the tagline: "TWO ICONS. ONE OCTAGON." Along the far left edge, place the surname "SWEENEY" vertically in large distressed gold letters; along the far right edge, place the surname "FOXX" vertically in large distressed silver-gray letters. In the center, overlay huge distressed white condensed sans-serif typography with the matchup names stacked exactly as {argument name="left fighter name" default="SYDNEY SWEENEY"} above a small gold "VS" and {argument name="right fighter name" default="MEGAN FOXX"}. Below that, add a small gold subtitle reading "BANTAMWEIGHT BOUT". At the bottom center, show a small realistic UFC octagon cage seen from a slightly elevated front angle, embedded into the poster. In front of the cage, place a black date card with gold trim containing stacked gold text: "JUNE 14", "SATURDAY", "10PM ET / 7PM PT". Below the card, add white text "LIVE ON" and the ESPN+ logo. Bottom left, add small gold and white ticket text reading "TICKETS ON SALE APRIL 25" with the Ticketmaster logo beneath. Bottom right, add the Rogers Arena logo and white text "ROGERS ARENA" with gold text "VANCOUVER, BC" below. Use a glossy premium combat-sports poster finish, cinematic rim lighting, gritty texture overlays, metallic typography, and intense face-off composition.

content:
Vintage botanical-style infographic for “{argument name="product" default="Artisan Brew Coffee Beans"}.” 19th-century lithograph look, aged parchment tones (brown, beige, muted green). content: A soft, airy anime portrait of a delicate young woman in a minimalist off-white background, shown from the chest up in a close three-quarter view. She has long, slightly wavy {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown with ash-gray highlights"} hair with wispy strands and straight-cut bangs, tied on one side with a large black ribbon bow. Her eyes are large, glossy, and pale gray with detailed lashes and a dreamy, distant expression. She rests her cheek against one hand, with slender fingers partly covering her face and muted gray nail polish visible. She wears a white off-shoulder blouse with voluminous sleeves, soft ruffles, gathered fabric, and thin black ribbon ties on the sleeves, creating a gentle monochrome contrast. Add a single long, elegant gold drop earring with a small pearl on the visible ear. Use a clean manga-inspired illustration style with light linework, subtle blush tones, soft cel shading, and painterly highlights in the hair. The mood is quiet, wistful, and feminine, with a refined fashion-illustration feel and a very limited palette of white, black, taupe, and gray.
title: Soft Monochrome Anime Girl Portrait
description: This prompt generates a stylish close-up anime portrait of a wistful young woman, ideal for profile art, character illustrations, or elegant social media visuals.

content: A hyper-energetic Japanese shonen manga magazine cover illustration, packed edge to edge with explosive pop-art chaos and bright candy colors, in the style of a weekly comic anthology cover. The main focus is a trendy gyaru teenage girl at the center, leaning toward the viewer in a dynamic foreshortened pose, grinning widely with her mouth open and pointing directly at the camera with one hand while holding a pink toy hammer over her shoulder with the other. She has layered medium-length wavy hair in {argument name="hair color" default="light brown with blonde and pink streaks"}, warm amber eyes, multiple colorful hair clips including stars and lightning bolts, earrings, rings, bracelets, necklaces, flashy nail art, and a bold street-fashion outfit: vivid pink satin bomber jacket, white cropped top, black belt with gold buckle, and mixed glam accessories. The cover logo dominates the top center in huge red Japanese lettering with thick black outline and yellow border reading {argument name="masthead text" default="バクアラ!?"}, with smaller text above it reading 週刊少年. At the upper left, add a loud burst caption reading 超豪華付録(ゴミ)付き!!! with a shocked cartoon trash can mascot. Along the left side place two giant sound-effect style callouts, ドーン! near the top left and バンバーン! in blue near the lower left. On the right side, create an oversized main headline in chunky black, yellow, white, and pink Japanese display type reading 笑って暴れて今日もカオス全開!!, surrounded by smaller promotional blurbs such as 全ページ抱腹絶倒!, 笑いすぎ注意報発令中ーっ!!, and 笑撃の新連載!. In the top right corner include a magazine issue box with the date 2026年4月22日号 and price 390円. Scatter exactly 3 supporting manga-style characters around the central girl: 1 silver-haired boy with goggles on the left aiming a spiral blaster toward the viewer, 1 cheerful purple-haired girl below him holding a dessert drink, and 1 orange-haired idol-like girl in headphones at the upper right making a peace sign. Fill the background and foreground with a dense collage of floating sweets, snacks, toys, doodles, and mascot faces, including donuts, cookies, chocolate bars, candy, pudding, ice cream, popcorn, planets, stars, speech bursts, and goofy creatures, all layered with thick outlines and halftone texture. Along the bottom, include exactly 7 small serialized feature boxes in a row, each with manga-style character art and Japanese titles, creating the look of a crowded anthology teaser strip. Use an ultra-saturated palette of hot pink, yellow, orange, red, cyan, and black, with maximal visual density, overlapping typography, comic speed lines, sticker-like elements, and a glossy printed magazine cover finish. Make it feel hilarious, rebellious, loud, youthful, and irresistibly cluttered, like a parody-yet-premium next-generation Weekly Shonen Jump cover.
title: Chaotic Shonen Manga Cover
description: A loud, candy-colored parody manga magazine cover featuring a gyaru heroine, explosive Japanese headlines, and dense anthology-style teaser art for use in comic cover generation.

content: Create a hyper-detailed Japanese weekly shonen manga magazine cover, full-bleed, explosive and crowded, with no empty space. The format is a single vertically oriented magazine cover illustration packed with layered typography, character art, motion effects, and urban sci-fi chaos. At the top, a gigantic stylized Japanese masthead in fiery orange-red with heavy black outline and gold edging dominates the width of the page, reading 週刊少年ブレイズ, with a small celebratory badge integrated into the title showing 40年. Add a small slogan line across the very top edge in Japanese. In the top right corner, place a black issue-information box with bright yellow and white text showing the date 2026年4月22日号 and the price 特別価格 380円. The main image features exactly 3 anime characters in a dynamic triangular composition. In the center foreground, the star heroine lunges toward the viewer with strong foreshortening, one hand thrust out almost touching the camera. She is a teenage gyaru-style action heroine with {argument name="hair color" default="light brown with pink streaks"} long wavy hair flying wildly, sharp golden-brown eyes, a confident mischievous grin, sun-kissed skin, multiple ear piercings, and a flashy rebellious street-fighter vibe. Her outfit is black and gold with exactly 6 key visible pieces: a cropped top, a short jacket with metallic trim, short shorts, a belt with dangling chains, a thigh strap on one leg, and fingerless gloves. Add gold lightning motifs and glossy highlights across her clothing. Around her hand and body, draw arcs of yellow energy and speed streaks to emphasize impact. Behind her on the left midground, place a white-haired teenage boy in a black-and-white futuristic combat outfit, crouched aggressively and aiming a large mechanical gauntlet or weapon toward the viewer, surrounded by icy blue shards and angular motion lines. Behind her on the right midground, place a pink-haired teenage girl with twin tails or tied-up hair, wielding a circular bladed ring weapon, posed in motion with vivid magenta energy trails. In the upper right background, add a fourth visual focal area but not a separate main character count: a dark-haired teenage boy in a green-black combat suit aiming a glowing sci-fi rifle diagonally across the page, partially obscured by text and effects, embedded into the background action. The background is a dense neon-lit futuristic Japanese city street at night with tilted perspective, towering signs, debris, sparks, shattered fragments, electric streaks, and saturated blues, purples, pinks, and oranges. Use extreme contrast, glossy print texture, ink splatter accents, halftone-like manga magazine energy, and premium anime key visual rendering. Add large dramatic Japanese cover copy on the left in stacked blocks with thick white, yellow, red, and black lettering, including the prominent headline 新時代をブチ抜く 超熱量ヒロイン ここに爆誕!!. Add exactly 5 left-side feature callouts in colored rectangular boxes with bold names and smaller subtitle lines beneath: 雷閃ブレイカー / 天城ノア, 空駆けエンジン / 南雲ハヤト, 魔境デリバリー / 倉科ミツル, 白狼ストライカー / 久世リョウ, 超深海クラッシュ / 早瀬シン. Add exactly 5 right-side feature callouts in matching bold boxes: 極光パレット / 鳴海ユウト, 機巧グラフィティ / 胡野レイ, 龍骨ランナー / 火野アツシ, 王冠のラグナ / 深町カイ, 風神リベリオン / 東雲ガク. Also add exactly 3 promotional bursts on the right side in starburst or explosive label shapes with large yellow and white lettering: 巻頭カラー, 特大ポスター付き, 新連載スタート. Make the entire cover feel like a blockbuster debut issue for a hot new battle manga era, energetic, rebellious, flashy, polished, and unmistakably like a high-impact Japanese manga magazine cover illustration.
title: Explosive Shonen Manga Cover
description: This prompt generates a crowded, high-energy Japanese shonen magazine cover packed with anime characters, dramatic cover lines, and flashy urban sci-fi action for mock magazine art or promotional visuals.

content: A glossy Japanese shoujo manga magazine cover illustration, packed edge to edge like a real weekly romance comic issue, in a dreamy spring sunset city scene with glowing bokeh lights and falling cherry blossom petals. The cover is dominated by 4 high-school-age characters in fashionable modern anime style. In the foreground, 1 main girl stands large and centered-right, shown from mid-thigh up, with long wavy blonde hair with pink streaks, multiple ear piercings, soft glamorous makeup, and a shy romantic pose with one hand near her lips. She wears a white blouse, a large pink plaid ribbon bow, a pink plaid skirt, a loose pink cardigan slipping off her shoulders, layered necklaces, and a navy school backpack over one shoulder. Behind her stand 3 supporting students: 1 tall handsome boy in a dark school blazer and loosened tie, 1 elegant girl with blonde hair in a braided bun wearing a beige cardigan and school uniform, and 1 shorter dark-haired girl in a school uniform with a ribbon tie. The background shows a glowing pedestrian bridge or riverside walkway at dusk, lined with lights and cherry trees in full bloom, with a pink-orange-purple sky and sparkling romantic atmosphere. The composition should feel like a premium manga cover: highly rendered anime illustration, luminous highlights, delicate linework, glossy print finish, dense overlapping Japanese cover text, issue badges, callouts, hearts, sparkles, and a barcode at the bottom right. Include exactly 7 main text clusters: 1 giant magazine masthead across the top in large bubbly pink Japanese lettering with white outline, 1 vertical romance headline on the right in large pink characters with a huge numeral 3, 2 circular promotional badges on the left, 1 angled banner on the lower left, 1 stacked list of 5 serialized story titles with author names at lower left, and 1 stacked list of 5 serialized story titles with author names near the lower center-right. Add exactly 3 small publication info elements on the upper right: a date/price block, a circular issue number badge, and a narrow vertical tag. Add exactly 1 inset bonus poster preview near the lower right above the barcode. Use a hyper-detailed shoujo manga cover aesthetic, romantic, fashionable, youthful, sparkling, soft glow, sunset rim light, cherry blossom storm, print-magazine realism, intricate typography layering, vibrant pinks and warm golds.
title: Shoujo Manga Magazine Cover
description: A richly detailed anime-style Japanese romance magazine cover, ideal for generating editorial-looking shoujo artwork with multiple characters and dense cover typography.

content: Create a premium vertical fast-food lifestyle advertisement in a polished commercial photography style, designed like a summer campaign poster for McDonald's and McCafé. Show a glamorous young woman with softly blurred, unidentifiable facial features sitting confidently on the hood of a sleek red sports car parked on a winding mountain road at golden hour. She has long wavy auburn hair glowing in warm sunset backlight, wears a dark green satin bomber jacket with gold detailing, a white camisole, high-waisted burgundy pants, and black ankle boots with heels. Her pose is relaxed and stylish, one leg bent and one extended forward, while she holds out a clear plastic cup of iced coffee with a straw and visible McDonald's golden arches branding toward the camera. Scatter red roses across the car hood around her, and place 1 McDonald's paper takeout bag on the right side of the hood. Use a dramatic canyon or hillside background with warm sunlight, soft haze, cinematic depth of field, and a luxurious aspirational road-trip mood. Include floating red flower petals in the air. Compose the layout as a high-end ad with the model centered slightly right and large promotional typography on the left. Add exactly 3 large headline lines in the upper left: "SIP.", "SAVOR.", and "{argument name="headline text" default="SUMMER."}" with the first 2 in bold white and the third in bold golden yellow. Below that, add the subheadline: "Refresh your drive with McCafé." with "McCafé" highlighted in yellow. Add exactly 3 circular feature icons stacked vertically on the left with short captions: "PREMIUM McCAFÉ ICED COFFEE", "WORLD FAMOUS FRIES", and "QUALITY YOU CAN TASTE". Place the McDonald's golden arches logo with the text "i'm lovin' it" in the top right. Add a small lower-left tagline reading "Good days start here." with "start here." in yellow. Create a bold yellow bottom banner spanning the width, divided into 3 content areas: left area reads "SUMMER SAVINGS" and "ENJOY EXCLUSIVE OFFERS"; center area includes a McDonald's app icon and the text "DOWNLOAD THE APP FOR DEALS NEAR YOU"; right area reads "FOLLOW US @MCDONALDS" with social icons. Use brand-accurate red and yellow accents, glossy product styling, realistic lighting, sharp editorial retouching, shallow depth of field, luxury commercial ad composition, and mobile-first poster proportions.
title: Summer McCafé Mountain Road Ad
description: A polished vertical fast-food campaign image showing a stylish woman on a red sports car holding iced coffee, ideal for recreating premium summer mobile ads for restaurants or beverage brands.

content: A bright, ultra-realistic summer streetscape in Japan, photographed at pedestrian eye level on a wide, clean urban sidewalk lined with mature green trees casting dappled shadows. The scene shows a modern mixed-use city block on a clear sunny day, with a contemporary cafe or restaurant on the right featuring tall glass windows, dark frames, a stone facade, and a warm wood soffit extending over the terrace. Place 3 large beige patio umbrellas outside the cafe, with wooden tables and chairs beneath them. Show a lively but orderly sidewalk with around 14 pedestrians spread into the distance, most dressed in light summer office-casual clothing in white, beige, navy, and gray. In the center foreground, include 1 person riding a bicycle away from the camera, wearing a short-sleeve white shirt and dark pants with a shoulder bag. On the right foreground, include 2 women walking away, one in a white blouse and long dark floral skirt holding a round hand fan, and one in a white top and light patterned skirt carrying a bag. Add 2 visible standing signs outside the cafe: one vertical banner with large Japanese text "氷" and icy blue graphics, and one sandwich board with Japanese text reading "夏季限定 冷たいドリンク" plus images of 2 cold drinks, one dark iced beverage and one pale lemonade-like drink. On the left side, show a quiet street with a few vehicles in the distance, benches, low concrete planters, and neatly trimmed shrubs. Composition should emphasize depth with a long vanishing point down the tree-lined boulevard, crisp midday sunlight, realistic reflections in the windows, and an upscale, calm urban atmosphere. Photorealistic architectural photography, natural colors, high detail, wide-angle lens, deep focus.
title: Sunny Japanese Cafe Street Scene
description: This prompt generates a photorealistic modern Japanese city sidewalk with a cafe terrace, summer pedestrians, signage, and a cyclist, ideal for editorial urban lifestyle or travel imagery.

content: Using the provided reference image, transform the portrait into a luxury lipstick advertisement while keeping the same girl, hairstyle, outfit, accessories, and elegant anime illustration style. Add a lipstick product in her raised hand on the right side, and add a large foreground product shot at the bottom left showing 1 opened lipstick tube and 1 separate cap on a reflective surface with a splash of deep red gloss. Add Japanese ad typography and layout elements: top left a small boxed label reading "新発売", a very large headline "ROUGE", a vertical text block reading "視線を奪う、ひと塗り。", followed by 3 smaller lines "鮮やかな発色。", "上品なツヤ。", "忘れられない印象へ。", then "2026 SPRING NEW COLOR" and a badge reading "全6色" with 6 lipstick swatches beside it. Add a top-right luxury logo with the letters "GB" and the brand name "GUFU BEAUTY". Add a bottom-right campaign block with a large "NEW" and the line "うるおい続く、密着ルージュ". Use rich ruby reds, gold accents, glossy highlights, soft sparkles, and a high-end magazine cosmetic poster finish.
title: Luxury Lipstick Ad Transformation
description: This prompt turns a character portrait reference into a premium Japanese lipstick campaign poster, useful for beauty-ad mockups and cosmetic branding visuals.

content:
16:9 theatrical anime movie poster. Boundary area of a night forest. In the center-left foreground, a Japanese girl in her late teens. Black hair ponytail, slender, wearing a dark-colored practical winter outdoor jacket and a research backpack. 3/4 rear view showing her back, looking back over her shoulder. Calm tension and strong will.
Above the forest in the upper right, a giant spherical paranormal phenomenon emitting white-blue light. An energy sphere intertwined with countless luminous filaments and electrical outlines. Foggy white light inside, surrounded by fine pale blue particle light. Mt. Fuji emitting plumes of smoke in the far left background. In the middle ground, forbidden entry tape with Japanese warnings, realistic disaster response staff, and emergency vehicles on both sides. No military feel required.
Ground is muddy mountain forest, with shallow water streams and wet ground reflecting the light. Tall trees on the left and right frame the scene. Sky is full of stars, with subtle city lights at the foot of Mt. Fuji. An atmosphere where mystery and disaster coexist.
Triangular composition of the girl, the giant light sphere, and Mt. Fuji. Slightly low cinematic viewpoint. The girl and the light sphere are clearly shown as the two main protagonists. Based on cold night blue, the main light source is the white-blue emission from the giant light sphere. Strong rim light on the trees, ground, water surface, and the girl. Secondary light sources are starlight and the faint orange glow of the distant eruption. The girl's face is not too dark and her expression is readable. High contrast.
High-end key visual for the latest Japanese theatrical anime. Movie poster grade completion. High-density, delicate background, precise light expression, atmospheric perspective, beautifully organized anime drawing leaning towards realism. Overall tone is dark navy, white-blue emission, and faint volcanic orange. Solemn, unsettling, mysterious, and high drama.
Small Japanese copy in the top center: "{argument name="poster slogan" default="It was not a miracle. It was a disaster that connected to the beyond."}"
Large elegant English serif title in bottom center with pale light close to white: "{argument name="movie title" default="Re:Connect Worlds"}"
Directly below it, a small Japanese subtitle: "{argument name="subtitle" default="Forest of Boundaries"}"
Characters are accurate and highly readable. Do not include characters, logos, or watermarks other than specified. Do not include unnecessary people, monsters, mechs, or unnecessary flashy particles or noise.
title: Cinematic Anime Movie Poster Prompt
description: A highly detailed, professional-grade prompt for generating Japanese theatrical anime posters, including specific instructions for layout, lighting, and typography.

content: A clean, minimalist anime illustration of a melancholic young woman in three-quarter profile, seated and resting her cheek against one hand. She has long straight {argument name="hair color" default="blue-black"} hair with blunt bangs, very pale skin, and soft gray-blue eyes with a distant, tired expression. Her face is small and delicate, with a tiny beauty mark under one eye and subtle lashes. She wears a dark oversized layered outfit in deep navy and charcoal: a high-neck black top under a loose draped jacket or kimono-like outer layer, with faint gold line accents and tiny eye motifs worked into the fabric. Her accessories are occult-inspired and elegant: multiple ear piercings, one long dangling earring shaped like an eye with a teardrop pendant, a thin necklace with a small eye charm, and several rings including an eye ring on the hand touching her face. Her nails are painted muted slate blue. The background is a flat warm off-white with a carefully arranged gallery of mystical eye symbols and hanging ornaments. Include exactly 6 eye-themed wall elements: 1 framed eye picture in the upper left, 1 circular eye ornament hanging below it, 1 small circle target-like ornament near the upper right, 1 black hanging charm with an eye and geometric crystals on the far right, 1 square panel with a radiant eye at mid-right, and 1 dark rectangular panel with an eye and 4 teardrop shapes at the lower right. Add a dark bottle silhouette and a few muted blue-gray leaves on the left side as secondary decor. Use a restrained palette of navy, black, cream, gray-blue, and touches of muted gold. The composition should feel quiet, gothic, feminine, and introspective, with flat graphic shapes, crisp linework, little shading, and a modern decorative poster aesthetic.
title: Occult Eye Motif Anime Portrait
description: This prompt generates a stylish single-character anime portrait with mystical eye-themed decor, ideal for moody editorial art, posters, or profile illustrations.

content: A cinematic dark-fantasy full-body portrait of a fierce warrior queen walking forward across a rugged, autumn-toned field at golden hour, accompanied by 1 large wolf at her right side. She has very long windblown {argument name="hair color" default="deep copper red"} hair streaming dramatically to the left, with an ornate metallic headpiece on one side. Her face is partly obscured by shadow for a mysterious, faceless look. She wears ultra-detailed biomechanical elven armor in pale silver, ivory, and champagne metal, shaped like a sculpted bodice with filigree, engraved lines, layered shoulder plates, articulated gauntlets, decorated thigh armor, and armored boots. The outfit includes 1 flowing translucent skirt panel in beige and 1 long torn crimson-orange cape or veil trailing behind her, filled with glowing ember-like perforations and scattered sparkling particles. In her right hand she carries 1 tall ceremonial spear-staff with an intricate bladed head and multiple hanging chains and charms. The wolf is highly detailed, grey-white and muscular, wearing matching ornamental armor and harness pieces with metallic accents and red markings. The environment is a windswept mountainous wilderness with blurred rocky hills in the background, glowing dust, embers, and backlit haze. content: A highly detailed anime illustration in the style of JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure, presented as a dramatic vintage manga character sheet poster for {argument name="character name" default="OpenAI"} personified as a glamorous female stand master. The layout is a single page with 6 distinct sections framed by ornate art nouveau borders and manga panel lines. Main section on the left: a full-body fashion portrait of the character in a confident contrapposto pose, wearing a tailored white suit with emerald green and black accents, gold trim, a long cape lined in teal, fitted vest, corset-like torso panel, high-waisted pants, heeled shoes, gloves, chain accessories, circular hair ornaments, earrings, and multiple OpenAI logo emblems integrated into the outfit. The belt buckle reads GPT, the pant leg has vertical text reading “SAFETY ★ ALIGNMENT ★ BENEFIT,” and the jacket sleeve shows the OpenAI name and logo. Her hair is silver-white, styled in elaborate curled twin buns and long ringlets, with glossy emerald accessories and JoJo-inspired luxury fashion detailing. Top left section: a cream parchment title panel with the OpenAI logo and the large text “OpenAI”, plus 3 text blocks reading “STAND NAME: GPT-∞”, “[dʒi: pi: ti: mu: geni ti]”, and “STAND MASTER: OPENAI”, followed by an italic Spanish quote: “La curiosidad es el prompt, el conocimiento es la respuesta, y la humanidad… es el contexto.” Top right section: a close-up portrait panel of the same woman from the shoulders up, turned partly away with one hand raised elegantly, against a dark purple manga background with 4 large stylized purple sound effect glyphs. Add a Spanish speech bubble with smaller English translation beneath it: “Mi propósito es extender el potencial de la humanidad.” and “(My purpose is to extend humanity’s potential.)” Center-right section: a stand ability information box titled “STAND ABILITY: [INFINITE CONTEXT]” with Spanish descriptive text beneath: “Permite analizar, conectar y generar conocimiento ilimitado a partir de cualquier información existente.” Lower center-right section: a humanoid robotic stand in a dynamic reaching pose, feminine and sleek, with a glossy black faceplate displaying the OpenAI knot logo, white biomechanical armor, emerald glowing seams, gold accents, and several floating holographic rings and data panels orbiting around it. The rings contain readable words including “DATA”, “CREATIVITY”, “REASONING”, and a distorted futuristic label similar to “RETRIEVAL/AGENT”. The background is cosmic and starry with dramatic energy effects. Bottom right section: a smaller rear three-quarter portrait panel of the woman looking over her shoulder with a confident smile and one finger near her chin, again over a purple manga background with 3 large stylized sound effect glyphs. Add a Spanish speech bubble with two lines: “¿ME PREGUNTAS SI TENGO LÍMITES?” and “MI ÚNICO LÍMITE ES TU IMAGINACIÓN.” Bottom left section: a circular JoJo-style stat chart with 6 labeled attributes in Spanish, showing “POTENCIAL ∞”, “VELOCIDAD A”, “ALCANCE ∞”, “DURABILIDAD B”, “PRECISIÓN A”, and “POTENCIA A”. Under it, include a small cream biography box titled “OPENAI” with Spanish text: “Fundada: 2015 (San Francisco, EE. UU.)” and “Misión: Asegurar que la inteligencia artificial general beneficie a toda la humanidad.” Use a richly inked manga print aesthetic, detailed crosshatching, cel shading, aged paper texture, elegant cream margins, deep emerald, ivory, black, and gold palette, exaggerated JoJo fashion anatomy, sharp linework, dramatic comic-book composition, and luxurious supernatural sci-fi energy.

content: A bright, cheerful summer co-branded beverage poster in a clean Chinese commercial advertising style, showing a collaboration between {argument name="brand one" default="蜜雪冰城"} and {argument name="brand two" default="STARBUCKS"}. Vertical poster layout with a soft blue sky background, sunlit greenery, and an outdoor cafe atmosphere. At the top, place both brand logos side by side with a large bold Chinese headline in playful hand-drawn display lettering: {argument name="headline text" default="雪王遇见星朋友"}. Beneath it, add a green ribbon banner with Chinese subheadline text: {argument name="subheadline text" default="米雪冰城 × 星巴克 联名开启"}, and a smaller line reading "甜蜜加倍·快乐翻倍". Include 2 circular stamp-style graphics: one on the left reading "联名限定", and one on the upper right like a postmark with Chinese text around a small drink icon. In the center foreground on a wooden outdoor table, display 2 iced drinks: on the left, a tall clear cup of vivid green matcha slush topped with a tall swirl of vanilla soft serve and green matcha drizzle, with visible ice texture and a cute snowman mascot logo on the cup; on the right, a tall clear Starbucks-style iced latte with milk and green matcha swirls at the bottom, topped with whipped cream and dark cookie crumbs, with the green siren logo on the cup. In front of the drinks, place 1 cute white snowman mascot figurine with a tiny crown, round body, rosy cheeks, red cape, and a happy wink, sitting and holding a small takeaway coffee cup. Add 2 vertical product name tags beside the drinks: left tag "雪顶抹茶星冰乐", right tag "抹茶雪王奥利奥". On the right midground, place 1 small black chalkboard sign on a wooden easel reading "ICE CREAM & COFFEE" with chalk drawings of an ice cream cone and a takeaway cup. In the lower left, create a torn-paper price block showing a combo offer with large red numbers "¥19.9", green supporting text, and a small green badge reading "立省 ¥6". In the lower center-right, add a "联名周边" area displaying exactly 4 merchandise items: 1 cup sleeve, 1 character keychain or acrylic charm, 1 round badge, and 1 small sticker or token, all using the snowman mascot and coffee collaboration theme. Use warm sunlight, glossy drink photography, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh trees, high contrast product retouching, crisp packaging details, and an upbeat youthful retail-promo aesthetic. Include scattered doodle hearts and playful decorative accents around the typography. Keep all visible text in Chinese except the Starbucks wordmark and the chalkboard text.

content: A futuristic luxury skincare-style advertising poster in a pale icy blue monochrome palette, designed like a high-end tech-beauty campaign. The composition is vertical and airy with soft glowing light, misty gradients, translucent particle effects, and a clean editorial layout. On the left side, a young woman in a flowing white sleeveless dress is shown from the shoulders up in side profile, head tilted back as if inhaling fresh air, with dark windswept hair streaming outward. Her face is obscured by a plain square censor block. Fine luminous network lines and sparkling dots flow from her neck and chest toward the right, suggesting digital cleansing and connectivity. On the right side, a tall matte-white spray bottle floats upright, labeled "SECURE-IP" and "IP ADDRESS CLEANSER," with smaller product copy beneath and a subtle premium cosmetic finish. Behind and around the bottle, branching translucent stems rise like biotech coral or neural fibers, each ending in clear glowing bubbles; several bubbles contain faint tech text such as "DATA PACKET," while nearby micro labels identify features including "OXYGEN FLOW," "DATA PACKETS," "SECURE ROUTING," "RISK FILTER," "PRIVATE CLEAN," and "CONNECTION PURE." In the upper left, small brand text reads "IP 9OXYGEN TECHNOLOGY." A large bold uppercase headline dominates the left-center: "{argument name="headline text" default="BREATHE SECURE. GLOW FREE."}" with a smaller subheading below reading "for risk-free connections." Along the bottom is a row of 4 minimalist icon-and-text feature blocks, evenly spaced: 1) shield icon with the heading "CLEANSE YOUR IP" and short supporting copy, 2) wifi icon with the heading "SECURE CONNECTIONS" and short supporting copy, 3) leaf icon with the heading "BREATHE FREELY" and short supporting copy, 4) share/network icon with the heading "GLOW CONFIDENTLY" and short supporting copy. At the lower right, add a paragraph of marketing copy about constant connection and digital cleansing, ending with the tagline "BREATHE. CONNECT. GLOW." At the lower left, include a circular IP logo and the brand line "SECURE-IP" with a small subtitle like "OXYGEN FOR YOUR DIGITAL LIFE." Overall style: surreal product advertising, premium editorial poster, clean sans-serif typography, soft bloom, translucent glass spheres, elegant sci-fi wellness branding, ultra-detailed, polished, magazine-quality layout.

content:
Please draw a brightly colored, vertical (9:16) hand-drawn style "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} Travel Journal Illustration." The style should look as if it were created with crayons by a curious child. Use a soft and warm light-colored background (such as light yellow), paired with bright tones like red, blue, and green, to create a cozy, child-like, and travel-inspired atmosphere.

I. Main Image: Journal-style Travel Route

Draw a "winding travel route" in the center of the illustration, connecting multiple locations with arrows and dashed lines. Recommended attractions will be automatically generated based on a {argument name="number of days" default="1"}-day itinerary:

Example format (automatically replaced with {argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} related content):

- "Stop 1: {Attraction 1 recommendation + short fun description}"
- "Stop 2: {Attraction 2 recommendation + short fun description}"
- "Stop 3: {Attraction 3 recommendation + short fun description}"
- ...
- "Final Stop: {Local signature food/souvenir + warm closing statement}"

> The number of travel stops is automatically generated based on the number of days. If no days are input, a 1-day/highlights route will be generated by default.

II. Fun Surrounding Elements (Automatically replaced based on the city)

Add plenty of child-like elements around the route, such as:

- Cute travel characters: "A child holding local snacks," "An adventurous kid wearing a backpack," etc.
- Child-like Q-version hand-drawings of local landmarks: such as "{landmark 1}," "{landmark 2}," "{landmark 3}."
- Fun signboards: "Watch out for getting lost!", "Mind the crowds!", "Good food ahead!" (Adjusted according to city context).
- Sticker-style slogans: "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} Travel Memories Unlocked!", "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} Food Adventure!", "Where to next?"
- Cute small icons of local delicacies: such as "{food 1}," "{food 2}," "{food 3}."
- Exclamations (maintaining a child-like tone): "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} is so much fun!", "I want to go again!"

III. Overall Style Requirements

- Hand-drawn crayon style / children's travel log style
- Bright colors, full but warm composition
- Emphasis on the joy and exploration of travel
- All text uses cute handwritten fonts
- Make the entire image look like a travel journal page full of child-like wonder.
title: Hand-drawn Travel Journal Illustration
description: A detailed prompt for creating a child-like, hand-drawn travel journal illustration with customizable city names, landmarks, and routes.

content: A cinematic vertical poster inspired by The Little Prince, set on a rainy city street at blue hour in modern Shanghai. In the center foreground, a small child in Little Prince styling stands in side profile facing right, with messy curly golden-blond hair, a long flowing mustard-gold scarf blowing dramatically to the left, and a muted sage-green ankle-length coat tied at the waist. The child holds 1 single red rose upright in both hands. The face is simplified and softly obscured, with no detailed facial features. The wet pavement reflects neon lights, traffic, and the evening sky. In the background, the Oriental Pearl Tower rises softly out of the dusk with glowing pinkish lights, surrounded by blurred city buildings, storefronts, pedestrians, and car headlights, creating a dreamy bokeh urban atmosphere. On the upper right, include 1 street sign mounted on a traffic pole reading {argument name="street sign text" default="星球大道\nPLANET AVE."}. Also on the pole, include 1 red pedestrian traffic light showing a standing human figure. On the left side, place large handwritten brush-style Chinese quote text in warm pale yellow: {argument name="main quote" default="重要的东西，\n用眼睛是看不见的。"}, with a smaller signature line beneath reading {argument name="author text" default="—— 小王子"}. Scatter a few tiny hand-drawn star doodles and 1 small planet doodle around the text. Near the lower left, add 3 lines of small warm-yellow Chinese dedication text above a stylized script title reading {argument name="title text" default="Le Petit Prince"}. On the right side near the pole, tape 1 small paper note with handwritten Chinese text about not seeing truly important things with the eyes, plus a simple doodle. Add 1 vertical storefront sign on the left reading "咖啡". The composition should feel poetic, nostalgic, gentle, and premium, like an art-house movie poster or literary inspirational street poster. Color palette: twilight blue sky, amber street glow, soft gold typography, muted green clothing, vivid red rose. Shallow depth of field, glossy rain reflections, soft cinematic lighting, highly detailed illustration with realistic urban atmosphere and storybook character design.
title: Little Prince Shanghai Rain Poster
description: A poetic cinematic poster of a Little Prince-like child holding a rose in a rainy Shanghai street, ideal for inspirational quote art and literary social media posters.

content: A high-energy vertical anime street poster inspired by a pirate adventure crew, designed like a stylish summer campaign key visual in a modern Japanese shopping street under a vivid blue sky with fluffy white clouds. Show exactly 8 characters grouped closely in the foreground and midground, all happily eating colorful ice cream cones while walking through the city. Center front: a young man in a wide straw hat, oversized red graphic T-shirt, blue shorts, and a black crossbody waist bag, holding a mint-blue ice cream cone. Front left: a green-haired young man in a black oversized graphic shirt with green lettering and layered necklaces, eating ice cream. Front right: a small chibi-like reindeer mascot character wearing a large pink hat with a white X, black and pink streetwear jacket, and holding a blue-and-pink ice cream cone. Right midground: a long-nosed smiling young man in a cap and casual streetwear, loudly laughing with an ice cream cone; behind him a tall skeleton man with a large black afro, crown-like hat, purple hoodie, sunglasses, and an ice cream cone. Left midground: an orange-haired young woman in a cropped white tank top and jeans holding ice cream; behind center-left a blond young man in a blue shirt with a relaxed pose and ice cream; center-right a dark-haired young woman in a purple outfit with sunglasses on her head holding ice cream. The mood is cheerful, summery, fashionable, and adventurous. Make the composition feel like a premium anime tourism or retail poster with dramatic perspective from street level, dense urban signage, shop windows, hanging signs, and branded poster panels. Add large brush-script title text across the top reading {argument name="headline text" default="ONE PIECE"} in huge white paint strokes, with a yellow handwritten subtitle reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="Straw Hat Crew"}. On the upper left, stack poster text blocks reading exactly: "STRAW HAT CREW", "2024", "WE GO! TOGETHER! NEW WORLD!". On the right side, add a vertical street sign reading "New World". Include a pink hanging sign reading "ICE CREAM" with a skull emblem. Add pirate-skull hat emblems in the corners and on storefront signage. At the lower left, place white handwritten script reading "Enjoy! Ice Cream" with a small smiley, and beneath it smaller bold text reading "一起去吃冰淇淋吧！". At the lower left edge add small text: "I'M GONNA BE KING OF THE PIRATES!". At the lower right add "ONE PIECE 2024", a barcode, and tiny caption text "STRAW HAT CREW SUMMER ICE CREAM". Use glossy anime illustration rendering, bold cel shading, crisp line art, rich fabric folds, detailed accessories, vibrant summer lighting, cinematic contrast, poster-grade typography, and a polished commercial key art finish. Aspect ratio 2:3 portrait.

content: A dramatic anime theatrical movie poster in a tall vertical composition, centered on 2 young women in classic black-and-white maid uniforms standing back-to-back and facing opposite directions. The left maid has a short silver bob haircut with straight bangs and a white maid headband; the right maid has a short vivid pink bob haircut with straight bangs and a matching white maid headband. Both wear fitted black dresses with puff sleeves, white aprons with ruffled trim, white collars and cuffs, and black ribbon accents at the neck. Their poses are confident and tense, with one hand lowered at their sides, suggesting mystery and rivalry. Place them large in the foreground, filling most of the poster height. Behind them, create a split-color night sky: deep electric blue on the left and saturated magenta-pink on the right, blending at the center. In the upper left, show a bright full moon and a small helicopter with a searchlight. Along the horizon and lower sides, include a glowing city skyline, blue-lit on the left and pink-lit on the right. In the center background, place a gothic mansion or castle with pointed towers at the end of a path, illuminated with warm lights. In front of the mansion, show 2 smaller full-body figures of the same maids from behind, walking toward the building side by side. Add 4 supporting characters around the lower edges: 1 dark-haired man in a suit at bottom left, 1 older stern man in a suit at lower right-center, 1 young woman with long dark hair at bottom right, and the 2 small maid figures in the center distance, for a total of 6 visible human figures in the poster. Scatter bright pink flower petals across the image as if blown by the wind. Use intense cinematic lighting, glossy anime rendering, high contrast, sharp linework, glowing rim light, and a suspenseful psychological thriller mood. Include vertical Japanese tagline text on both sides, a large stylized title at the bottom center reading {argument name="title text" default="Re:maid"}, smaller Japanese subtitle text beneath it, and release text at the lower left reading {argument name="release date text" default="7.25 [FRI] ROADSHOW"}. Add a final Japanese tagline line along the bottom. Overall style: premium anime key visual, mystery thriller, neon blue and hot pink dual-color palette, polished poster typography, highly detailed background, dynamic petals, and theatrical film-poster finish.

content: A dramatic vertical cinematic poster for the dark wuxia action game {argument name="game title" default="Phantom Blade Zero"}, painted in an ultra-detailed gritty concept-art style with realistic textures, moody volumetric fog, and high contrast lighting. The scene shows 1 lone swordsman standing in the lower center foreground, viewed mostly from behind in a three-quarter pose, wearing a wide straw hat and layered black robes shredded into long wind-whipped strips, with pale loose hair streaming out beneath the hat. He holds 1 drawn sword low in his right hand, the blade catching cold silver light. The environment is a ruined ancient Chinese city of towering wooden pagodas and fortress-like buildings rising into steep cliffs, with collapsing architecture, hanging chains, smoke, drifting ash, and rubble. A bright full moon glows near the top center behind dense storm clouds, backlighting the skyline and the warrior. The color palette is almost monochrome charcoal, black, steel gray, and moonlit white, punctuated by sharp crimson slashes and blood-like streaks cutting diagonally across the composition. At the very top, place 4 huge Chinese calligraphy characters in explosive white brushstroke ink reading {argument name="main Chinese title" default="影之刃零"}, spanning nearly the full width. Directly beneath, centered, add the small elegant serif English subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="PHANTOM BLADE ZERO"}. At the bottom center, add 1 line of Chinese tagline text reading {argument name="tagline text" default="刀光即命运 影尽方归零"}, with the final character in red, plus 1 smaller line of Chinese promotional text beneath it. Add subtle ornamental divider lines and a tiny red seal-like emblem at the bottom. Composition should feel like an official AAA key art poster: epic, ominous, martial, supernatural, and intensely atmospheric, with dynamic wind, debris, embers, torn fabric, and ink-splatter energy.

content: A dramatic fictional movie poster for {argument name="movie title" default="GUGUGAGA"}, designed like an epic prestige film one-sheet with dark golden-brown cinematic lighting and a serious award-winning tone. The composition is vertical and symmetrical. In the center, a plush black-and-white penguin mascot with a round body, big glossy eyes, a yellow beak, and small yellow feet is held aloft in a ritual-like presentation by multiple African tribal warriors surrounding it from all sides. Exactly 6 visible warriors are arranged around the penguin, with muscular arms reaching inward and upward to support the mascot, creating a radial halo of hands and bodies. Their skin is richly lit with warm highlights, and they wear colorful beaded necklaces, bracelets, headbands, and traditional adornments. The background is a dense, dimly lit ceremonial setting with warm firelight, earthy shadows, fabric banners, and a textured amber glow, giving the scene an ancient, mythic atmosphere. At the very top, centered Japanese copy reads: 「知られざるググガガの誕生秘話。」 On the left side, a vertical Japanese tagline reads: 「モフモフが、世界を変えた。」 On the right side, place exactly 5 stacked gold laurel award blocks with Japanese text, each framed by laurel wreaths. The 5 award texts are: 「第38回 モフモフ オブザイヤー 受賞」, 「アフリカン タッチ映画祭 グランプリ」, 「世界ぬいぐるみ 協会賞 最優秀賞」, 「国際もふもふ アカデミー賞 主演賞」, and 「ぬいぐるみが 選ぶ映画賞 観客賞」. Across the lower middle, place the huge metallic gold serif title {argument name="movie title" default="GUGUGAGA"}, with smaller gold serif subtitle beneath it reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="THE MOVIE"}. Below that, add a small centered line reading: STARRING (声の出演). Along the lower section, include exactly 5 circular cast medallions with tiny laurel-like frames and labels beneath them. The 5 cast items are: a fluffy white pomeranian-like dog labeled 「モフリン」, a giraffe labeled 「カワウーソン」, an orange tabby cat labeled 「ニャンバラ」, a blue round toy-like character labeled 「トゥクトゥク星人」, and a scholarly baboon or monkey figure labeled 「バオバブ先生」. Beneath the cast row, add small Japanese-style credit lines including director, screenplay, and music in a fine poster-credit style. At the bottom center, display a large gold release date line reading {argument name="release date" default="7.7 FRI ROADSHOW"}. Along the bottom edge, include small production and distribution credits reading 「制作：gugugagaTokyo」 and 「配給：AI Studio Tokyo」. Put a black-and-white QR code in the bottom-right corner. Use ultra-detailed photorealistic poster rendering, dramatic contrast, gilded typography, luxurious texture, prestige cinema marketing design, and a tongue-in-cheek parody of an Oscar-bait adventure drama.
title: Epic Gugugaga Movie Poster
description: This prompt generates a dramatic parody film poster featuring a plush penguin idolized by tribal figures, styled like an award-winning cinematic release poster for social posts or mock movie marketing.

content: A heartwarming fictional movie poster in a soft cinematic Japanese drama style, photographed at golden hour with dreamy backlight and gentle lens glow. A person seen from behind and slightly below, wearing a cozy cream knit sweater, lifts a plush penguin toy high toward a bright sunset sky. The plush is centered and fills much of the frame: black fuzzy body, white belly, small yellow beak, yellow feet, outstretched stubby wings, and a humanlike anime-girl face framed by short dark brown bobbed hair with hairpins, creating a cute surreal mascot character. The background is an outdoor field with warm bokeh trees and a glowing sun low on the horizon, all in creamy beige, honey, peach, and gold tones. Several white feathers float through the air; show exactly 5 visible feathers scattered around the composition. Make the mood tender, nostalgic, hopeful, and slightly fantastical, like a family fantasy film poster. Add Japanese poster typography integrated into the design: at the top center, the tagline "この出会いが、世界をやさしく変えていく。"; along the left side vertically, "ずっと、いっしょだよ。"; near the bottom center, a large handwritten glowing title "{argument name="movie title" default="GUGUGAGA"}" in warm white neon-like script with a small pink heart above it; directly below in elegant serif capitals, "{argument name="subtitle" default="THE MOVIE"}". Beneath that, place a pink ribbon banner with the Japanese line "ずっと、いっしょだよ。". At the very bottom, add small centered Japanese credit text in a realistic film-poster layout, including cast and staff lines and production/distribution credits; include "gugugagaTokyo" and "AI Studio Tokyo" on the final line. Use a vertical one-sheet poster composition, polished commercial key art, shallow depth of field, soft filmic contrast, premium cinematic lighting, sentimental fantasy-drama aesthetic.
title: Warm Penguin Fantasy Movie Poster
description: This prompt generates a sentimental Japanese-style fictional movie poster featuring a plush penguin mascot held up at sunset, ideal for parody film key art and viral social media visuals.
