content: Create a refined editorial presentation cover slide in a warm, Claude-inspired design system. Use a landscape 16:9 composition with a parchment-paper background, subtle paper grain, soft shadows, and layered torn-paper collage elements. The overall palette should be warm ivory, cream, sand, charcoal, muted black, and terracotta accent. On the left half, place a small top label reading "{argument name="system label" default="Claude-inspired presentation system"}" with a small terracotta dot and a thin horizontal divider line. Below it, set an oversized elegant high-contrast serif headline in black that reads "{argument name="main headline" default="Thoughtful Systems"}", split across two lines and dominating the left side. Under the headline, add a smaller serif subheadline in terracotta reading "{argument name="subheadline" default="Warmth can still feel precise."}". Beneath that, create a vertical list of exactly 4 design principles, each on its own row with thin divider lines and a small icon at left: 1) a rectangular parchment-sheet icon with the text "Parchment canvas", 2) a serif capital T icon with the text "Serif-led hierarchy", 3) a filled terracotta circle icon with the text "Terracotta for signal", 4) a chain-link icon with the text "Organic diagrams over cold chrome". Add a tiny footer caption at bottom left reading "CLAUDE-INSPIRED PRESENTATION SYSTEM" in spaced small caps. On the right half, build a layered collage of exactly 3 paper cards: first, a tall off-white art card with a fine border containing the heading "A more considered approach", a short body paragraph about complex problems yielding to clarity, a minimal landscape line drawing with a terracotta sun, and a vertical terracotta botanical branch overlapping the card; second, a dark charcoal rectangular card partially behind it with the lowercase title "thinking process" and an exact 5-step numbered list: "01 Observe", "02 Interpret", "03 Connect", "04 Synthesize", "05 Act with care", plus a delicate circular orbital diagram in dotted lines and terracotta highlight; third, a torn off-white note card in front near the bottom with a hand-drawn overlapping-circles diagram where one crescent-shaped intersection area is shaded in terracotta, alongside a handwritten quote reading "{argument name="quote" default="Clarity emerges when systems are designed with intention."}". Include one extra light beige paper strip tucked beneath the lower cards. Emphasize tactile realism, elegant negative space, print-editorial sophistication, soft natural lighting, and a calm, thoughtful luxury-tech mood.
title: Thoughtful Systems Presentation Cover
description: A warm editorial slide cover for AI or product design presentations, using parchment textures, serif typography, and terracotta-accented collage cards.

content: Create a premium minimalist keynote-style presentation cover slide in an Apple-inspired industrial design aesthetic. Use a wide 16:9 layout with a deep matte black upper background and a pale concrete-gray lower platform occupying the bottom quarter of the frame. Place a large photorealistic floating rectangular slab in the right-center foreground, resembling a thin black glass device or polished obsidian platform with mirror-like reflections, chamfered chrome-metal edges, and precise industrial finishing. The slab should hover above the light surface and cast a soft elongated shadow directly beneath it. Add a tall vertical gray metallic wall or pillar on the far right edge to frame the composition. Use extremely sparse, high-end art direction, lots of negative space, cinematic studio lighting, subtle gradients, and crisp contrast between black and silver materials. On the left side, set clean white sans-serif typography with a clear hierarchy: a tiny top caption reading "{argument name="system label" default="Apple-inspired presentation system"}", a very large bold headline reading "{argument name="headline text" default="Clarity At Scale"}", and a medium subtitle reading "{argument name="subtitle text" default="The strongest slides behave like products."}". Below that, include exactly 3 numbered principles in a vertical list with thin separators and refined spacing: "01 | {argument name="principle 1" default="One focal object"}", "02 | Binary light / dark rhythm", and "03 | Blue only for signal". Add a short thin horizontal rule above the list and a tiny blue accent line below the list. Draw a very fine horizontal guide line near the top spanning most of the slide, with the small page number "01" at the upper right. Repeat the small caption "Apple-inspired presentation system" once again at the bottom left on the light surface. Overall look: luxury tech presentation, editorial product-launch slide, ultra-clean Swiss grid, restrained monochrome palette with only one subtle blue accent, photorealistic rendering blended with presentation design.
title: Apple-Style Minimal Presentation Cover
description: This prompt generates a sleek Apple-inspired presentation title slide with editorial typography and a floating black-glass product object, ideal for keynote covers, pitch decks, and design system presentations.

content: A dramatic Japanese fantasy movie poster in a painterly, ultra-detailed cinematic illustration style. The poster is vertically composed like a theatrical key visual, with a warm gold title at the bottom and multiple emotional vignettes layered into one unified scene. The central character is a small fluffy pig-like creature with soft pale cream fur, oversized pink inner ears, a tiny snout, a curled tail, and large feathered angel wings glowing with golden light. It stands upright on a rooftop or elevated wooden platform overlooking a vast Tokyo cityscape at sunset, holding a whiskey glass in one hoof with the other hoof on its hip, posed like a weary but resilient middle-aged salaryman. In the distance are the Tokyo skyline, water, bridges, floating lanterns, and Tokyo Tower glowing orange-red under a radiant sky filled with clouds lit in gold, peach, violet, and deep blue. Around the center are 4 supporting vignette scenes: 1) top left, the winged pig sits alone at a narrow bar counter in a nostalgic lantern-lit Japanese alley at night, looking exhausted and melancholy, with a bottle and a glass nearby; 2) top center, the winged pig sits drinking with 2 human adults in an izakaya-like nightlife setting, warm lights surrounding them; 3) upper right, the winged pig walks away down railway tracks toward a brilliant ocean sunset, carrying a small suitcase, seen from behind; 4) left middle, the winged pig walks alone through a rain-slick neon-lit city street at night, seen from behind, surrounded by glowing signs and reflections. The whole image should feel bittersweet, magical, lonely, and hopeful, like a prestige animated film poster about adulthood, solitude, and emotional survival. Use lush lighting, dense environmental detail, sparkling reflections, glowing lanterns, cinematic atmosphere, and rich blue-orange color contrast. Include Japanese poster typography integrated into the art: at the very top, the tagline "ひとりで生きてきた。だけど、ひとりじゃ涙は止まらない。"; above the title, the line "独身オヤジ、最後の青春。"; a very large main title at the bottom center reading "翼のオヤジ" in bold brushed calligraphic characters; below it, the tagline "笑って、泣けて、明日また頑張れる。この冬、いちばんやさしい奇跡。"; on the bottom right, a circular badge reading "秋公開" and "今"; add small fine-print credits across the lower edge in the style of a Japanese film poster. Include 2 visible vertical lantern/shop signs in the street scenes reading "居酒屋" and 1 bottle label reading "黒豚". High detail, emotional fantasy poster, premium animated-film aesthetic, Japanese urban nostalgia mixed with magical realism.
title: Japanese Fantasy Winged Pig Film Poster
description: A text prompt for generating a richly detailed Japanese animated movie poster featuring a winged pig-like protagonist in a bittersweet urban fantasy montage.

content: Create a richly detailed nostalgic Chinese retro poster collage in warm sepia, faded red, and aged paper tones, designed like a memory scrapbook spread on an old desk. The composition is vertical and packed with miniature diorama scenes embedded inside a large irregular paper cutout path, while a realistic adult hand at the upper right holds a black fountain pen with a gold nib, as if writing the memories into existence. At the top, large distressed Chinese headline text reads {argument name="headline text" default="8090的记忆"}, with smaller handwritten-style subtitle text beneath it reading “那些简单、热闹、发亮的日子”. The paper surface should look cracked, yellowed, stained, and worn, with old magazine clippings, notebooks, marbles, ribbon, pencils, enamel mug, and children’s illustrated books scattered around the edges. Include exactly 8 numbered memory scenes arranged from top to bottom on the central paper path, each with a red circle number and Chinese handwritten annotations beside it: scene 1 is a boy crouching outdoors aiming a slingshot under a tree; scene 2 is two children running with a metal hoop and stick in an alley; scene 3 is two children crouching over small firecrackers on the ground with smoke and red paper debris; scene 4 is a tiny old-fashioned neighborhood shop counter labeled “供销社”, with one child buying snacks from the shopkeeper and shelves packed with goods; scene 5 is a bustling market fair with many adults, baskets, poultry, produce, and a bicycle vendor; scene 6 is an open-air village opera stage with red curtains, performers in colorful traditional costumes, and a seated audience; scene 7 is two children at a tree, one climbing or reaching into a nest while another watches below, with a green tin frog toy nearby; scene 8 is a man riding a motorcycle with a child passenger down an old street at sunset. Add surrounding retro printed items with visible vintage Chinese cover text, including a left-side old children’s book, a right-side magazine titled “儿童画报 1985 5”, a small blue booklet near the lower left, and a worn exercise notebook near the lower right. At the bottom, place a bold red banner with large cream-colored Chinese text reading {argument name="bottom quote" default="那时候日子不快，但快乐很满。"} and a second smaller line reading {argument name="sub quote" default="很多东西都旧了，可一想起来还是会发亮。"}. The entire image should feel tactile, cinematic, and emotionally warm, combining photorealistic objects with handcrafted poster design, dense storytelling details, tiny human figures, nostalgic 1980s–1990s Chinese childhood atmosphere, and soft golden lighting.
title: Nostalgic 80s 90s China Memory Poster
description: A warm retro collage poster depicting eight iconic childhood memories from 1980s–1990s China, ideal for nostalgic editorial art or social media storytelling.

content: A richly detailed vertical editorial travel illustration of a bustling Seoul market alley rendered in polished hand-drawn realism with warm cinematic lighting, dense urban storytelling, and highly legible signage. The scene is packed with a large crowd of pedestrians, shoppers, diners, street-food customers, musicians, and commuters in a narrow neighborhood market street, viewed from a slightly elevated eye level so the full alley feels layered and alive. At the top left, a large illustrated poster reads “WHERE IS {argument name="character name" default="KYLE"}?” with the subtitle “Can you find Kyle in Seoul?” in bold playful English typography, styled like a search-and-find book cover. The environment should clearly be Seoul, with a visible Namsan tower in the distant skyline, tangled overhead power lines, rooftop seating, stacked low-rise buildings, shop signs in Korean, and a subway entrance sign on the right showing line numbers 4, 2, 4, 4 and the bilingual text “서울역 방면 / To Seoul Station.” Include exactly 15 major visible signs or text panels: 1) the “WHERE IS {argument name="character name" default="KYLE"}?” poster, 2) “할머니 손칼국수”, 3) a hanging vertical sign “낙원상가 2F”, 4) a small blue street sign, 5) a vertical sign “이름 떡볶이”, 6) the large market arch sign “황진다운시장 영”, 7) a vertical orange sign “커피”, 8) a wall mural map with “남산 가는길”, 9) the subway sign with “출입구 4” and “서울역 방면 / To Seoul Station”, 10) the produce sign “경성 야채”, 11) the lower produce sign “신선한 채소”, 12) a handwritten busker sign, 13) the street-food cart sign “호떡·어묵·붕어빵”, 14) the menu board “오늘의 추천 김밥 떡볶이 순대 튀김”, and 15) the delivery box text “빠른 배달”. Populate the alley with exactly 8 vendor or activity zones: 1) a noodle restaurant at left under a red-and-white awning with seated diners, 2) a vegetable stall with stacked produce crates, 3) a busking duo with guitar and percussion, 4) a central street-food cart selling hotteok, fish cake, and bungeoppang, 5) a standing crowd eating snacks and holding cups, 6) a small magic performance table in the lower center with cards and cups, 7) a painter at an easel near the lower left, and 8) a scooter delivery cluster at the lower right. Add exactly 6 notable background accents: 1) rooftop diners on the upper right terrace, 2) a cat lounging on a roof ledge upper left, 3) colorful market umbrellas in the middle distance, 4) stairways and narrow side passages, 5) dense balconies and windows full of plants and people, and 6) the distant tower and skyline. The crowd should feel extremely varied in age and clothing, mostly casual contemporary Korean street fashion in jackets, hoodies, backpacks, skirts, slacks, and sneakers, with a few office workers and students. Hide a single subtly distinct person meant to be the findable target, {argument name="target outfit" default="a young man in a blue hoodie with yellow lettering"}, integrated naturally among the central crowd rather than spotlighted. Use a vibrant but grounded palette of brick red, teal, forest green, cream, mustard, asphalt gray, and sky blue. Emphasize intricate linework, readable Korean text, observational city details, lively human gestures, and the playful feel of a premium “Where’s Waldo?” style Seoul search poster. Aspect ratio 2:3.
title: Find Kyle in a Seoul Market
description: A dense search-and-find style illustration of a lively Seoul market street, ideal for posters, social media showcase images, or editorial travel artwork.

content: Create a clean luxury skincare product advertisement in a square 1:1 layout with a warm beige studio background and strong natural sunlight casting soft palm-leaf shadows across the wall. Place 1 amber glass dropper bottle on the left-center, standing upright on a round cream stone pedestal. The bottle has a glossy gold collar and a matte white rubber dropper top. Add a white rectangular label with elegant minimal typography: brand name "{argument name="brand name" default="NATURELLE SKINCARE"}" at the top, a large orange product name "{argument name="product name" default="VITAMIN C"}", then black text reading "BRIGHTENING SERUM" and smaller subtext "With Hyaluronic Acid & Niacinamide". Surround the pedestal with 3 visible glossy green tropical leaves, arranged from the left edge and behind the bottle for a fresh botanical look. On the right side, place a large bold black serif headline in 3 stacked lines reading "{argument name="headline text" default="Glow Naturally. Every Day."}". Beneath it, add a smaller clean sans-serif benefits line reading "{argument name="benefits text" default="Brightens | Hydrates | Protects"}". Below that, include 3 circular black outline ingredient or values icons in a horizontal row, each with a simple leaf-style symbol inside; add tiny caption text beneath them with the same slightly imperfect ad-like wording seen in the original, including "Barban Free", "Dermicologyg", and "Creuty-free". At the lower right, place a glossy rounded green call-to-action button with white bold text "{argument name="button text" default="Shop Now"}". Add 1 sliced orange on the far right edge, partially cropped, with vivid juicy texture to reinforce the vitamin C theme. Include a small white "Pollo.ai" watermark in the top-right corner. Style the whole image as a polished commercial product mockup, photorealistic, high-end beauty branding, soft warm highlights, subtle shadows, balanced composition, sharp label detail, premium ecommerce social ad aesthetic.
title: Vitamin C Skincare Ad
description: A polished square skincare product advertisement showing a vitamin C serum bottle with botanical styling, bold headline text, benefit icons, and a shop-now button for ecommerce or social media marketing.

description: This generates a polished 2x2 sheet of Japanese-style promotional banner mockups for studying layout, branding, and typography across beauty, app, travel, and café ads.

content:
Create a bold Korean-style beverage advertisement poster with a warm golden splash background and dramatic commercial lighting. Show a {argument name="celebrity spokesperson" default="Donald Trump-like older male politician"} from the chest up, wearing a navy suit, white dress shirt, bright red tie, and a small American flag lapel pin, facing camera with a confident sales-pitch expression. His face is obscured by a flat rectangular censor block in a skin-toned color. In his left hand, extended close to the camera in forced perspective, he holds a yellow aluminum can of Korean rice punch drink labeled prominently in Korean, with red top and bottom bands and the main product text "비락 식혜" and "Since 1993" on the can. The can also includes smaller Korean copy, an image of sweet rice drink near the bottom, and the volume text "238 ml (120 kcal)". His right hand gives a thumbs-up.

Use an energetic retro-commercial composition, with splashing sweet rice beverage and droplets behind him, glowing golden highlights, and a slightly low-angle heroic framing. At the top, include 3 distinct headline text groups: a small handwritten-style black slogan on the upper left reading "전통의 맛, 한국의 DRINK!", a huge central headline in distressed bold Korean type reading "걸죽는 땐?" in dark brown-black and "비락 식혜!" in vivid red, and a brand logo on the upper right reading "비락" with small red text "Since 1993" beneath it. Add 2 callout badges: on the left, a yellow circular seal with a tiny crown icon and the text "대한민국 국민음료 No.1"; on the right, a white speech bubble with handwritten Korean text "한국이 만든 맛있는 전통!" and red English text "I LOVE IT!".

At the bottom foreground, place 2 food elements: a brass bowl filled with sweet rice drink and floating rice grains on the left, and a wooden bowl piled with white rice on the right. Across the lower middle, add 2 lines of large brush-style promotional text, the first in white reading "달콤하게! 시원하게!" and the second in mixed white and yellow reading "속까지 시~원하게!" with an energetic yellow underline stroke. Along the very bottom, include 3 circular feature icons with captions in Korean: "국내산 쌀 엄선된 재료", "시원하게 갈증해소", and "부드러운 단맛 속 편한 식혜". In the lower right corner, add tiny disclaimer text "연출된 이미지입니다". Make the overall look glossy, exaggerated, funny, and convincing like a viral parody print ad.
title: Korean Rice Drink Parody Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a humorous, high-impact parody beverage advertisement poster featuring a famous politician-like spokesperson promoting a Korean canned rice drink.

content: A bold Korean beverage advertisement poster in a glossy commercial photography style, featuring {argument name="spokesperson" default="Donald Trump lookalike"} in a dark navy business suit, white dress shirt, and vivid blue tie, standing front-facing against a saturated bright-blue sky with a few soft white clouds and a faint modern city skyline including a tall skyscraper resembling the Empire State Building on the right. He is holding a cold plastic bottle of {argument name="product name" default="POCARI SWEAT"} dramatically toward the camera in his left hand, with extreme foreshortening so the bottle appears large in the foreground and the person is slightly behind it. The bottle is clear with condensation, a white cap, visible water inside, and a deep blue label reading “POCARI SWEAT” in large white letters with smaller text above saying “ION SUPPLY DRINK.” Add energetic frozen water splashes and droplets around the bottle, hand, and lower foreground to emphasize freshness and hydration. Place the brand logo in the upper left corner: “POCARI SWEAT” in white with the curved underline mark. Across the top, add huge distressed white Korean headline text, slightly angled and filling most of the upper half: {argument name="headline text" default="갈증 해소? 이걸로 끝! 포카리스웨트!"}. In the lower right over the suit, add a bold italic quotation in white and blue Korean text: {argument name="quote" default="WINNING은 수분 싸움! 포카리스웨트로 리프레시!"}. In the bottom left, include exactly 3 circular benefit icons stacked vertically with short Korean labels: a water drop icon with “수분 보충”, a lightning bolt icon with “전해질 보충”, and a running figure icon with “빠른 흡수”. Use a high-contrast, patriotic blue-and-white color palette, dramatic ad lighting, sharp focus on the bottle and hand, slightly softer focus on the face and background, and an overall energetic premium campaign-poster look.
title: Korean Sports Drink Celebrity Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a flashy Korean-style hydration drink poster with a celebrity-like spokesperson, oversized product bottle, and bold promotional typography for commercial advertising use.

content: A vintage travel poster illustration for {argument name="destination name" default="MALTA"}, with the subtitle {argument name="tagline" default="MEDITERRANEAN PARADISE"} centered near the top. The composition is a sunlit Mediterranean coastal cityscape viewed from a curving seaside road in the foreground, painted in a richly textured retro poster style with warm cream stone architecture, saturated turquoise-blue sea, and a bright azure sky with soft white clouds. On the left, a hillside of tightly packed historic limestone buildings rises above the waterfront, including colorful enclosed wooden balconies, a large domed church with a reddish terracotta roof, and a slender church spire. In the foreground on the road, place a classic mid-century white sedan seen from the rear three-quarter angle, driving along the curve, with a dark license plate reading {argument name="license plate text" default="MTA 1964"}. A low stone seawall runs along the right edge of the road beside the harbor. In the bay, include exactly 4 boats: 2 colorful Maltese luzzu fishing boats in the near and mid water, plus 2 smaller distant boats farther back. Add exactly 4 white seagulls gliding across the sky above the water. Frame the scene with lush flowering bougainvillea branches in vivid magenta-pink arching across the upper right and lower right corners, and leafy tree branches along the upper left edge; include a spiky agave plant in the lower left foreground. The distant shoreline across the bay should show a pale sunlit city stretching along the horizon. Use a nostalgic 1950s–1960s tourism poster aesthetic, painterly brushwork, crisp composition, romantic travel mood, and elegant typography with the main title in large cream serif capitals and the subtitle in smaller dark sans-serif capitals.
title: Vintage Malta Travel Poster
description: A retro-style Mediterranean tourism poster showing Malta’s waterfront road, historic city, fishing boats, and a classic car, ideal for travel art, poster prints, and destination promos.

content:
Please generate a "hand-drawn packaging proposal board style" product introduction poster for {argument name="product name" default="milk powder"}.

If I provide a product image, please use it as the main reference, retaining the core visual characteristics, packaging form, colors, materials, brand identity, and overall temperament of the product. Prioritize the main color tone and color relationships from the product image for the design.
If I do not provide a product image, please automatically generate a product appearance and packaging design that fits the positioning of {argument name="product name" default="milk powder"}, and automatically match natural and reasonable main, auxiliary, and background colors based on the product attributes, category characteristics, and temperament.

Overall poster style requirements:
This is not a standard e-commerce detail page or a simple studio-shot poster, but a creative proposal board that integrates "product finished image + packaging design sketches + brand concept development process." The overall presentation is a high-aesthetic, high-completion brand design display image, as if a designer is presenting a packaging concept proposal.

Visual requirements:
- Vertical composition
- Use a unified background with a brand feel; the background color should be naturally determined by the product itself and not fixed to any one color.
- Color schemes should coordinate with product attributes: if there is a reference image, prioritize inheriting its main and brand colors; if not, automatically generate a reasonable color scheme based on the product name.
- Place the most complete and eye-catching product main visual in the center, with realistic textures, 3D lighting, and commercial finish effects.
- Surround the product with multiple auxiliary visual elements: packaging sketches from different angles, structural sketches, local form explorations, hand-held display drafts, packaging unfolding ideas, and brand lettering layout experiments.
- Add natural and casual black or dark hand-drawn line art, arrows, circles, symbols, and handwritten Chinese annotations to give the image a strong sense of "design process" and "creative proposal."
- The finished product image should be relatively refined and realistic, while the sketch parts should be relatively casual and dynamic, creating a contrast between the "finished product + design sketches."
- The layout should look relaxed and free, but overall it must have order, rhythm, and a visual center, reflecting a high-end graphic design feel.
- Small graphics, symbols, or interesting elements related to the product can be added appropriately to enhance brand memory points.
- The final effect should have a sense of branding, creativity, process, and visual impact.

Color principles:
- Do not fix a yellow background.
- Automatically select the main color tone based on product type, material, use, consumer experience, and brand temperament.
- The background color, product color, text color, and sketch line art color should coordinate with each other.
- High-saturation monochromatic backgrounds or soft, unified color schemes can be used, as long as the overall image has a brand feel and visual impact.
- Colors should naturally serve the product rather than overshadow it.

Style keywords:
Packaging design proposal board, brand concept development, hand-drawn sketches, design process feel, moodboard, creative review draft, product finished rendering, visual experimentation, commercial design poster.

Special notes:
- If there is a reference product image, prioritize following it and do not deviate from the product itself.
- If there is no reference image, automatically generate reasonable product appearance, packaging, and color schemes based on the product name, maintaining overall style consistency.
- The focus of the image is "product introduction + creative design process display."
- Do not make it look like a common e-commerce detail page, a promotional poster, or overly neat and stiff; do not lack sketches and handwritten annotations; avoid a cheap feel or an immature cartoon style.
title: Packaging Design Proposal Board Prompt
description: A highly detailed prompt for creating professional hand-drawn style product packaging design proposals and conceptual mood boards.

content: Create a vertical 9:16 luxury-campaign poster for a fictional crossover product, a disruptive co-branded handbag advertisement between {argument name="brand one" default="HERMÈS PARIS"} and {argument name="brand two" default="拼多多"}. The composition is a violently split, collage-style fashion key visual with a torn-paper seam running vertically down the center, dividing two clashing aesthetics: on the left, refined premium luxury branding in warm Hermes orange, cream paper, and elegant editorial minimalism; on the right, aggressive Chinese e-commerce promotion energy in black and metallic red foil, with loud sale graphics, confetti, ripped stickers, and explosive discount typography. At the top center, place both brands prominently with a large collaboration headline in Chinese, the left logo area styled like a classic luxury house with serif typography and horse-and-carriage emblem, the right logo area in bold red Chinese branding. Below that, add the main headline text in huge Chinese characters: {argument name="headline text" default="颠覆性联名款"}, and a boxed subheadline: {argument name="subheadline text" default="百亿补贴铂金包"}. The centerpiece is one Birkin-style luxury handbag shown front-facing and large, perfectly centered but visually split in half along the torn seam: the left half is orange pebbled leather with gold hardware, the right half is crinkled metallic silver leather with silver hardware, both halves seamlessly merged into one surreal bag. The bag should include 5 clearly visible accessory/product elements around or on it: 1 orange clochette hanging on the left, 1 metallic silver hanging strap with lock on the right, 1 central turn-lock closure with padlock, 1 orange Hermes-style gift box with dark ribbon at lower left, and 1 beige dust bag with small logo near the bottom left. Behind the bag on the left is a painterly orange brushstroke on textured cream paper; behind the bag on the right is a crushed reflective red metallic wrapper surface with spark-like highlights and falling confetti. On the right half, add 8 aggressive promotional text bursts and stickers layered diagonally like an online shopping festival poster: 1 giant white Chinese slogan "百亿补贴 全网最低", 2 "限时秒杀!!", 3 a torn price sticker reading "补贴价 ¥999?!", 4 "万件疯抢", 5 "百亿补贴 官方直补", 6 "直降到底", 7 a large bottom torn banner repeating "补贴价 ¥999?!", and 8 small text "建议零售价 ¥1000000+". On the left margin, add a slim vertical editorial text column with 4 grouped text blocks in a luxury layout: 1 "限量发售 / 全球瞩目 / 2024 LIMITED EDITION", 2 "HERMÈS PARIS MADE IN FRANCE", 3 "CRAFTED FOR ELEGANCE", and 4 "DESIGNED TO DEFY THE ORDINARY". At the bottom, create a black app-like information bar with 3 feature blocks from left to right: 1 a red brand icon with "拼多多" and a search-bar style pill containing "百亿补贴铂金包", 2 a lightning icon with the text "百亿补贴 官方补贴 所以低价", and 3 a shield icon with the text "正品保障 假一赔十 3期免息". Add a thin final slogan line across the very bottom in small Chinese text. Use hyper-detailed commercial product photography, premium graphic design, sharp lighting, embossed textures, foil reflections, paper tears, and strong depth. The overall mood must feel like a world-class art director forced a heritage luxury campaign and a chaotic discount-shopping poster to collide in one image, producing extreme visual tension, irony, and high-impact contrast.
title: Luxury x E-commerce Split Poster
description: This prompt generates a high-impact vertical campaign poster that collides luxury fashion branding with chaotic discount-platform promotion for a provocative co-branded product ad.

content: A hyper-detailed vertical Japanese theme park advertisement poster set in a lush tropical jungle under a vivid blue sky with scattered clouds and strong golden sunlight flaring from the upper right. The style is cinematic, photorealistic, dramatic, and slightly absurdist, like a premium satirical travel ad. At the top, huge three-dimensional stone-textured gold Japanese headline text reads {argument name="headline text" default="ジャンキリア沖縄"}, with a smaller white Japanese tagline underneath that reads "— やんばるの大自然に包まれた、超本格ジャングル・テーマパーク —". In the center foreground, a giant modern smartphone stands upright, slightly tilted, dominating the composition like a monument. Its screen shows a lottery waiting-ticket interface with a safari silhouette header and large bold Japanese text "整理券抽選中", a dotted loading circle, smaller text "結果発表まで30分", and a tiny note "※この画面を閉じずにお待ちください". The phone status bar shows 10:00. To the left midground, a roaring Tyrannosaurus rex emerges from dense jungle foliage behind a huge aged concrete sign with oversized red Japanese text "待ち時間 180分". To the right midground, an ornate extravagant gold entrance gate to a premium area rises above the trees, with a black signboard reading "プレミアムパス入口" and a red-carpeted queue lane beyond it. A long crowded line of park visitors stretches from the foreground deep into the background along rope barriers; the visitors wear summer vacation clothing, hats, towels, backpacks, handheld fans, water bottles, and parasols, showing exhaustion, heat, and anticipation. In the lower left foreground, 3 stacked rustic wooden signboards are visible: the top board says "駐車場 2,000円" with a parking icon, the middle board says "アプリ必須 ダウンロードしてね!" with a smartphone icon, and the bottom board says "当選者だけが冒険へ" with a dinosaur silhouette. Along the right side, large vertical white brush-style Japanese copy reads {argument name="side slogan" default="待つこと、それが冒険だ。"}. Near the lower right are 3 circular gold icon callouts with short Japanese promotional lines: 1 dinosaur icon with "抽選に選ばれし者だけが、恐竜に会える。", 1 smartphone battery icon with "スマホの充電が尽きる前に、夢は始まる。", and 1 VIP icon with "プレミアムな近道も、ご用意しました。". At the very bottom center, include a small black strip with white Japanese disclaimer text: "このポスターは架空のパロディ広告です". The jungle should be dense and glossy with large tropical leaves framing the foreground, warm rim lighting, high contrast, and a polished blockbuster-poster composition. Keep all Japanese typography crisp, clean, and perfectly legible.
title: Japanese Jungle Theme Park Parody Poster
description: This prompt generates a cinematic satirical Japanese poster for a tropical dinosaur theme park, ideal for showcasing dense typography, ad design, and photorealistic scene composition.

content: Create a clean, modern Japanese webinar thumbnail in a wide 16:9 layout with a corporate tech-design aesthetic. Use a very light gray background with subtle diagonal translucent panels and bold electric-blue geometric accents, including 3 angular blue-and-white ribbon shapes on the right side behind the speaker. The composition is split into 2 main horizontal sections: a large hero area on top and an information bar across the bottom. In the top-left hero area, place a large bold sans-serif Japanese headline in vivid blue on 2 lines reading {argument name="headline text" default="AI×デザインで\n新事業を創出"}. Beneath it, add a dark-blue rectangular banner with centered white bold text reading {argument name="subheadline text" default="〜社員AI活用率90%超・デザイン費削減達成する方法〜"}. On the right half, show a sharply lit half-body portrait of {argument name="speaker name" default="川合 卓也"}, an East Asian man in his 30s with short black hair, wearing a navy blazer over a white crew-neck shirt, arms folded, facing slightly left toward the headline. His face is intentionally obscured by a square skin-tone blur block centered over the face. Next to his torso, place a white rectangular name card with 2 lines of small black Japanese text above a larger bold black name: {argument name="speaker title" default="株式会社SHIFT AI\nデザイン部長/講師"} and {argument name="speaker name" default="川合 卓也"}. Across the bottom, create a white info bar with thin blue vertical dividers and 4 visual components from left to right: 1) a blue gradient angular K logo with the brand text KAWAI DESIGN in black uppercase sans-serif, 2) the date in large blue text reading 2026/2/9, 3) a blue filled circle containing the white Japanese weekday 月 followed by the time 21:30〜22:30 in large blue text, 4) a blue outlined laptop-and-chat icon followed by the blue text オンライン. Keep typography bold and highly legible, with strong hierarchy, generous spacing, precise alignment, minimal clutter, and a polished webinar promotional design suitable for a business landing page or social media thumbnail.
title: Japanese AI Design Webinar Thumbnail
description: A polished corporate webinar thumbnail with bold Japanese typography, a speaker portrait, and a structured event info bar for promoting online business events.

content:
{argument name="style" default="Chinese style CG illustration"}, Tang Dynasty aesthetics, {argument name="character description" default="exquisite ancient woman"}, half-body close-up shot, focus on face and upper body, high-end portrait composition, cinematic camera language and spatial perspective.

Character Setting:
East Asian classical beauty, cold white transparent skin, fine and real skin texture, soft shimmer; exquisite and three-dimensional facial features but natural and not exaggerated, narrow phoenix eyes, slightly tilted eye corners, affectionate and shy eyes, slightly tipsy and hazy, long eyelashes casting subtle shadows; lip color like rouge, slightly parted lips, soft and emotional tension, presenting 'subtle Oriental beauty'.

Styling Design:
Pink-toned gorgeous Tang-style clothing, softly fitting the body curves, rich layers but not over-stacked; moderate low-neck design emphasizing collarbone and neck-shoulder lines, natural visual guidance; exquisite phoenix crown (metal, pearls, gems, tassels), realistic material reflection, moving slightly with action.

Dynamics and Pose:
Slightly side-turned or lightly rotating posture, neck extension, shoulder lines stretched, hands forming soft guide lines, enhancing picture rhythm and feminine soft tension.

Lighting System:
Cinematic lighting. Key light: warm gold front-side light focusing on face and skin highlights. Fill light: cold ambient light shaping volume and space. Rim light outlining hair and neck silhouette. Highlights controlled without overexposure, shadows retaining details, soft transition of facial light and shadow.

Art Style:
Ultra-realistic CG portrait merged with Oriental freehand charm, slight hazy aesthetics.

Atmosphere and Texture:
Dreamy, subtle, high-end atmosphere of Oriental aesthetics; blurred background to weaken environment and strengthen character; slight film grain + soft focus glow to enhance emotion and texture.

Color System:
Main colors: rouge pink, gold. Auxiliary colors: cold blue-gray. Overall low saturation and high quality, avoiding gaudiness.

Lens parameters:
85mm portrait lens, f1.4–f2, shallow depth of field, cinematic framing.

Quality:
ultra detailed, 8K–16K, extreme detail, high resolution, cinematic lighting.

Aspect Ratio:
{argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"}
title: Tang Dynasty Aesthetic CG Illustration
description: A highly detailed prompt for creating an elegant Eastern beauty in a traditional Tang Dynasty style with cinematic lighting.

content:
Create a charming hand-drawn vintage travel scrapbook poster about {argument name="city name" default="北京"}, designed as a Chinese-language illustrated tourist guide page on warm aged paper lying on a wooden tabletop. The composition is a single vertical poster with a slightly worn notebook-page look, soft stains, folded corners, tape marks, stamp-like ink smudges, and a casual collage aesthetic. At the top center, place large bold black Chinese calligraphy for {argument name="city name" default="北京"}, with the English word {argument name="english city name" default="Beijing"} underneath in loose blue brush script. Near the title, add a small red seal stamp and a short Chinese text block on the upper right describing the geographic location of the city in dark blue handwritten-style Chinese characters.

Below the title, include 4 taped polaroid-style travel photos arranged in a slightly uneven row, each with a handwritten English caption on the white border. Photo 1: the Forbidden City at sunset with golden reflections and warm orange light, captioned about warm golden tones. Photo 2: the Great Wall winding across green mountains under a bright sky, captioned about Great Wall of China landscape and green mountains. Photo 3: Beihai Park lake with willow branches, boats, and a white stupa in the background, captioned about a serene lake view. Photo 4: a traditional hutong alley with gray brick walls and hanging red lanterns, captioned about red lanterns and a charming narrow street. Use different decorative tape patterns above the photos.

Arrange the lower two-thirds like an illustrated infographic with colorful doodles and handwritten Chinese headings in red and blue. Include 5 main content sections: a geographic description block at the top right; a “best travel season” section on the left with Chinese text recommending spring and autumn, decorated with a leaf doodle and a small sun icon; a “main attractions and features” section on the left-middle listing exactly 3 items in Chinese with bullet points: Forbidden City, Badaling Great Wall, and Shichahai & hutongs, accompanied by line-art sketches of a palace pavilion, the Great Wall, hutong houses, and a small tricycle; a “must-eat foods” section on the lower left listing exactly 3 foods in Chinese with bullet points: Peking duck, zhajiangmian, and douzhi, alongside cute food illustrations of a roast duck platter, a bowl of noodles with chopsticks, and a surprised face doodle; and a “tips” section near the lower middle with exactly 2 advice lines in Chinese, each with a small icon, one about wearing comfortable shoes because attractions are large, and one about booking tickets in advance because holidays are crowded.

Add a small outline map of China near the center-right with Beijing marked by a red star and a curved arrow pointing to it. Place a traditional stone guardian lion illustration on the right side with a comic-style handwritten Chinese callout bubble saying it is super imposing. Add a highlighted recommendation box with a scalloped red outline containing exactly 2 recommended places in Chinese: Temple of Heaven Park with a note about praying for good harvests, and Nanluoguxiang; decorate this box with 2 architectural illustrations, one of the Temple of Heaven and one of a traditional gate building. At the very bottom, include a bold handwritten Chinese quote line in dark blue with red emphasis marks, plus 3 doodles beside it: a retro camera, the Bird’s Nest stadium with a small red heart, and the CCTV Headquarters building.

content: Create a vintage Korean food poster infographic on aged beige parchment paper with worn texture, darkened edges, subtle stains, and an ornate traditional frame in muted green. The design is a single vertically stacked poster with 4 clearly separated sections and all text rendered sharply in Korean and English calligraphy. At the top, place a large ribbon banner with bold black Korean brush lettering reading "정통 한국 김밥" and a smaller ribbon subtitle reading "Traditional Korean Gimbap". In the upper-left corner, include a small modern badge that says "Pollo AI" and "GPT Image 2". The centerpiece of the top section is a large blue-and-white porcelain platter piled with exactly 12 sliced gimbap pieces, each showing white rice, yellow egg, orange carrot, green spinach, and dark seaweed wrapping, illustrated in a hand-drawn ink-and-watercolor style. To the right of the platter, add a small blue-and-white bowl of kimchi and a handwritten Korean note reading "간단해 보여도 정성이 들어간 한국의 맛!" with a small red heart, plus a small red seal stamp containing Korean characters. Add faint traditional landscape and floral ink painting details in the background, including a flowering branch on the left and misty mountains on the right. The second section is an ingredient row under a ribbon label reading "재료", showing exactly 6 numbered ingredients in separate compartments from left to right: 1. "김 (건김)" as a stack of dark seaweed sheets, 2. "밥 (양념 밥)" as a bowl of white rice, 3. "계란 (지단용)" as yellow egg strips on a plate, 4. "당근 (채썰어볶기)" as orange julienned carrots on a plate, 5. "시금치 (데쳐서 무치기)" as seasoned green spinach in a bowl, 6. "단무지 (김밥용)" as yellow pickled radish strips on a plate. The third section is a 6-panel step-by-step tutorial under a ribbon label reading "만드는 순서", arranged in two rows of three with arrows indicating flow. Panel 1 is labeled "1 밥 간하기" and shows a bowl of rice with a wooden spoon, a bottle of sesame oil, and salt, with caption "밥에 참기름 소금으로 간하기". Panel 2 is labeled "2 속재료 준비하기" and shows a cutting board with yellow egg strips, orange carrots, green spinach, and a knife, with caption "재료 볶아 속재료 준비하기". Panel 3 is labeled "3 김과 밥 펴기" and shows a bamboo mat with a seaweed sheet covered with white rice and a wooden rice paddle, with caption "김에 밥 얇게 펴기". Panel 4 is labeled "4 속재료 얹기" and shows the rice-covered seaweed with neat horizontal rows of yellow egg, orange carrot, and green spinach, with caption "속재료를 차례로 얹기". Panel 5 is labeled "5 단단하게 말기" and shows two hands rolling the bamboo mat tightly, with caption "김밥을 단단하게 말기". Panel 6 is labeled "6 썰어 완성하기" and shows a chef knife slicing a roll into pieces on a cutting board, with caption "먹기 좋게 썰어 완성!". At the bottom, add a wide banner with large expressive Korean brush calligraphy reading "정성 가득한 한 줄의 행복!" and a small red heart, surrounded by floral decorations and a red square seal with the character "福". Overall style: traditional Korean folk poster mixed with cookbook infographic, detailed pen-and-ink outlines, watercolor fills, warm sepia palette, nostalgic handmade print aesthetic, balanced composition, crisp legible typography, highly accurate Korean text rendering.

description: This prompt generates a detailed retro-style Korean infographic poster for gimbap, suitable for food marketing, menu art, or culturally themed recipe illustrations.

content: I am creating a magazine page with the theme of "visual polyglot". The title in the center of the image should be "{argument name="title" default="Create Everything at Once"}". Create a piece of art celebrating visual creations, not limited to beautiful photographs but also across the full breadth of human visual culture and natural visual elements. There should be curated collage representing the diverse distribution: scientific diagrams, the periodic table, the solar system, medieval manuscript pages, botanical illustrations, anatomical drawings, old maps, climate charts, engineering schematics, transit signage, multilingual text, comic panels, UI screenshots, a camera photo, a butterfly specimen, pie charts, architectural blueprints, and façade drawings. The text frames the model as fluent across languages, notation systems, interfaces, cultural forms, and visual conventions—able to move from utility to beauty, from document understanding to artistic generation. Also feature artistic elements like pixel art, styles, history, sculpture, nature, photography, paintings, and all art forms. These are just examples, I need you to actively think about other elements / styles that may fit in a good design that's not limited to these concepts. The overall effect is that of a premium research announcement or museum-style manifesto: elegant, ambitious, and designed to argue that image intelligence should be trained on the whole visual world, not just polished aesthetics. Use an unstructured, creative and artistic layout, such as but not limited to fan out, avoid grid-like layouts. Portrait 4:5 aspect ratio. Don't add any content text beside the "Create Everything at Once" title. Text as part of the art is okay. Avoid a beige tint of the overall style, since we want vibrant elements to be vibrant.
title: Visual Polyglot Magazine Collage
description: A complex collage prompt for a magazine page that blends various scientific, artistic, and technical diagrams to celebrate visual culture.

content: A polished Japanese promotional poster for a community and sustainability project called {argument name="project name" default="セカイムラ"}, designed like a premium eco-lifestyle campaign flyer. Vertical layout, clean and elegant, with a soft cream paper background and a luminous, aspirational mood. The top half is dominated by a giant translucent globe centered in the composition, glowing with warm sunrise light from the upper right. Inside the globe is a breathtaking aerial landscape of a green mountain valley opening to a calm blue bay or lake, with tiny villages and fields below, cinematic and utopian. Over the globe, place a smaller Japanese slogan line reading {argument name="tagline text" default="世界は1つの村になる。"} and beneath it the large main title in bold dark navy Japanese calligraphic lettering: {argument name="main title text" default="セカイムラ"}. Around the globe, create a collage of exactly 8 candid lifestyle photos fading into the edges: 1) top left, two people in conversation outdoors under trees; 2) upper left-mid, several people working together in a rice paddy; 3) left middle, a circle gathering inside a rustic wooden structure at night; 4) lower left, two portrait-style figures in nature; 5) top right, a group sharing a meal at a long table in warm indoor light; 6) right middle, a person tending plants or crops; 7) right lower-mid, a line of people holding hands on a ridge at sunset; 8) lower right, a close portrait of a person eating or holding food. The photographic style should feel human, communal, slightly idealized, with soft depth of field, natural skin tones, golden-hour highlights, and smooth ad-poster compositing. The bottom half contains 3 evenly spaced feature cards on a light cream background, separated by subtle vertical dividers. Card 1 on the left has the heading "セカイムラ 新月会" in dark blue, a circular photo of a nighttime campfire circle, and a short block of Japanese descriptive text below. Card 2 in the center has the heading "セカイムラ 満月会" in warm gold, a circular photo of an indoor evening gathering under string lights, decorative radiating sunburst lines around the circle, and a short block of Japanese descriptive text below. Card 3 on the right has the heading "セカイムラ 米部が今の一押し" in green, small rice plant illustrations near the title, a circular photo of a wooden bowl of white rice, and a short block of Japanese descriptive text below. Under these cards, add a centered Japanese statement line in dark blue: {argument name="footer slogan" default="人・自然・文化がつながり、循環する未来を一緒につくる。"}. Beneath that, place 4 small icon-and-text items in a horizontal row, each with a simple thin-line icon and two-line Japanese label: 1) people icon with "つながる 仲間と出会える"; 2) house icon with "まなぶ 暮らしを学べる"; 3) sprout icon with "つくる 未来を共につくる"; 4) globe icon with "ひろがる 世界にひろげる". At the very bottom center, include a circular logo mark followed by the project name in Japanese, and underneath a website URL: {argument name="website URL" default="www.sekaimura.com"}. Add a small QR code at the bottom right with tiny Japanese text indicating details are on the website. Use a refined palette of deep navy, forest green, gold, cream, and sky blue. Overall style: high-end Japanese nonprofit poster, eco-community branding, inspirational, harmonious, photoreal collage with subtle graphic design elements, balanced typography, soft glows, and magazine-quality print finish.

content: A photorealistic Japanese DVD cover styled like a commercial live-action comedy-thriller release, shot vertically with glossy retail packaging design. The cover shows a hospital room interior with soft beige walls, a bed, curtains on the right, and subtle medical fixtures in the background. In the center foreground, 1 seated young Japanese woman in a loose light-blue hospital gown sits on a bed, looking confused and vulnerable. Around her stand 3 young Japanese female medical staff: 2 nurses in pale pink uniforms with matching nurse caps and ID badges, and 1 doctor in a white coat with a stethoscope. Each of the 3 standing women is holding up a smartphone toward the camera, and each phone screen shows the seated woman’s face or body as if her consciousness has been transferred into their devices, creating a body-jack possession theme. The overall tone is playful, absurd, and slightly eerie, like a Japanese idol movie or hospital comedy DVD jacket. Use a polished magazine-quality layout with bold Japanese typography and colorful pop graphics. At the very top, place a small blue publisher logo on the left reading {argument name="studio name" default="DRILL PRESENTS"} with a heart icon, and a blue DVD VIDEO logo on the top right. Across the top center, add a pink Japanese banner line reading "シリーズ最新作！". Below it, make the main title huge, rounded, glossy, and bubbly in pink and blue Japanese text: {argument name="main title" default="ボディジャック"}. Under the title, add a pink subtitle in Japanese: {argument name="subtitle" default="～私のカラダ、乗っ取られました～"}. Add 3 comic-style speech bubbles near the upper characters: one saying "あなたのカラダ、私たちが使わせてもらうわね", one saying "これで私たちの思い通り♡", and 1 yellow startled reaction near the seated woman that reads "?!". On the left spine area, create a white vertical strip with blue and pink Japanese text repeating the title and subtitle, plus a small pink circle label reading "新作". At the bottom center, place a large flashy Japanese catchphrase in mixed pink, blue, white, and yellow outlined lettering: "人気アイドルのカラダと魂をめぐる、ドタバタ病院コメディ！" with small stars and heart doodles around it. On the lower right, add a blue circular burst with yellow and white Japanese text: "笑って、ドキドキ！悪ノリ注意の病院乗っ取り大作戦♡". Along the bottom edge, include exactly 4 small rectangular preview stills from the film, each bordered like DVD scene thumbnails, showing the same hospital characters in slightly different poses; add short Japanese captions on each thumbnail, including lines similar to "計画はバッチリ！", "え…どういうこと…？", "さあ、始めましょうか♡", and "助けて…私のカラダ…！". In the lower left margin include DVD package metadata in black text such as catalog number "DBJ-002", duration "120min.", "COLOR", and price "¥3,980 (税抜)", plus a small blue-and-pink DRILL logo. Bright retail-ready composition, realistic people, commercial Japanese movie jacket aesthetics, slightly campy, high-resolution, clean print design.

content:
Using the attached character, generate the following:

# Instructions
Create a minimalist theater-style vertical poster for {argument name="user input" default="[user input]"} using monochrome + {argument name="accent color" default="one accent color"}.

# Layout Requirements
- Place the title largely in the bottom 1/4 area, with the Japanese title at maximum size and the English subtitle small directly underneath.
- Place a catchphrase (1-2 lines) in the top center.
- Stack 3-4 awards/official certification badges vertically in the top-left corner.
- Place a vertical catchphrase (2-3 lines) along the right edge.
- Position the main character as a silhouette from behind, slightly left of the center.
- Represent fantastical elements (floating islands, giant creatures) in the background as silhouettes.
- Place staff credits, release date, and distribution info in a small horizontal line at the bottom.
- Highlight the release date in a large font at the bottom right.

# Design Requirements
- Keep the background monochrome (black to gray gradient).
- Use only one accent color (e.g., vivid cobalt blue or gold).
- Combine silhouette and thin line art styles.
- Emphasize the title text with white + the accent color.
- Create a cinematic and artistic atmosphere overall.
- Avoid colorful backgrounds, excessive decoration, or heavy use of gradients.
- Format: Vertical, aspect ratio 2:3, high resolution.
title: Minimalist Cinematic Vertical Poster with Character Reference
description: A sophisticated prompt for creating minimalist, monochrome posters with single accent colors while maintaining character consistency from a reference image.

content: A bright, hyper-energetic Japanese movie poster illustration in a polished anime chibi style, set in a sparkling tropical ocean adventure scene. Center the composition on 2 cute chibi children riding a smiling blue shark that leaps diagonally upward through swirling seawater and white splash effects. The left child is a boy with short black hair, huge glossy blue eyes, a happy open-mouth smile, a black T-shirt, dark shorts, white sneakers, and a light blue shark hoodie with a tooth-edged hood framing his face; he points upward with one hand and hugs the shark with the other. The right child is a girl with orange hair, large glossy purple eyes, a joyful open-mouth smile, an orange dress, pink shoes, and a pink shark hoodie with a tooth-edged hood; she throws one arm wide in excitement while holding on with the other. Make the shark large and friendly with a rounded body, pale belly, tiny black eyes, and a wide open mouth. Surround them with a vivid underwater-and-surface world: schools of small tropical fish, exactly 1 sea turtle on the left, exactly 1 dolphin on the right, exactly 1 pink octopus on the right, exactly 1 pufferfish on the lower left, coral reefs and sea plants along the bottom edges, air bubbles throughout, and strong blue water motion lines. In the upper background, show a sunny sky with dramatic sun rays streaming into the water, fluffy clouds, 2 seagulls flying, a rocky tropical island with palm trees on the upper left, and a pirate ship on the upper right with white sails and a cute shark emblem. Add a ship wheel partly visible behind the main title. Use a dense, exciting Japanese kids-anime promotional layout with oversized 3D lettering and explosive effects. At the top, place the giant Japanese title text {argument name="headline text" default="サメなの ワクワク 大作戦"} in stacked lines, with glossy blue, orange-pink, and yellow-orange gradient letters, thick white outlines, dark blue shadows, water splashes, and sparkles. Beneath the title, add a smaller curved Japanese tagline in white with blue outline: {argument name="tagline" default="さあ、海のむこうへ！最高の冒険がはじまる！"}. At the bottom, place huge release text in Japanese, {argument name="release text" default="2026年 夏公開"}, in bold red-to-yellow gradient 3D letters with white and blue edging, sitting over a radiant orange burst. On the lower right, add a blue starburst badge with the Japanese text {argument name="badge text" default="ドキドキ！ワクワク！いっしょに出発だ！"} in white and yellow. Include exactly 2 treasure-themed corner props: an open treasure chest with gold coins at the lower left and a compass at the lower right. The overall look should be glossy, saturated, family-friendly, whimsical, cinematic, and toy-like, with crisp outlines, exaggerated expressions, high contrast, and a poster-ready vertical composition. No photorealism, no muted colors, no minimalism.
title: Chibi Shark Adventure Movie Poster
description: A colorful Japanese-style anime poster for a children’s ocean adventure film, ideal for recreating bold promotional key art with cute characters and dramatic title typography.

content: A highly detailed glossy anime idol portrait in a vertical composition, showing a cute teenage girl from the waist up in a dreamy pink kawaii aesthetic. She has {argument name="hair color" default="pastel pink"} hair styled in a very long voluminous high ponytail with soft bangs and flowing curled strands, decorated with multiple small heart clips and crossed hairpins. Her eyes are large, sparkling, and vivid {argument name="eye color" default="emerald green"}, with star-like highlights, long lashes, and a slightly teary shine. She has a soft blush, tiny glossy lips, and an affectionate expression while applying {argument name="lipstick color" default="bright pink"} lipstick, holding the lipstick tube delicately with both hands near her mouth. She wears a frilly black-and-pink gothic lolita idol dress with lace, ribbons, bows, heart ornaments, and sparkling textures, plus 1 black lace bow headband with a pink jeweled heart, 3 visible hair accessories on her bangs, 1 pair of dangling heart earrings, and 1 black choker with a small heart charm. Surround the character with a glowing, glitter-filled, candy-pink background full of bokeh, sparkles, soft neon light effects, and idol-fan atmosphere. Add 5 glowing hand-drawn heart text bubbles in Japanese around her, reading: "かわいすぎてごめん…♡", "推してくれてありがとうっ♡", "ずーっとだいすきっ♡", "世界でいちばんの推しになってね…♡", and "ずっと一緒だよ？約束ね…♡". Include a small decorated photo card or poster of the same girl in the upper right background. Ultra-polished illustration, dense shimmer, romantic lighting, glossy highlights, intricate lace detail, soft-focus background, saturated pink palette, adorable idol poster feel.

content: A breathtaking anime movie poster at golden-hour sunset, vertical theatrical one-sheet composition, painted in the polished cinematic style of a Makoto Shinkai-inspired youth drama. The scene overlooks a Japanese coastal hillside town descending toward a glowing bay, with the sun low on the horizon and its reflection stretching across calm water. The sky dominates most of the image: a vast deep-blue to lavender twilight gradient filled with countless stars, wispy pink and peach clouds, and one especially bright star near the upper right. In the foreground on the right, a teenage schoolgirl stands in three-quarter side profile facing left toward the sea, shown from mid-thigh up, with shoulder-length dark hair blowing in the breeze, a short-sleeved white sailor-style school blouse, a red ribbon at the collar, and a navy pleated skirt; her expression is contemplative and wistful. Farther down the steep stone stair street in the center-left, a teenage schoolboy stands with his back to the viewer, wearing a short-sleeved white shirt and dark trousers, also looking toward the sunset and ocean. At the lower right, include 1 black cat sitting on a wall or rooftop edge in silhouette, looking toward the town. At the lower left, include 1 old-fashioned streetlamp and a dense cluster of blooming hydrangeas in blue and violet along a stone wall. The town below is packed with tiled rooftops, narrow streets, warm window lights, and layered houses, with distant mountains framing the bay. Use dramatic rim light, luminous atmospheric perspective, sparkling highlights, delicate cloud detail, and emotional, nostalgic color grading in indigo, ultramarine, pink, peach, and gold. Design it explicitly as a Japanese animated film poster with elegant typography integrated into the artwork: large hand-brushed Japanese title text across the upper-left to center reading {argument name="title text" default="星をつなぐ約束のうた"}, smaller English subtitle beneath it reading {argument name="English subtitle" default="The Song of Promises"}, a small award-laurel line in Japanese at the top left, 1 vertical Japanese tagline along the upper-right edge, 4 cast names in Japanese centered near the bottom, a release date at the lower left reading {argument name="release date" default="8.23"} with "ROADSHOW" below, 1 pink Japanese tagline across the lower center, and a website/social handle at the lower right. Ultra-detailed anime key visual, romantic and melancholic, premium feature-film poster finish.
title: Anime Sunset Film Poster
description: This prompt generates a polished Japanese anime movie poster featuring two students overlooking a seaside town at sunset, ideal for cinematic key visuals and romantic drama promotional art.

content:
A gigantic ultra-detailed fantasy mandala poster featuring exactly 108 distinct chibi characters arranged in concentric circular rings around a radiant central emblem. The composition is perfectly symmetrical overall and fills a wide horizontal canvas like an ornate collectible mural. In the center, place a glowing golden core with 9 chibi animal-fantasy mascots clustered in a circular medallion, each with oversized heads, tiny bodies, expressive eyes, and luxurious costume details. Surround this center with multiple evenly spaced concentric rings containing the remaining 99 characters, each character occupying its own wedge-like segment and designed as a unique elemental or mythical variation. Include fox-like, rabbit-like, cat-like, wolf-like, lion-like, bird-like, dragon-like, deer-like, and hybrid beast characters, all rendered in a cute super-deformed style but with epic high-fantasy armor, robes, crowns, feathers, horns, gems, capes, staffs, and magical accessories. Make every character visually distinct through color, silhouette, species traits, and elemental theme, while preserving a unified painterly anime-fantasy aesthetic.

Use a rich palette dominated by luminous gold, ivory, cream, violet, indigo, sapphire, and soft amber, with accents of crimson, icy cyan, emerald, and sunset orange. Give the image the feel of a sacred celestial chart or zodiac wheel, with each circular band separated by elegant gilded borders and arc dividers. Add glowing magical energy, sparkles, halos, swirling fire, mist, snow, clouds, water splashes, lightning curls, floral motifs, and celestial particles around many of the characters. Around the outer perimeter, place several larger decorative guardian illustrations integrated into the border: a bright sun medallion at the upper left, a white phoenix-like bird in a circular panel at the upper right, a floral or starburst medallion at the lower right, and a fiery character cluster in a circular panel at the lower left, plus additional large elemental beast figures embedded along the left and right edges. Frame the entire artwork with an elaborate antique ornamental border inspired by illuminated manuscripts and fantasy tarot designs, using filigree, corner medallions, geometric trim, and arcane motifs.

The rendering should be extremely dense and crisp, like a 4k fantasy illustration meant for a poster print, with tiny readable character silhouettes across the whole image, intricate linework, soft watercolor-textured shading, glowing highlights, and a polished collectible-card-game concept art finish. Emphasize abundance, harmony, and radial order: exactly 108 chibi figures total, arranged as a majestic mandala of mythical elemental mascots.
title: 108 Chibi Fantasy Mandala
description: A highly detailed wide fantasy poster showing exactly 108 unique chibi mythical creatures arranged in concentric mandala rings, ideal for decorative key art or showcase illustrations.

Show a sunlit coastal road curving along a stone waterfront in Valletta, viewed from slightly above and behind a classic white 1960s sedan driving away from the viewer in the lower left foreground; the rear license plate reads {argument name="license plate" default="MTA 1964"}. Across the harbor, depict warm honey-colored limestone buildings climbing the hillside, including 1 large domed church, 1 tall narrow church spire, rows of historic townhouses with several colorful enclosed wooden balconies, and distant city walls stretching across the opposite shoreline. In the bay, include exactly 3 traditional Maltese fishing boats in vivid blue, yellow, red, and green, plus 2 tiny white sailboats farther back. Add exactly 4 white seagulls flying across a brilliant turquoise-blue sky with soft white clouds. Frame the whole composition with dark leafy trees and abundant bright magenta bougainvillea blossoms arching in from the top and right edges, with more flowers in the lower right corner, creating a lush border around the scene. Include a palm tree among the waterfront buildings and a spiky agave plant in the lower left foreground. Use warm golden sunlight, saturated coastal colors, romantic vacation-poster composition, clean readable typography, and a nostalgic, idealized Mediterranean atmosphere.

content: A dark epic sci-fi movie poster for {argument name="film title" default="EMPIRE OF THE VOID"}, in a highly cinematic photorealistic space-opera style. Centered composition with a tall alien emperor standing behind a massive circular command table, viewed from slightly below to make the figure feel imposing and godlike. The emperor wears ornate black and gunmetal biomechanical armor with sharp layered pauldrons, engraved metallic filigree, a long dark cloak, and a regal elongated helmet-crown. The face is mostly obscured in shadow, giving a mysterious, intimidating presence. One large clawed hand rests prominently on the glowing table in the foreground. The command table displays a luminous spiral galaxy hologram in blue-violet tones, with concentric interface rings and subtle cosmic light. The setting is the bridge of a colossal starship or throne room, with two curved panoramic windows framing outer space. Outside the windows are 8 visible spacecraft total: 4 on the left side and 4 on the right side, including several large battleships and smaller escort vessels. A huge planet fills much of the left background, while the right background shows a purple-blue nebula and starfield. Two secondary alien officers are seated in the mid-background, 1 on the left and 1 on the right, each at glowing futuristic control consoles. The color palette is deep black, steel gray, indigo, violet, and cold blue, with dramatic rim lighting, glossy metallic reflections, and dense atmospheric shadows. The layout should feel like a premium blockbuster poster: a centered top tagline in small uppercase text reading {argument name="tagline" default="INTELLIGENCE. DOMINION. DESTINY. THE GALAXY BOWS TO NONE."}, the giant title near the bottom in elegant spaced serif capitals with the words {argument name="main title" default="EMPIRE"} on the first line and {argument name="subtitle" default="OF THE VOID"} below it, with the letter O stylized as a glowing black-hole eclipse. Beneath that, add a glowing imperial trident-like emblem centered above the release line {argument name="release text" default="COMING SOON"}. At the very bottom, include a dense strip of tiny production credits in authentic movie-poster typography. Ultra-detailed, symmetrical, ominous, imperial, galactic conquest mood, vertical one-sheet poster, premium VFX key art, sharp focus, high contrast, dramatic sci-fi lighting.
title: Dark Space Emperor Movie Poster
description: A cinematic sci-fi poster showing an armored alien ruler on a starship bridge, ideal for blockbuster space-opera key art and film promotion.

content: A surreal cinematic outdoor portrait of a masked archer standing in a dry field under a deep clear blue sky, framed from about the knees up in a wide horizontal composition. The central figure is a woman-like person in a vintage prairie-style dress and matching headscarf, aiming a simple wooden longbow toward the left side of the frame with an arrow drawn back to the cheek. Her face is fully obscured by a soft rectangular blur or blocky censorship patch, creating an uncanny anonymous effect. The dress is sage green with long puffed sleeves, a gathered waist tied with a sash, and a tiny repeating red-and-white floral dot pattern. A red cloth or scarf is wrapped around the lower face and neck beneath the green head covering. Surrounding her are 12 animals total: 8 white birds flying across the sky at different distances, 2 larger white birds standing on the ground at the right side, 1 deer head entering from the lower left foreground, and 1 sheep or goat head entering from the lower right foreground. Add 1 red-headed crane-like bird at the far right edge, visible in profile. The image should feel dreamlike, strange, and symbolic rather than realistic, with crisp midday sunlight, rich saturated colors, soft film grain, and a slightly vintage editorial-photography look. Use low-angle perspective, dynamic diagonal lines from the bow and arrow, and layered animal placement to create tension and motion. Dry grasses appear at the bottom edge, but the background is mostly open sky. Highly detailed fabric folds, natural bird wing positions, and a balanced surreal composition.
title: Surreal Archer With Birds and Animals
description: This prompt generates a dreamlike cinematic fashion-style portrait of a masked archer surrounded by birds and animals, useful for surreal editorial or fine-art image creation.

content:
Create a square infographic-style illustration showing a {argument name="grid size" default="15×15"} invention timeline grid rendered as a collection of miniature isometric dioramas on aged parchment tiles. The image should look like a curated historical poster that spans from {argument name="starting year" default="1000 BC"} to {argument name="ending year" default="2026"}, with one invention per tile and no repeats. Show the visible portion as a 5 by 5 section of the larger grid, for a total of 25 labeled tiles, arranged in neat rows and columns with thin dark borders. Every tile contains a unique world-changing invention depicted as a small handcrafted diorama with era-appropriate materials, colors, and background details. Use a warm antiquarian palette for ancient and medieval inventions, sepia technical-document tones for early modern inventions, and cooler neon-blue futuristic lighting for modern digital and biotech inventions. Surround the grid with an old-map border and subtle historical cartography textures, blending into faint modern network graphics near the bottom right.

Label each visible tile with a small beige caption tag in bold black text. Include exactly these 25 visible inventions in reading order from top left to bottom right: 1) {argument name="first tile label" default="1000 BC"} tile showing an iron plow and simple hand tools in a farm field, captioned "Iron Plow & Tools"; 2) "Concept of Zero" shown as a parchment-like tile with a carved zero symbol and a blue hourglass; 3) "Water Clock" shown as a wooden water-timing device; 4) "Catapult" shown as a wooden siege engine; 5) "Antikythera Mechanism" shown as an intricate bronze gear device in a stone niche; 6) "Concrete" shown as a wheelbarrow filled with wet cement or mortar; 7) "Wheelbarrow" shown as a simple wooden one-wheel cart; 8) "Windmill" shown as a traditional mill on grassy ground; 9) "Gunpowder" shown as a barrel and a mound of black powder with smoke; 10) "Printing Press" shown as a wooden press framed by classical columns; 11) "Mechanical Clock" shown as an ornate standing clock; 12) "Telescope" shown as an early brass telescope on a tripod with sketch-like scientific notes; 13) "Steam Engine" shown on a blue blueprint-style tile with an early locomotive engine; 14) "Electric Battery" shown on a blueprint-like tile with two cylindrical battery cells and wiring; 15) "Telegraph" shown as a Morse telegraph key on technical paper; 16) "Light Bulb" shown glowing warmly on a neutral pedestal; 17) "Automobile" shown as an early red motorcar on a workshop-plan background; 18) "Airplane" shown as a commercial jet aircraft in miniature; 19) "Transistor" shown as a black microchip on a luminous circuit-board tile; 20) "Personal Computer" shown as a beige desktop computer with CRT monitor and keyboard; 21) "World Wide Web" shown as a glowing blue globe over digital circuitry; 22) "Smartphone" shown as a sleek modern phone on a neon-tech background; 23) "CRISPR-Cas9" shown as a DNA double helix in a biotech-blue display tile; 24) "Reusable Rocket" shown as several upright rockets launching with exhaust clouds; 25) "AI (LLMs)" shown as glowing large letters AI in a holographic tech cube; 26) "Brain-Computer Interface" shown as a glowing brain hologram on a blue platform; 27) "Advanced Neural Interface (Implant)" shown as a transparent human head profile with a glowing brain implant, with a small top label reading "2026".

Keep the composition highly organized, poster-like, and visually dense, with each tile readable at a glance. Use slight isometric perspective, crisp linework, painterly shading, and polished editorial illustration quality. The overall feeling should combine museum poster, educational timeline, and imaginative historical-tech diorama art.
title: Historical Invention Timeline Grid
description: This prompt generates a parchment-styled educational poster showing a grid of labeled invention dioramas across history, ideal for timeline infographics and world-changing technology comparisons.

content: A dramatic ultra-wide aerial tiny-planet photograph of {argument name="city name" default="Canakkale"}, Turkey, rendered as a full 360-degree stereographic projection so the city and waterfront form a compact spherical world surrounded by a swirling ring of blue sky and white clouds. The viewpoint is high above the shoreline in bright daytime with crisp summer light, realistic colors, and strong photographic detail. Place the large hillside sign reading {argument name="landmark sign text" default="Canakkale"} prominently across the center of the miniature planet. On the left-upper side of the sphere, show a tall pale stone clock tower with a small red Turkish flag at the top, surrounded by dense urban blocks with red-tiled roofs and mid-rise buildings. On the right side, include a vivid blue harbor with 2 white passenger ferries docked along the waterfront and a long curving coastline extending into the distance. In the lower-right quadrant, feature the monumental dark wooden Trojan horse statue on a circular plaza. In the lower-left quadrant, include the large rectangular concrete memorial structure set within green parkland. Cover the planet with winding pedestrian paths, lawns, trees, and landscaped gardens, with city streets and waterfront promenades visible around the edges. Use a highly realistic drone-photo look, deep depth of field, sharp textures, slightly exaggerated fisheye distortion from the tiny-planet projection, and a majestic travel-poster composition emphasizing the contrast between the green park, historic landmarks, and sparkling sea.
title: Tiny Planet Aerial of Canakkale
description: This prompt generates a realistic 360-degree tiny-planet drone view of Canakkale's waterfront landmarks, ideal for travel imagery and city-poster visuals.
