content: A hyper-detailed French popular science magazine cover in the style of a bold mainstream newsstand publication, full-page vertical layout, dramatic glossy print design, black background with intense neon lighting and saturated red, blue, purple, green, and orange highlights. At the very top, a wide red masthead bar with the magazine title {argument name="magazine title" default="SCIENCE & VIE"} in huge white serif capital letters with subtle beveling and metallic shine; small issue details on the upper right in tiny white text. On the upper left, a bright yellow and black special tag reading {argument name="special tag" default="SPÉCIAL PHOTONIQUE"} with a red arrow motif. The main headline dominates most of the upper half in gigantic white block capitals with a red glow and slight 3D shadow: {argument name="main headline" default="LA PHOTONIQUE RÉVOLUTIONNE TOUT !"}. Beneath it, 3 short cover lines in smaller white text with selected words highlighted in yellow, discussing ultrafast light-speed chips, a French record computer called Lucy, and light trapped for millions of cycles for energy-efficient AI. Centerpiece image: a futuristic square photonic processor chip floating in space at a slight perspective tilt, extremely detailed circuitry, metallic screws at the corners, glowing traces, and a bright cyan-blue core display labeled {argument name="chip name" default="Lucy"}; the chip emits intersecting beams and flowing fiber-optic light trails in electric blue, magenta, orange, and violet that radiate outward across the page. Background behind the chip shows 2 luminous server-wall corridors, red on the left and green on the right, fading into darkness, suggesting a high-tech datacenter. At the bottom, the curved horizon of Earth from space with a soft blue atmospheric glow and scattered city lights. Add 4 side callout boxes total: 2 stacked on the left and 2 stacked on the right, each with yellow headers and white body text, using a magazine cover typography hierarchy. Left box 1 header: "EXCLUSIF", featuring Lucy as the most powerful French photonic quantum computer in the world, with several short bullet lines and a yellow emphasis on "12 qubits". Left box 2 header: "RECORD MONDIAL", about light trapped for millions of cycles in a chip, with yellow emphasis on "millions de cycles". Right box 1 header area in yellow, with a bold red percentage "+300 %" and text about the French gem Soitec rising thanks to photonic AI and saving datacenters during the energy crisis. Right box 2 header: "ENQUÊTE", about the end of power-hungry GPUs, with yellow-highlighted numeric claims such as 100 times cheaper and 1,000 times faster. Near the lower center, tiny white image-credit text. A thick black bottom banner spans the page with a red square containing a white plus symbol on the left, and a large dossier teaser in white and red text: {argument name="bottom feature text" default="DOSSIER COMPLET Photonique & IA : les 10 avancées qui vont transformer votre quotidien"}. Along the very bottom, add 3 small circular red icon blurbs with short white captions about seismic optical fibers, a new generation of LiDAR and AR, and European sovereignty in progress. Lower right corner includes a white barcode box and a short block of white text about the issue being on sale. Overall look: sensational, prestigious, futuristic, glossy, information-dense, sharp editorial typography, dramatic science-news cover, cinematic lighting, high contrast, photorealistic 3D chip illustration mixed with premium magazine graphic design.
title: Futuristic Photonics Magazine Cover
description: This prompt generates a dramatic French-style science magazine cover centered on a glowing photonic chip, ideal for editorial mockups, tech news covers, and speculative science publication designs.

content: Create a clean corporate Japanese web banner for an AI training service, wide horizontal format around 1200x247. Use a bright white and pale blue office aesthetic with a modern professional business look. The layout has 5 clear text/icon areas plus one human figure on the right. On the left, place a small top tagline in Japanese reading 「AIはじめてでも安心。実践で身につく。」 in medium blue-gray, aligned near the upper left with a subtle dotted accent mark to its far left. Below it, place a very large bold headline in deep blue reading 「{argument name="main headline" default="ClaudeCode研修"}" with the Latin word oversized and the Japanese word continuing on the same line. Under the headline, place 3 evenly spaced rounded white feature boxes with thin blue borders and blue line icons. Box 1 contains an open book icon and the Japanese text 「基礎から丁寧に学べる」. Box 2 contains a laptop icon and the Japanese text 「ハンズオンで実践力がつく」. Box 3 contains a checkmark in a circle icon and the Japanese text 「チーム開発に活かせる知識」. Along the entire bottom, add a full-width deep blue bar with centered white Japanese text 「{argument name="bottom tagline" default="あなたの開発を、次のステージへ。"}". On the right side, show 1 professional Japanese businessman from the waist up, wearing a dark navy or black suit, white shirt, and blue striped tie, arms crossed, facing forward with a confident posture; his face is intentionally blurred or anonymized. Behind him, use a softly blurred modern office interior with bright daylight, glass, and green plants. Add a sweeping curved blue accent ribbon along the far right edge framing the subject. Overall style: premium B2B seminar ad, polished typography, soft gradients, minimal clutter, strong hierarchy, high readability, Japanese enterprise branding, subtle shadows, crisp vector icons, and balanced negative space.
title: Japanese ClaudeCode Training Banner
description: A polished horizontal corporate banner for promoting an AI or coding training program, suitable for web ads, landing pages, and social media marketing.

content: Create a sleek Japanese corporate training banner in a wide horizontal web-ad format with a dark navy-to-deep-blue gradient background, subtle glowing network nodes and connecting lines across the upper and middle area, and a high-tech AI/business atmosphere. Place a confident businessman on the right side from waist-up, wearing a dark navy suit, white dress shirt, and blue striped tie, arms crossed, facing forward; crop him partially at the top and right edge. On the left, create a strong typographic hierarchy with a small cyan headline at the top reading {argument name="headline text" default="AIを活用した開発スキルを、最短で習得"}, then an oversized bold white main title reading {argument name="main title" default="ClaudeCode研修"}. Along the lower-left area, place exactly 3 rounded rectangular feature boxes outlined in bright cyan with dark interiors and cyan icons: box 1 shows a terminal/code icon and the text "Claude Codeの基本と応用", box 2 shows a rocket icon and the text "開発スピードを飛躍的に向上", box 3 shows a two-person/team icon and the text "現場ですぐに活かせるスキル". On the far right, overlay a large cyan angled polygon callout panel with bold dark text in 2 lines reading {argument name="callout text" default="明日からの開発が\n変わる体験を。"}. Use crisp modern sans-serif Japanese typography, strong contrast, polished marketing design, clean spacing, luminous cyan accents, and a premium AI seminar advertisement look.
title: Japanese AI Training Banner
description: This prompt generates a polished wide-format Japanese corporate banner for an AI-powered coding training course, suitable for ads, landing pages, and promotional visuals.

content: Create a clean Japanese corporate training banner in a wide horizontal web-header format with a white background and deep navy blue branding. The layout is a single unified promotional banner for an AI programming course. On the left, place a small headline in bold Japanese text reading "AIを使いこなす開発者へ" above a very large dominant title reading "{argument name="main title" default="ClaudeCode研修"}" in heavy sans-serif dark navy lettering, with "ClaudeCode" especially large and the final Japanese word attached on the right in the same style. Beneath the title, add a long horizontal blue gradient bar from medium blue to very light blue containing white bold Japanese text: "{argument name="subheadline text" default="AI時代の開発を、あなたの武器に。"}". Along the bottom left, arrange exactly 3 circular navy icon badges in a horizontal row, each with a short two-line caption in Japanese to the right of the icon. Badge 1 shows a code symbol </> and the text "Claude Codeの 基本から実践まで". Badge 2 shows a light bulb and the text "業務効率を高める AI活用スキル". Badge 3 shows an upward bar chart and the text "すぐに使える 実践的な内容". On the right half, place a confident Japanese businessman from the waist up with arms crossed, wearing a dark navy suit, white shirt, and blue striped tie, facing forward; his face is intentionally soft-focused or anonymized. Behind him, add layered geometric navy and blue diagonal shapes sweeping in from the top right and bottom right, plus a dark blue tech-themed panel with faint code lines and a glowing curly-braces symbol {}. Use a polished B2B seminar advertisement style, crisp typography, strong negative space, subtle gradients, high contrast, and a professional AI/engineering training atmosphere.

content: A dramatic anime action illustration inside a traditional wooden martial arts hall, captured at a low angle with intense cinematic perspective. In the foreground, a fierce young female martial artist with {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair in a messy high bun tied with red ribbons lunges forward in a deep fighting stance, one fist thrust toward the viewer. She wears a white Chinese-style kung fu top with red trim and tassel frog closures, wide red pants, and black martial arts shoes with red accents. Her expression is focused, aggressive, and determined, with sharp red-tinted eyes. Red energy ribbons and paint-like light trails spiral around her body and punch, scattering sparks and embers. In the upper right, a second young female fighter leaps through the air, partially turned sideways, wearing a dark green qipao-inspired combat dress with ornate gold embroidery, black stockings, and heeled shoes. Her {argument name="second character hair color" default="lavender"} hair is styled in two buns with loose curls and decorative hair ornaments. She casts a martial arts gesture with one hand extended, surrounded by a sweeping arc of luminous blue water-like energy that curves around her body in a near-complete ring. The two elemental forces, red and blue, contrast sharply and imply an imminent clash. The environment is a weathered dojo interior with broken wooden floorboards exploding upward, dust, splinters, and motion debris frozen midair. Warm shafts of light stream through the wooden structure and windows, mixing with glowing particles. Large hanging calligraphy signs are visible, including a central wooden plaque reading {argument name="main sign text" default="武術会"}, with additional vertical banners bearing black Chinese characters on aged paper. Highly detailed anime illustration, dynamic foreshortening, extreme motion, layered effects, rich textures, dramatic rim lighting, fiery warm highlights against cool blue energy, polished concept art quality, vertical composition.
title: Anime Martial Arts Energy Clash

content: A breathtaking fantasy anime illustration of {argument name="character name" default="a celestial shrine maiden"} in a snowy winter night landscape, shown in a graceful full-body dancing pose beside a reflective lake. She has extremely long, flowing {argument name="hair color" default="rose pink"} hair, partially seen from the back and side, with an elaborate gold floral hair ornament and dangling chains. Her face is mostly obscured by the angle. She wears a richly layered, ornate Japanese court kimono inspired by a jūnihitoe, with voluminous sleeves and many overlapping panels in crimson, white, purple, green, gold, and soft pink, decorated with floral brocade, embroidered blossoms, metallic trim, and shimmering patterns. Both arms are raised elegantly as she appears to guide 2 huge arcs of translucent iridescent silk or magical ribbon that spiral around her body in a luminous loop, catching rainbow highlights like soap-film aurora light. The ribbons glow with prismatic reflections and tiny sparkles, framing her against the sky. The setting is a moonlit lakeshore covered in fresh snow, with bare winter trees on the right, a small traditional pavilion or shrine structure across the water on the left, and the bright full moon high in a deep indigo sky filled with dense stars and softly falling snow. The water mirrors the moonlight and glittering particles. Emphasize cinematic lighting, ethereal atmosphere, ultra-detailed fabric textures, dynamic flowing motion, magical sparkle effects, elegant composition, and a dreamlike celestial mood. Highly polished anime key visual, vertical composition, intricate detail, luminous highlights, no text, no watermark.

content: A screenshot-style composition of an AI image generation chat interface on a light gray app background, centered inside a rounded white panel with a soft drop shadow. Near the top is a large pale mint-green chat bubble containing a long Chinese prompt in black sans-serif text, describing a hand-drawn food map of Chengdu. Beneath it, aligned slightly left of center, is a square illustrated map image with rounded corners. The map is a whimsical hand-painted tourist food map titled in large Chinese calligraphy at the upper left: {argument name="headline text" default="成都! 吃货暴走地图"}. The subject is {argument name="city name" default="Chengdu"}, presented as a vintage hand-drawn local cuisine map with warm beige paper texture, watercolor ink outlines, and a playful artisanal travel-poster feel. The map shows simplified streets, landmarks, and district labels in Chinese, not geographically exact, but cute and decorative. Place exactly 12 featured food locations, each marked with a numbered red dot and a small Chinese label, each paired with a detailed illustrated dish. Include 12 dishes total: 1) a bowl of skewers in red chili broth, 2) a bowl of sweet water noodles, 3) rabbit head specialty, 4) guokui or stuffed baked flatbread, 5) hot pot, 6) maocai, 7) dan dan noodles, 8) hongyou chaoshou or chili oil wontons, 9) bobo chicken, 10) fuqi feipian, 11) a spicy stir-fried dish, 12) another classic Chengdu snack platter. Add a few Chengdu landmarks sketched in miniature around the roads, including a pagoda-like tower, traditional gate architecture, modern city buildings, and a central emblematic structure. Frame the entire map with a decorative border made of red chili peppers, green vines, and small leaves. Use a warm color palette dominated by chili red, mustard yellow, olive green, tea brown, and muted jade. In the lower right corner of the map, include a small legend box labeled {argument name="legend title" default="图例说明"} with 4 legend items, each with a tiny icon and Chinese text, plus a compass rose with N, E, S, W. Add many handwritten-style Chinese road names and annotations throughout. Outside the image, the interface includes small gray action icons beneath the green chat bubble on the right, a page indicator reading 2/2, an Edit pill button overlapping the lower left of the map image, a circular download/share button at the lower right of the image, and a sparse bottom toolbar with 4 small reaction/action icons. Overall look: clean modern chat UI presenting a generated square illustration, with the map as the visual focus.
title: Chengdu Hand-Drawn Food Map UI
description: This prompt generates a screenshot-like AI chat interface showcasing a whimsical illustrated Chengdu food map, useful for recreating social media demos of gpt-image-2 outputs.

content: Create a cinematic Japanese naval comparison poster in a highly detailed, photorealistic concept-art style with a warm amber sunset palette, dramatic clouds, glowing backlight, and a premium movie-poster plus technical-reference-sheet layout. The composition is vertically stacked in 2 main zones. In the top hero zone, show 2 large semi-transparent officer portraits facing inward, one on the left in an older imperial-era naval uniform and one on the right in a modern maritime self-defense force style dress uniform, both wearing peaked caps and formal dark coats, with a blazing sunset sky behind them. Centered between them, place a large serif English title reading {argument name="headline text" default="Fog of Two Eras"}, with a smaller Japanese subtitle beneath it reading ふたつの時代の霧, and 2 lines of Japanese tagline text above the title. Below the title, on the ocean at golden hour, show 2 warships moving forward on slightly converging paths: on the left, a massive World War II-era battleship with many large gun turrets, tower superstructure, weathered dark hull, and white bow spray; on the right, a modern gray guided-missile destroyer with hull number 115 visible on the bow, sleek radar-equipped superstructure, and foamy wake. Add exactly 4 helicopters in the sky, 2 on the left side and 2 on the right side, plus a suspension bridge and distant modern city skyline on the horizon. In the lower reference-sheet zone, split the page into 2 vertical panels, left for the historical ship and right for the modern ship, each panel styled like a parchment-toned military specification board with dark blue and dark red header bars, fine dividing lines, inset image boxes, and Japanese labels. The left panel should present exactly 1 large perspective render of the battleship, 3 orthographic ship views beneath it, 5 small labeled equipment/detail thumbnails in a row, 4 small head-and-shoulders uniform portraits, 4 full-body character turnaround views of a male naval officer, and 1 bottom scale silhouette of the ship beside a human figure with a 20m marker. The right panel should present exactly 1 large perspective render of the modern destroyer, 3 orthographic ship views beneath it, 6 small labeled equipment/detail thumbnails arranged around the ship references, 4 small head-and-shoulders uniform portraits, 4 full-body character lineup views including a central female officer in white cap and dark uniform, and 1 bottom scale silhouette of the ship beside a human figure with a 20m marker. Use visible Japanese headers and labels throughout, including a left historical title area and a right title area naming the ship as 護衛艦 あさつ (DDG-115). Make the whole image feel like a museum exhibition poster, military design sheet, and prestige historical sci-fi drama key art combined, with ultra-sharp detail, realistic metal textures, ocean reflections, aged paper panels, symmetrical balance, and polished editorial typography.
title: Two-Era Naval Comparison Poster
description: A cinematic Japanese military-style poster comparing a WWII battleship and a modern destroyer, ideal for presentation covers, history visuals, or dramatic concept key art.

content: Create a cute Japanese preschool hiragana poster in a soft watercolor storybook style on warm textured parchment paper. The composition is a vertical educational chart with a whimsical spring border of grass, flowers, mushrooms, butterflies, and tiny chicks, designed like a children's classroom learning sheet. At the top, place a wooden signboard header with colorful rounded Japanese text reading {argument name="headline text" default="うさぎのひらがな表"}, decorated with 2 white bunny mascots, one sitting on the left and one peeking from the right, plus small flowers and leaves around the sign. Below the header, arrange a clean 5-row by 8-column grid for a total of 40 square cells, each cell outlined in thin brown lines on a cream background. In every cell, place one large brightly colored hiragana character near the top and one small kawaii rabbit illustration below it, each rabbit acting out or holding an object associated with the word written underneath. Use a different cheerful color for many of the hiragana characters, including reds, oranges, yellows, greens, blues, and purples, with a hand-painted rounded font. Keep the text and illustrations exactly as follows, left to right by row: row 1 has 8 cells labeled あ, い, う, う, え, え, お, お with the words あめ, いい, いい, うさぎ, えんぴつ, えんぴつ, おやすり, おにぎり; row 2 has 8 cells labeled か, き, く, け, せ, せ, そ, そ with the words きくら, たま, サベツン, ケーキ, せんせい, そう, そう, しょうこう; row 3 has 8 cells labeled た, ち, ち, つ, て, て, と, と with the words たまご, たまご, ちびこ, つと, てんとうむし, てしなを, とうこ, ほしい; row 4 has 8 cells labeled な, に, ぬ, ふ, め, ね, の, ほ with the words まな, ひこうき, みんきう, ふたう, てつ, へびす, ようこ, ほし; row 5 has 8 cells labeled ま, み, む, る, れ, れ, ろ, ん with the words わた, まくら, みかん, むぎぎ, めがみ, もも, ろうた, ん. The bunny illustrations should be varied and adorable: examples include holding an umbrella, cuddling grapes, drawing with a pencil, eating a rice ball, sitting with cherry blossoms, standing under an umbrella, holding fruit, eating cake, dressed as a teacher, holding flowers, sleeping under a blue blanket, carrying eggs, hugging a tomato, holding strawberries, blowing bubbles, wearing a blue cap, holding an orange, sitting with cotton, bathing in a wooden tub, and holding candy. Maintain a gentle pastel palette, soft shading, round faces, rosy cheeks, and subtle ink outlines. The overall feeling should be nostalgic, charming, educational, highly detailed, and perfect for a nursery wall chart or a cute slide cover for a Japanese learning presentation.
title: Cute Bunny Hiragana Poster
description: A whimsical Japanese hiragana learning chart with 40 bunny-illustrated cells, ideal for classroom decor, children's materials, or playful presentation covers.

content:
Create a dramatic Japanese mobile game advertisement poster for a zombie survival RPG in anime-meets-cinematic style. Vertical smartphone poster layout, dense promotional design, gritty urban apocalypse background at dusk with ruined city streets, smoke, sparks, debris, damaged buildings, neon signs, and a crowd of zombies advancing from behind. In the center, a young anime woman sits on the ground in a slightly slouched pose, legs bent, holding a black handgun upright in one hand. She has straight dark brown to black shoulder-length hair, pale skin, and an oversized dirty white T-shirt splattered with blood. Large bold Japanese calligraphy is printed vertically on the shirt: "働きたくね〜". Her expression area is simple and unobtrusive so the composition emphasizes the shirt, weapon, and mood. Surround her with multiple zombies in torn clothing, reaching forward from the left and right background.

Use an aggressive game key-art design with 8 clearly separated promotional sections. Section 1: top-left game logo block, count 3 text elements, with large distressed English title "Dead or work", smaller Japanese subtitle "ゾンビサバイバルRPG", and heavy black paint-splatter background with white and red text. Section 2: right-side vertical slogan area, count 2 text elements, with white Japanese text "動かない、ただ" above giant red vertical text "生き残れ。" on a rough black brushstroke strip. Section 3: left-middle feature list panel, count 4 feature rows, each row with a white icon in a black square and yellow/white Japanese copy; labels are "ゾンビを倒して生き延びろ", "拠点を強化・カスタマイズ", "仲間と協力プレイ", and "デイリーミッションで報酬GET". Section 4: right-middle bonus campaign panel, count 1 headline plus 3 reward items; headline in a bright jagged yellow burst says "今すぐ始めると 豪華特典プレゼント!" and beneath it are three item boxes labeled "ゴールド ×5000", "レア武器 (7日間)", and "サバイバルキット ×10". Section 5: lower-middle gameplay screenshot strip, count 4 thumbnails with captions; captions are "リアルタイムバトル!", "基地を自由にカスタム!", "仲間とレイドボスに挑め!", and "広大なオープンワールド!". Section 6: bottom call-to-action banner, count 2 text elements, with a huge yellow-and-red Japanese phrase "今すぐダウンロード!" and smaller white/red subtext "あなたの選択が、生死を分ける。". Section 7: bottom-right store badges, count 2 badges, showing App Store and Google Play style download buttons. Section 8: bottom-right QR area, count 1 QR code in a white square.

Overall aesthetic: hyper-detailed, high-contrast, grimy, intense, commercially polished gacha/mobile game ad, combining anime character art with realistic zombie horror background. Use bold distressed typography, black brush textures, red warning colors, yellow promotional highlights, metallic UI framing, and cinematic orange-gray lighting.
title: Zombie Survival RPG Anime Ad Poster
description: This generates a dense Japanese-style mobile game advertisement poster for a zombie survival RPG, suitable for app promo art, fake game ads, or cinematic anime key visuals.

content: A majestic deep-space scene of an owl-shaped nebula floating in a black starfield, centered composition, the cosmic gas and dust naturally forming the clear face of an owl. Two large glowing circular eyes with bright electric-blue star cores, a narrow pointed beak of amber light between them, and two long upward-sweeping ear tufts made of burnt-orange and golden-brown nebula pillars. The body is formed from layered translucent clouds of warm copper, sepia, ivory, and cool smoky blue, with soft luminous edges and intricate filament textures. Surround the figure with many sharp stars of varying sizes, including several bright blue-white stars with subtle diffraction spikes. content: A dramatic high-action anime fantasy illustration of a young female warrior with {argument name="hair color" default="jet black"} hair and piercing {argument name="eye color" default="bright blue"} eyes, shown in a dynamic low-angle close-to-mid shot as she swings a long segmented metal whip-sword in a wide circular arc around her body. Her hair is long, voluminous, and blowing violently in the wind, with sharp glossy strands and detailed highlights. She has a focused, fierce expression and is looking directly toward the viewer over her shoulder. She wears ornate black, silver, and gold-trimmed armor with a fitted bodice, armored gauntlets, shoulder plates, thigh armor, and a short layered skirt with flowing blue-and-white fabric panels and metallic decorations. The weapon forms a bright spiral ring across the foreground and upper right of the composition, with reflective steel segments, motion blur, and sparkling highlights. Small rocks and debris are suspended in the air from the force of the attack. The setting is a ruined stone battlefield or castle courtyard with cracked ground, broken masonry, and several tall blue banners in the background beneath a cloudy daylight sky. Use cinematic action composition, strong foreshortening, intense sense of motion, ultra-detailed fantasy costume design, polished metallic textures, dramatic wind effects, crisp anime linework, painterly lighting, high contrast, and an epic heroic mood in the style of a premium fantasy key visual.

content:
Please generate a high-design character relationship map poster based on {argument name="theme" default="Demon Slayer"}. This image should not be a simple illustration, but a character relationship map that combines information visualization, narrative structure, poster design sense, and stylistic fidelity.

Please automatically complete the following:
- Identify the work and core settings corresponding to the theme
- Extract the most representative 6–12 key characters, not exceeding 15 if necessary
- Identify and display key character relationships, including blood ties, romance, friendship, alliances, hostility, master-disciple, etc.
- Automatically choose a composition method based on the work's characteristics, such as protagonist-centered, dual-core confrontation, faction-based, family tree, or chronological evolution
- Automatically refine the work's style DNA, including color, worldview symbols, textures, mood, typography, and representative elements
- Transform these stylistic elements into an overall visual design for the relationship map, rather than simply copying an official poster
- Use different colors, line types, and arrows to distinguish different relationships, ensuring clear lines and layers without clutter
- Make core characters most prominent, followed by important characters, and subordinate characters weakened to form a clear visual hierarchy
- Ensure every character name is legible, with identity or faction labels if necessary

The final product should satisfy:
- Immediate understanding of character hierarchy and key relationships
- Obvious alignment with the original work's temperament and setting
- Combines the clarity of an infographic with the premium design of a poster
- Unified, exquisite, complete, and suitable for social media sharing or poster display
- Avoids a cheap flowchart feel, messy piling, and information overload.

content:
Flat illustration, high-end oriental fantasy style city poster design, vertical 9:16 composition. The layout uses a diagonal + S-shaped flow extending from the bottom left to top right. The background is deep black grading down to intense dark red, creating strong warm-cool contrast and spatial depth with faint stardust and grain texture. In the center, a flowing golden energy line winds through like a flame, extending upward from the base, featuring fluid texture, particle effects, and gradient highlights, with subtle energy debris and volumetric light.

Within the golden flow, the architectural landmarks of {argument name="city" default="Guangzhou"} emerge layer by layer: the Canton Tower is the visual core with prominent proportions, surrounded by the Zhujiang New Town skyline, Liede Bridge, and modern Lingnan architectural elements. Buildings are rendered using "fine line drawing + golden luminous blocks," with clear outlines and rich details, appearing to float in a void against the golden halo, creating a surreal spatial hierarchy with slightly fogged backgrounds for added depth.

At the bottom of the frame is an oriental white-haired female figure with flowing hair like mist, naturally connecting and merging with the golden light. Her hair is translucent with gradient light effects; she has a graceful posture, eyes closed, and a serene expression, holding a bouquet of colorful flowers dotted with shimmering particles, symbolizing the spiritual connection between people and city energy. Character details are moderately simplified to emphasize the overall design.

Lighting is concentrated on the golden flow, buildings, and character outlines, creating intense chiaroscuro and visual focus. The overall atmosphere is grand, mysterious, imbued with oriental mythology, and slightly healing. Colors use black and dark red as a base with brilliant gold as the main visual emphasis. The gold has rich light-dark layers, complemented by small areas of high-saturation floral colors, maintaining a sophisticated and restrained aesthetic.

Integrated text and layout: Centered Songti font at the top reads "{argument name="city" default="Guangzhou"} · China," followed by smaller text "{argument name="date" default="2026/04/20"}" and "{argument name="author" default="LIYUE"}" below. Text uses pale gold or soft warm white, unified with the overall lighting. High-quality details, cinematic lighting, rich volumetric and particle details, clean image without noise, ultra-high 8K resolution, commercial-grade poster quality.

content:
GPT-Image-2 prompt: please automatically generate a top-tier concept poster / infographic-style movie poster centered around {argument name="theme" default="ranking of emperors in Chinese history"}.

Require the AI to automatically derive and uniformly design the entire following visual system based on this theme, without my extra specification:
- Core subject (automatically judge suitability for people, products, architecture, artifacts, symbols, scenes, or abstract imagery)
- Bottom supporting structure
- Hovering symbols or spiritual symbols above
- Scene wrapping elements
- Metaphor system
- Color hierarchy
- Material contrast
- Lighting logic
- Title, subtitle, and auxiliary copy
- Brand sense and high-end expression

The final frame must be: a shocking, precise, unified, cinematic, ultra-high detail conceptual key visual poster suitable for high-end printing.

[Overall Style]
Ultra-realistic 3D commercial CGI rendering, merging cinematic lighting, luxury visual language, futuristic concept design, and epic composition. The image must have a "single main visual core," not messy, not like a collage, and not like a regular e-commerce poster.

[Automatic Derivation Rules]
AI must automatically decide based on the [theme]:
1. Core visual metaphor
2. Subject type and posture
3. Form of supporting structure
4. Form of suspended elements
5. Scene shell and spatial atmosphere
6. Main, auxiliary, and emphasis colors
7. Material combinations
8. Text temperament and layout style

[Composition Rules]
- Absolute sense of premium quality
- Strong central order, overall unity
- Allows for axial symmetry or epic composition near the central axis
- Clear visual gravity, forming clear levels from top to bottom
- Edge negative space is clean, restrained, and has room to breathe

[Visual Quality]
- Ultra-high detail
- Clear volumetric light
- Authentic materials
- Natural reflection, refraction, shadows, fog, and depth of field
- Overall standard of high-end brand campaign key visual / luxury invitation poster / conceptual editorial poster

[Typography System]
- Overall 90% visual, 10% text
- AI automatically generates the most matching main title and subtitle based on the [theme]
- Title must be concise, sharp, and powerful
- Text should be as minimal and accurate as possible; do not stack words

[Signature Requirement]
Naturally add the author signature in the bottom corner: @a9quant

content:
New Chinese style ink wash landscape poster, vertical 9:16 composition, oriental minimalist aesthetic style. Large areas of white space, overall color palette of a spring morning (cyan-green, misty blue, light gray, pale ink), low saturation, clear and soft, high-end texture. The main subject consists of steep, majestic mountains rising from both sides of a calm lake, occupying the left and right sides of the frame. The mountains are rendered with ink wash techniques showing rich variations in wetness and density, with local pale green tints reflecting spring vitality. Peaks are enveloped in moist, soft morning mist that layers into the pale blue-gray sky, creating atmospheric perspective and spatial depth.

The lake surface is as calm as a mirror with a slight green tint, reflecting the mountains and sky with a soft focus and atomized diffusion effect, enhancing the moist and dreamy spring atmosphere. In the middle ground, a small wooden boat with a curved canopy floats slowly, oars lightly touching the water to create fine ripples that spread naturally, maintaining total stillness. On the boat is a fisherwoman in red, small in scale (distant perspective), simplified into an ink silhouette with light coloring. She wears a low-saturation cinnabar red traditional dress (not bright red), the color softened by the mist. No facial details, only the silhouette and posture (e.g., lightly touching the canopy or holding an oar). The red forms a faint reflection on the water, serving as the only warm visual focus.

The banks are dotted with sparse woods and new spring vegetation, using light ink and pale green dots, combining solid and void to enhance rhythm and life. A few birds soar in the distant sky, lightly and sparsely distributed to enhance spatial hierarchy and nimbleness. Centered at the top is vertical calligraphy: "{argument name="title" default="Oriental Aesthetics"}", in traditional hand-written running or cursive style (in the spirit of Wang Xizhi), with natural brushstrokes, clear transitions, and ink smudge effects to avoid a digital font feel. Calligraphy color is deep ink-blue or soft black, unified with the scene. Style: Fusion of ink wash and modern minimalist design, spring Zen, ethereal and moist, serene atmosphere, restrained warm-cool contrast, cinematic lighting, high-end artistic poster quality, 8K ultra-clear details.

content: A stunning vertical poster illustration on a textured cream paper background, featuring a massive, flowing translucent red silk ribbon that spirals diagonally from the bottom right to the top left. At the bottom right, one woman in a flowing traditional red dress holds the end of the ribbon. The ribbon frames a highly detailed, sprawling cityscape that transitions from historic to modern. The lower and middle sections showcase traditional Chinese temples, pagodas, and historic arcade buildings adorned with red lanterns, alongside blooming peonies and golden clouds. Integrated into the left side of the ribbon's flow are three traditional Yingge dancers with painted faces in dynamic poses. The upper section reveals a sweeping teal coastal bay with modern skyscrapers, one long suspension bridge, three ships navigating the water, distant mountains, and seagulls flying near a golden sun. The bottom left corner features elegant typography: "{argument name="season and year" default="SPRING 2026"}" in a serif font, large golden Chinese calligraphy reading "{argument name="main city name" default="汕头"}", smaller vertical text "{argument name="subtitle" default="百载商埠 · 魅力汕头"}", and "{argument name="english location" default="SHANTOU CHINA"}" with a small red seal stamp. The art style is a breathtaking fusion of traditional Chinese ink wash painting and modern digital fantasy art, utilizing a vibrant palette of crimson, teal, and gold.

content: A breathtaking, surreal travel poster on a white canvas background, featuring a magical, glowing red silk ribbon that flows diagonally from the bottom right to the top left, seamlessly blending traditional and modern elements of a city. At the bottom right, a tiny figure of a woman in a flowing red Hanfu holds the end of the ribbon. As the ribbon winds upward, it transforms into a dynamic cityscape. The lower-middle section features {argument name="traditional landmark" default="multi-story wooden stilt houses glowing with warm lanterns"} with a modern monorail train passing through them. The center showcases a vibrant, illuminated modern metropolis with {argument name="modern landmark" default="a cluster of futuristic skyscrapers connected by a skybridge"}, a wide river with boats, a red suspension bridge, and a cable car suspended in the air. The top fades into majestic, misty mountains, traditional pavilions, and a pale red sun. The left side of the poster features elegant typography: large, golden, textured Chinese calligraphy reading "{argument name="city name chinese" default="重庆"}", with the English text "{argument name="city name english" default="CHONGQING"}" below it. Further down, the text "{argument name="season and year" default="SPRING 2026"}" is displayed in a clean, serif font, accompanied by smaller vertical Chinese text and red traditional seal stamps. The overall style is a masterful blend of traditional Chinese ink wash painting and hyper-realistic, cinematic 3D rendering with soft, ethereal clouds and mist framing the composition.

content: A cinematic, dark gothic mystery movie poster. In the center, a lone man wearing a trench coat and fedora stands with his back to the viewer, looking up at a massive, imposing gothic clock tower. The clock face is illuminated, and the structure around it is shattering with dark fragments falling. The setting is a foggy, wet cobblestone square at night, illuminated by warm yellow streetlamps and glowing windows from surrounding European-style buildings. A full moon shines through cloudy skies. There are exactly 3 ravens: one perched on a stone monument on the left, and two flying in the sky. The monument on the left has engraved text "VERITAS IN UMBRA, TEMPUS NEMINI PARET". On the right, a wooden signpost has 3 directional arrows reading "Marktplatz", "Uhrenturm", and "Alte Gasse", with a small newspaper leaning against it reading "Die Uhr steht." and "Wer lügt?". The poster features elegant, slightly distressed serif Japanese typography. At the top, a horizontal tagline reads {argument name="top tagline" default="真夜中、時は止まり、嘘が動き出す。"}. On the upper left, a vertical tagline reads {argument name="side tagline" default="その鐘の音が、真実を葬った。"}. In the lower center, the large main title reads {argument name="main title" default="時計塔の殺人"}. Below the title is a smaller tagline "時を欺いたのは、誰だ。" followed by a dense block of realistic movie credits including director, cast, and crew names. At the very bottom, the release text {argument name="release date" default="2025年 秋 全国ロードショー"} is displayed alongside a website URL and rating logos. The entire poster is framed by a thin, ornate gold border.

The golden sunset glow pours across the sky, casting a soft amber halo around her figure. {argument name="background scene" default="Modern buildings with cold glass reflections and geometric structures"} fade into the depth of field, using a traditional ink-wash "negative space" technique to create an airy composition of dialogue between the past and present. A long-lasting oriental poetic atmosphere, blending reality and illusion, quietly melds into the city streets, capturing a serene scroll of time out of place amidst the interplay of warm and cold tones.
